authors_text: Irina Higgins,Sébastien Racanière,Danilo Rezende
title: Symmetry-Based Representations for Artificial and Biological General Intelligence
title_zh: 人工和生物通用智能的基于对称的表示
abstract: Biological intelligence is remarkable in its ability to produce complex behaviour in many diverse situations through data efficient, generalisable and transferable skill acquisition. It is believed that learning "good" sensory representations is important for enabling this, however there is little agreement as to what a good representation should look like. In this review article we are going to argue that symmetry transformations are a fundamental principle that can guide our search for what makes a good representation. The idea that there exist transformations (symmetries) that affect some aspects of the system but not others, and their relationship to conserved quantities has become central in modern physics, resulting in a more unified theoretical framework and even ability to predict the existence of new particles. Recently, symmetries have started to gain prominence in machine learning too, resulting in more data efficient and generalisable algorithms that can mimic some of the complex behaviours produced by biological intelligence. Finally, first demonstrations of the importance of symmetry transformations for representation learning in the brain are starting to arise in neuroscience. Taken together, the overwhelming positive effect that symmetries bring to these disciplines suggest that they may be an important general framework that determines the structure of the universe, constrains the nature of natural tasks and consequently shapes both biological and artificial intelligence.
summary: Biological intelligence is remarkable in its ability to produce complex behaviour in many diverse situations through data efficient, generalisable and transferable skill acquisition. It is believed that learning "good" sensory representations is important for enabling this, however there is little agreement as to what a good representation should look like. In this review article we are going to argue that symmetry transformations are a fundamental principle that can guide our search for what makes a good representation. The idea that there exist transformations (symmetries) that affect some aspects of the system but not others, and their relationship to conserved quantities has become central in modern physics, resulting in a more unified theoretical framework and even ability to predict the existence of new particles. Recently, symmetries have started to gain prominence in machine learning too, resulting in more data efficient and generalisable algorithms that can mimic some of the complex behaviours produced by biological intelligence. Finally, first demonstrations of the importance of symmetry transformations for representation learning in the brain are starting to arise in neuroscience. Taken together, the overwhelming positive effect that symmetries bring to these disciplines suggest that they may be an important general framework that determines the structure of the universe, constrains the nature of natural tasks and consequently shapes both biological and artificial intelligence.
abstract_zh: 生物智能的卓越之处在于，它能够通过数据高效、可概括和可转移的技能获取，在许多不同的情况下产生复杂的行为。人们认为，学习“良好”的感官表征对于实现这一点很重要，但是对于良好的表征应该是什么样子，目前还没有达成一致。在这篇评论文章中，我们将论证对称变换是一个基本原则，可以指导我们寻找良好表示的方法。存在影响系统某些方面但不影响其他方面的变换（对称性）及其与守恒量的关系的想法已成为现代物理学的核心，从而产生了更加统一的理论框架，甚至能够预测新粒子的存在。最近，对称性在机器学习中也开始受到重视，从而产生了更高效、更通用的算法，可以模仿生物智能产生的一些复杂行为。最后，神经科学中开始首次证明对称变换对于大脑表征学习的重要性。总而言之，对称性给这些学科带来的压倒性的积极影响表明，它们可能是一个重要的总体框架，决定宇宙的结构，限制自然任务的性质，从而塑造生物和人工智能。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了对称性变换在人工和生物通用智能中的核心作用，探讨其如何指导有效表征学习。
AI.motivation: 生物智能能高效处理多样任务，但缺乏对‘良好表征’的共识；物理学和机器学习领域对称性研究的成功启发了该领域的探索。
AI.method: 通过跨学科综述，整合物理学对称性理论、机器学习算法实践及神经科学最新发现，分析对称性在表征学习中的普适性。
AI.result: 对称性原则显著提升了算法的数据效率与泛化能力，并在神经科学中初步验证了其在大脑表征中的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 对称性可能构成宇宙结构与自然任务的底层框架，为生物与人工智能的表征学习提供统一理论指导。

Taken together, the overwhelming positive effect that symmetries bring to these disciplines suggest that they may be an important general framework that determines the structure of the universe, constrains the nature of natural tasks and consequently shapes both biological and artificial intelligence. 生物智能的卓越之处在于，它能够通过数据高效、可概括和可转移的技能获取，在许多不同的情况下产生复杂的行为。人们认为，学习“良好”的感官表征对于实现这一点很重要，但是对于良好的表征应该是什么样子，目前还没有达成一致。在这篇评论文章中，我们将论证对称变换是一个基本原则，可以指导我们寻找良好表示的方法。存在影响系统某些方面但不影响其他方面的变换（对称性）及其与守恒量的关系的想法已成为现代物理学的核心，从而产生了更加统一的理论框架，甚至能够预测新粒子的存在。最近，对称性在机器学习中也开始受到重视，从而产生了更高效、更通用的算法，可以模仿生物智能产生的一些复杂行为。最后，神经科学中开始首次证明对称变换对于大脑表征学习的重要性。总而言之，对称性给这些学科带来的压倒性的积极影响表明，它们可能是一个重要的总体框架，决定宇宙的结构，限制自然任务的性质，从而塑造生物和人工智能。 本文综述了对称性变换在人工和生物通用智能中的核心作用，探讨其如何指导有效表征学习。 Irina Higgins,Sébastien Racanière,Danilo Rezende q-bio.NC,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.NE,stat.ML

authors_text: Lin Zhang,Li Shen,Liang Ding,Dacheng Tao,Ling-Yu Duan
title: Fine-tuning Global Model via Data-Free Knowledge Distillation for Non-IID Federated Learning
title_zh: 通过无数据知识蒸馏微调全局模型以实现非独立同分布联邦学习
comment: This paper is accepted by CVPR2022
comments: This paper is accepted by CVPR2022
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) is an emerging distributed learning paradigm under privacy constraint. Data heterogeneity is one of the main challenges in FL, which results in slow convergence and degraded performance. Most existing approaches only tackle the heterogeneity challenge by restricting the local model update in client, ignoring the performance drop caused by direct global model aggregation. Instead, we propose a data-free knowledge distillation method to fine-tune the global model in the server (FedFTG), which relieves the issue of direct model aggregation. Concretely, FedFTG explores the input space of local models through a generator, and uses it to transfer the knowledge from local models to the global model. Besides, we propose a hard sample mining scheme to achieve effective knowledge distillation throughout the training. In addition, we develop customized label sampling and class-level ensemble to derive maximum utilization of knowledge, which implicitly mitigates the distribution discrepancy across clients. Extensive experiments show that our FedFTG significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art (SOTA) FL algorithms and can serve as a strong plugin for enhancing FedAvg, FedProx, FedDyn, and SCAFFOLD.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) is an emerging distributed learning paradigm under privacy constraint. Data heterogeneity is one of the main challenges in FL, which results in slow convergence and degraded performance. Most existing approaches only tackle the heterogeneity challenge by restricting the local model update in client, ignoring the performance drop caused by direct global model aggregation. Instead, we propose a data-free knowledge distillation method to fine-tune the global model in the server (FedFTG), which relieves the issue of direct model aggregation. Concretely, FedFTG explores the input space of local models through a generator, and uses it to transfer the knowledge from local models to the global model. Besides, we propose a hard sample mining scheme to achieve effective knowledge distillation throughout the training. In addition, we develop customized label sampling and class-level ensemble to derive maximum utilization of knowledge, which implicitly mitigates the distribution discrepancy across clients. Extensive experiments show that our FedFTG significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art (SOTA) FL algorithms and can serve as a strong plugin for enhancing FedAvg, FedProx, FedDyn, and SCAFFOLD.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）是隐私约束下新兴的分布式学习范式。数据异构性是 FL 的主要挑战之一，它导致收敛缓慢和性能下降。大多数现有方法仅通过限制客户端中的本地模型更新来解决异构性挑战，忽略了直接全局模型聚合引起的性能下降。相反，我们提出了一种无数据的知识蒸馏方法来微调服务器中的全局模型（FedFTG），从而缓解了直接模型聚合的问题。具体来说，FedFTG 通过生成器探索局部模型的输入空间，并使用它将知识从局部模型转移到全局模型。此外，我们提出了硬样本挖掘方案，以在整个训练过程中实现有效的知识蒸馏。此外，我们开发了定制的标签采样和类级集成，以最大限度地利用知识，从而隐式地减轻客户之间的分布差异。大量实验表明，我们的 FedFTG 显着优于最先进的 (SOTA) FL 算法，并且可以作为增强 FedAvg、FedProx、FedDyn 和 SCAFFOLD 的强大插件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需客户端数据的全局模型微调方法FedFTG，通过知识蒸馏缓解联邦学习中的非独立同分布（Non-IID）数据问题。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习方法仅通过限制客户端本地模型更新应对数据异质性，忽视了直接聚合全局模型导致的性能下降问题。
AI.method: FedFTG通过生成器探索本地模型输入空间，将本地模型知识迁移至全局模型，并结合难样本挖掘、定制化标签采样和类级集成技术提升知识蒸馏效果。
AI.result: 实验表明FedFTG显著优于现有SOTA联邦学习算法，可作为增强FedAvg、FedProx等算法的强插件。
AI.conclusion: FedFTG通过隐式缓解客户端分布差异，有效提升了联邦学习在非独立同分布场景下的性能。

authors_text: Mattia Carletti,Matteo Terzi,Gian Antonio Susto
title: On the Properties of Adversarially-Trained CNNs
title_zh: 关于对抗训练的 CNN 的特性
abstract: Adversarial Training has proved to be an effective training paradigm to enforce robustness against adversarial examples in modern neural network architectures. Despite many efforts, explanations of the foundational principles underpinning the effectiveness of Adversarial Training are limited and far from being widely accepted by the Deep Learning community. In this paper, we describe surprising properties of adversarially-trained models, shedding light on mechanisms through which robustness against adversarial attacks is implemented. Moreover, we highlight limitations and failure modes affecting these models that were not discussed by prior works. We conduct extensive analyses on a wide range of architectures and datasets, performing a deep comparison between robust and natural models.
summary: Adversarial Training has proved to be an effective training paradigm to enforce robustness against adversarial examples in modern neural network architectures. Despite many efforts, explanations of the foundational principles underpinning the effectiveness of Adversarial Training are limited and far from being widely accepted by the Deep Learning community. In this paper, we describe surprising properties of adversarially-trained models, shedding light on mechanisms through which robustness against adversarial attacks is implemented. Moreover, we highlight limitations and failure modes affecting these models that were not discussed by prior works. We conduct extensive analyses on a wide range of architectures and datasets, performing a deep comparison between robust and natural models.
abstract_zh: 对抗性训练已被证明是一种有效的训练范例，可以增强现代神经网络架构中对抗性示例的鲁棒性。尽管付出了很多努力，但对支撑对抗训练有效性的基本原则的解释仍然有限，并且远未被深度学习社区广泛接受。在本文中，我们描述了对抗性训练模型的令人惊讶的特性，揭示了实现对抗性攻击的鲁棒性的机制。此外，我们强调了影响这些模型的局限性和故障模式，这些模型在之前的工作中没有讨论过。我们对各种架构和数据集进行了广泛的分析，对稳健模型和自然模型进行了深入比较。

AI.tldr: 本文研究对抗训练的卷积神经网络（CNN）的特性，分析其对抗攻击的鲁棒性机制及局限性。
AI.motivation: 尽管对抗训练被证明能有效提升模型鲁棒性，但其理论基础解释不足，社区内缺乏广泛共识。
AI.method: 通过广泛实验分析多种网络架构和数据集，深入比较鲁棒模型与自然训练模型的差异。
AI.result: 发现对抗训练模型具有意外特性，揭示了鲁棒性实现机制，并首次指出其未被讨论的局限性与失效模式。
AI.conclusion: 对抗训练虽有效，但存在潜在缺陷需进一步研究，其理论解释仍需完善以推动社区共识。

authors_text: Eleftherios Ioannou,Steve Maddock
title: Depth-aware Neural Style Transfer using Instance Normalization
title_zh: 使用实例归一化的深度感知神经风格迁移
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures, Computer Graphics & Visual Computing (CGVC) 2022
comments: 8 pages, 8 figures, Computer Graphics & Visual Computing (CGVC) 2022
abstract: Neural Style Transfer (NST) is concerned with the artistic stylization of visual media. It can be described as the process of transferring the style of an artistic image onto an ordinary photograph. Recently, a number of studies have considered the enhancement of the depth-preserving capabilities of the NST algorithms to address the undesired effects that occur when the input content images include numerous objects at various depths. Our approach uses a deep residual convolutional network with instance normalization layers that utilizes an advanced depth prediction network to integrate depth preservation as an additional loss function to content and style. We demonstrate results that are effective in retaining the depth and global structure of content images. Three different evaluation processes show that our system is capable of preserving the structure of the stylized results while exhibiting style-capture capabilities and aesthetic qualities comparable or superior to state-of-the-art methods. Project page: https://ioannoue.github.io/depth-aware-nst-using-in.html.
summary: Neural Style Transfer (NST) is concerned with the artistic stylization of visual media. It can be described as the process of transferring the style of an artistic image onto an ordinary photograph. Recently, a number of studies have considered the enhancement of the depth-preserving capabilities of the NST algorithms to address the undesired effects that occur when the input content images include numerous objects at various depths. Our approach uses a deep residual convolutional network with instance normalization layers that utilizes an advanced depth prediction network to integrate depth preservation as an additional loss function to content and style. We demonstrate results that are effective in retaining the depth and global structure of content images. Three different evaluation processes show that our system is capable of preserving the structure of the stylized results while exhibiting style-capture capabilities and aesthetic qualities comparable or superior to state-of-the-art methods. Project page: https://ioannoue.github.io/depth-aware-nst-using-in.html.
abstract_zh: 神经风格迁移（NST）关注视觉媒体的艺术风格化。可以说是将艺术图像的风格转移到普通照片上的过程。最近，许多研究已经考虑增强 NST 算法的深度保留能力，以解决当输入内容图像包括不同深度的大量对象时出现的不良影响。我们的方法使用带有实例归一化层的深度残差卷积网络，该网络利用先进的深度预测网络将深度保留集成为内容和风格的附加损失函数。我们展示了可有效保留内容图像的深度和全局结构的结果。三种不同的评估过程表明，我们的系统能够保留风格化结果的结构，同时表现出与最先进的方法相当或优于最先进的方法的风格捕捉能力和美学品质。项目页面：https://ioannoue.github.io/depth-aware-nst-using-in.html。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度感知的神经风格迁移方法，通过实例归一化层和深度预测网络增强内容图像的深度保留能力。
AI.motivation: 传统神经风格迁移在处理多深度对象的图像时易导致深度信息丢失，需改进算法以保持内容图像的深度和全局结构。
AI.method: 采用深度残差卷积网络，集成实例归一化层与先进深度预测网络，将深度保真作为额外损失函数纳入内容与风格损失中。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效保留内容图像深度与结构，三类评估均显示其风格捕捉能力与美学效果优于或媲美现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过深度感知损失函数成功平衡了风格迁移与深度保留，为复杂场景的视觉风格化提供了有效解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度感知的神经风格迁移方法，通过实例归一化层和深度预测网络增强内容图像的深度保留能力。
ai_content.motivation: 传统神经风格迁移在处理多深度对象的图像时易导致深度信息丢失，需改进算法以保持内容图像的深度和全局结构。
ai_content.method: 采用深度残差卷积网络，集成实例归一化层与先进深度预测网络，将深度保真作为额外损失函数纳入内容与风格损失中。
ai_content.result: 实验表明该方法能有效保留内容图像深度与结构，三类评估均显示其风格捕捉能力与美学效果优于或媲美现有最佳方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 所提方法通过深度感知损失函数成功平衡了风格迁移与深度保留，为复杂场景的视觉风格化提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Depth-aware Neural Style Transfer using Instance Normalization 使用实例归一化的深度感知神经风格迁移 Neural Style Transfer (NST) is concerned with the artistic stylization of visual media. It can be described as the process of transferring the style of an artistic image onto an ordinary photograph. Recently, a number of studies have considered the enhancement of the depth-preserving capabilities of the NST algorithms to address the undesired effects that occur when the input content images include numerous objects at various depths. Our approach uses a deep residual convolutional network with instance normalization layers that utilizes an advanced depth prediction network to integrate depth preservation as an additional loss function to content and style. We demonstrate results that are effective in retaining the depth and global structure of content images. Three different evaluation processes show that our system is capable of preserving the structure of the stylized results while exhibiting style-capture capabilities and aesthetic qualities comparable or superior to state-of-the-art methods. Project page: https://ioannoue.github.io/depth-aware-nst-using-in.html. 神经风格迁移（NST）关注视觉媒体的艺术风格化。可以说是将艺术图像的风格转移到普通照片上的过程。最近，许多研究已经考虑增强 NST 算法的深度保留能力，以解决当输入内容图像包括不同深度的大量对象时出现的不良影响。我们的方法使用带有实例归一化层的深度残差卷积网络，该网络利用先进的深度预测网络将深度保留集成为内容和风格的附加损失函数。我们展示了可有效保留内容图像的深度和全局结构的结果。三种不同的评估过程表明，我们的系统能够保留风格化结果的结构，同时表现出与最先进的方法相当或优于最先进的方法的风格捕捉能力和美学品质。项目页面：https://ioannoue.github.io/depth-aware-nst-using-in.html。 本文提出一种结合深度感知的神经风格迁移方法，通过实例归一化层和深度预测网络增强内容图像的深度保留能力。 Eleftherios Ioannou,Steve Maddock cs.CV,cs.NE

authors_text: Marcos Faundez-Zanuy,Daniel Rodríguez-Porcheron
title: Speaker recognition using residual signal of linear and nonlinear prediction models
title_zh: 使用线性和非线性预测模型的残差信号进行说话人识别
comment: 4 pages, published in 5th International Conference on spoken language processing. Vol.2 pp.121-124. ICSLP 1998. ISBN 1-876346-17-5
comments: 4 pages, published in 5th International Conference on spoken language processing. Vol.2 pp.121-124. ICSLP 1998. ISBN 1-876346-17-5
abstract: This Paper discusses the usefulness of the residual signal for speaker recognition. It is shown that the combination of both a measure defined over LPCC coefficients and a measure defined over the energy of the residual signal gives rise to an improvement over the classical method which considers only the LPCC coefficients. If the residual signal is obtained from a linear prediction analysis, the improvement is 2.63% (error rate drops from 6.31% to 3.68%) and if it is computed through a nonlinear predictive neural nets based model, the improvement is 3.68%.
summary: This Paper discusses the usefulness of the residual signal for speaker recognition. It is shown that the combination of both a measure defined over LPCC coefficients and a measure defined over the energy of the residual signal gives rise to an improvement over the classical method which considers only the LPCC coefficients. If the residual signal is obtained from a linear prediction analysis, the improvement is 2.63% (error rate drops from 6.31% to 3.68%) and if it is computed through a nonlinear predictive neural nets based model, the improvement is 3.68%.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了残余信号对于说话人识别的有用性。结果表明，对 LPCC 系数定义的测量和对残余信号能量定义的测量的组合产生了对仅考虑 LPCC 系数的经典方法的改进。如果残差信号是通过线性预测分析获得的，则改进为 2.63%（错误率从 6.31% 下降到 3.68%），如果通过基于非线性预测神经网络的模型计算，则改进为 3.68%。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了利用线性和非线性预测模型的残差信号提升说话人识别性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统说话人识别方法仅依赖LPCC系数存在局限性，而残差信号可能包含更多语音特征信息，值得探索其辅助作用。
AI.method: 结合LPCC系数度量与残差信号能量度量，分别基于线性预测分析和非线性神经网络预测模型进行实验验证。
AI.result: 线性模型使错误率下降2.63%（6.31%→3.68%），非线性模型进一步提升至3.68%的错误率下降幅度。
AI.conclusion: 残差信号能量特征能有效补充LPCC系数，尤其非线性预测模型在说话人识别中展现更优性能提升。

authors_text: Tobias Czempiel,Aidean Sharghi,Magdalini Paschali,Nassir Navab,Omid Mohareri
title: Surgical Workflow Recognition: from Analysis of Challenges to Architectural Study
title_zh: 手术流程识别：从挑战分析到架构研究
abstract: Algorithmic surgical workflow recognition is an ongoing research field and can be divided into laparoscopic (Internal) and operating room (External) analysis. So far many different works for the internal analysis have been proposed with the combination of a frame-level and an additional temporal model to address the temporal ambiguities between different workflow phases. For the External recognition task, Clip-level methods are in the focus of researchers targeting the local ambiguities present in the OR scene. In this work we evaluate combinations of different model architectures for the task of surgical workflow recognition to provide a fair comparison of the methods for both Internal and External analysis. We show that methods designed for the Internal analysis can be transferred to the external task with comparable performance gains for different architectures.
summary: Algorithmic surgical workflow recognition is an ongoing research field and can be divided into laparoscopic (Internal) and operating room (External) analysis. So far many different works for the internal analysis have been proposed with the combination of a frame-level and an additional temporal model to address the temporal ambiguities between different workflow phases. For the External recognition task, Clip-level methods are in the focus of researchers targeting the local ambiguities present in the OR scene. In this work we evaluate combinations of different model architectures for the task of surgical workflow recognition to provide a fair comparison of the methods for both Internal and External analysis. We show that methods designed for the Internal analysis can be transferred to the external task with comparable performance gains for different architectures.
abstract_zh: 算法手术流程识别是一个正在进行的研究领域，可分为腹腔镜（内部）和手术室（外部）分析。到目前为止，已经提出了许多不同的内部分析工作，结合帧级和附加时间模型来解决不同工作流程阶段之间的时间模糊性。对于外部识别任务，剪辑级方法是研究人员针对 OR 场景中存在的局部歧义的焦点。在这项工作中，我们评估了手术工作流程识别任务的不同模型架构的组合，以提供内部和外部分析方法的公平比较。我们表明，为内部分析设计的方法可以转移到外部任务，并且对于不同的架构具有可比较的性能增益。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了不同模型架构在手术工作流识别任务中的表现，比较了内部（腹腔镜）与外部（手术室）分析方法的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 现有研究分别针对内部和外部手术场景提出不同方法，但缺乏对两者方法迁移性和架构公平性的系统比较。
AI.method: 通过组合不同模型架构，对内部（帧级+时序模型）和外部（剪辑级方法）分析任务进行统一评估与性能对比。
AI.result: 内部分析方法可迁移至外部任务，且不同架构在两类任务中均取得可比性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 模型架构设计对两类任务均有效，未来需进一步探索跨场景通用的手术工作流识别框架。

authors_text: Yuyang Wang,Lik-Hang Lee,Tristan Braud,Pan Hui
title: Re-shaping Post-COVID-19 Teaching and Learning: A Blueprint of Virtual-Physical Blended Classrooms in the Metaverse Era
title_zh: 重塑后COVID-19教学与学习：元宇宙时代虚拟物理混合课堂的蓝图
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, accepted in 2022 IEEE 42nd ICDCS Workshop on SocialMeta
comments: 6 pages, 3 figures, accepted in 2022 IEEE 42nd ICDCS Workshop on SocialMeta
abstract: During the COVID-19 pandemic, most countries have experienced some form of remote education through video conferencing software platforms. However, these software platforms fail to reduce immersion and replicate the classroom experience. The currently emerging Metaverse addresses many of such limitations by offering blended physical-digital environments. This paper aims to assess how the Metaverse can support and improve e-learning. We first survey the latest applications of blended environments in education and highlight the primary challenges and opportunities. Accordingly, we derive our proposal for a virtual-physical blended classroom configuration that brings students and teachers into a shared educational Metaverse. We focus on the system architecture of the Metaverse classroom to achieve real-time synchronization of a large number of participants and activities across physical (mixed reality classrooms) and virtual (remote VR platform) learning spaces. Our proposal attempts to transform the traditional physical classroom into virtual-physical cyberspace as a new social network of learners and educators connected at an unprecedented scale.
summary: During the COVID-19 pandemic, most countries have experienced some form of remote education through video conferencing software platforms. However, these software platforms fail to reduce immersion and replicate the classroom experience. The currently emerging Metaverse addresses many of such limitations by offering blended physical-digital environments. This paper aims to assess how the Metaverse can support and improve e-learning. We first survey the latest applications of blended environments in education and highlight the primary challenges and opportunities. Accordingly, we derive our proposal for a virtual-physical blended classroom configuration that brings students and teachers into a shared educational Metaverse. We focus on the system architecture of the Metaverse classroom to achieve real-time synchronization of a large number of participants and activities across physical (mixed reality classrooms) and virtual (remote VR platform) learning spaces. Our proposal attempts to transform the traditional physical classroom into virtual-physical cyberspace as a new social network of learners and educators connected at an unprecedented scale.
abstract_zh: 在 COVID-19 大流行期间，大多数国家都通过视频会议软件平台经历了某种形式的远程教育。然而，这些软件平台未能降低沉浸感并复制课堂体验。当前新兴的元宇宙通过提供混合的物理数字环境解决了许多此类限制。本文旨在评估元宇宙如何支持和改进电子学习。我们首先调查了混合环境在教育中的最新应用，并强调了主要的挑战和机遇。因此，我们提出了虚拟-物理混合教室配置的建议，该配置将学生和教师带入共享的教育元宇宙。我们专注于元界教室的系统架构，实现跨物理（混合现实教室）和虚拟（远程VR平台）学习空间的大量参与者和活动的实时同步。我们的提案试图将传统的物理教室转变为虚拟物理网络空间，作为学习者和教育者以前所未有的规模连接的新社交网络。

AI.tldr: 评估元宇宙在后疫情时代教育中的应用，提出虚实融合的课堂架构
AI.motivation: 传统远程教育平台沉浸感不足，元宇宙提供混合环境解决此问题
AI.method: 调研混合环境教育应用，分析挑战与机遇，提出虚实融合课堂架构
AI.result: 提出支持大规模实时同步的虚实课堂架构，构建新型学习社交网络
AI.conclusion: 元宇宙可提升在线教育，但需解决技术与交互挑战

search_text: Re-shaping Post-COVID-19 Teaching and Learning: A Blueprint of Virtual-Physical Blended Classrooms in the Metaverse Era 重塑后COVID-19教学与学习：元宇宙时代虚拟物理混合课堂的蓝图 During the COVID-19 pandemic, most countries have experienced some form of remote education through video conferencing software platforms. However, these software platforms fail to reduce immersion and replicate the classroom experience. The currently emerging Metaverse addresses many of such limitations by offering blended physical-digital environments. This paper aims to assess how the Metaverse can support and improve e-learning. We first survey the latest applications of blended environments in education and highlight the primary challenges and opportunities. Accordingly, we derive our proposal for a virtual-physical blended classroom configuration that brings students and teachers into a shared educational Metaverse. We focus on the system architecture of the Metaverse classroom to achieve real-time synchronization of a large number of participants and activities across physical (mixed reality classrooms) and virtual (remote VR platform) learning spaces. Our proposal attempts to transform the traditional physical classroom into virtual-physical cyberspace as a new social network of learners and educators connected at an unprecedented scale. 在 COVID-19 大流行期间，大多数国家都通过视频会议软件平台经历了某种形式的远程教育。然而，这些软件平台未能降低沉浸感并复制课堂体验。当前新兴的元宇宙通过提供混合的物理数字环境解决了许多此类限制。本文旨在评估元宇宙如何支持和改进电子学习。我们首先调查了混合环境在教育中的最新应用，并强调了主要的挑战和机遇。因此，我们提出了虚拟-物理混合教室配置的建议，该配置将学生和教师带入共享的教育元宇宙。我们专注于元界教室的系统架构，实现跨物理（混合现实教室）和虚拟（远程VR平台）学习空间的大量参与者和活动的实时同步。我们的提案试图将传统的物理教室转变为虚拟物理网络空间，作为学习者和教育者以前所未有的规模连接的新社交网络。 评估元宇宙在后疫情时代教育中的应用，提出虚实融合的课堂架构 Yuyang Wang,Lik-Hang Lee,Tristan Braud,Pan Hui cs.HC,cs.MM

authors_text: Furong Ye,Diederick L. Vermetten,Carola Doerr,Thomas Bäck
title: Non-Elitist Selection Can Improve the Performance of Irace
title_zh: 非精英选择可以提高 Irace 的表现
abstract: Modern optimization strategies such as evolutionary algorithms, ant colony algorithms, Bayesian optimization techniques, etc. come with several parameters that steer their behavior during the optimization process. To obtain high-performing algorithm instances, automated algorithm configuration techniques have been developed. One of the most popular tools is irace, which evaluates configurations in sequential races, making use of iterated statistical tests to discard poorly performing configurations. At the end of the race, a set of elite configurations are selected from those survivor configurations that were not discarded, using greedy truncation selection. We study two alternative selection methods: one keeps the best survivor and selects the remaining configurations uniformly at random from the set of survivors, while the other applies entropy to maximize the diversity of the elites. These methods are tested for tuning ant colony optimization algorithms for traveling salesperson problems and the quadratic assignment problem and tuning an exact tree search solver for satisfiability problems. The experimental results show improvement on the tested benchmarks compared to the default selection of irace. In addition, the obtained results indicate that non-elitist can obtain diverse algorithm configurations, which encourages us to explore a wider range of solutions to understand the behavior of algorithms.
summary: Modern optimization strategies such as evolutionary algorithms, ant colony algorithms, Bayesian optimization techniques, etc. come with several parameters that steer their behavior during the optimization process. To obtain high-performing algorithm instances, automated algorithm configuration techniques have been developed. One of the most popular tools is irace, which evaluates configurations in sequential races, making use of iterated statistical tests to discard poorly performing configurations. At the end of the race, a set of elite configurations are selected from those survivor configurations that were not discarded, using greedy truncation selection. We study two alternative selection methods: one keeps the best survivor and selects the remaining configurations uniformly at random from the set of survivors, while the other applies entropy to maximize the diversity of the elites. These methods are tested for tuning ant colony optimization algorithms for traveling salesperson problems and the quadratic assignment problem and tuning an exact tree search solver for satisfiability problems. The experimental results show improvement on the tested benchmarks compared to the default selection of irace. In addition, the obtained results indicate that non-elitist can obtain diverse algorithm configurations, which encourages us to explore a wider range of solutions to understand the behavior of algorithms.
abstract_zh: 现代优化策略，如进化算法、蚁群算法、贝叶斯优化技术等，都带有几个在优化过程中引导其行为的参数。为了获得高性能的算法实例，已经开发了自动算法配置技术。最流行的工具之一是 irace，它评估连续竞赛中的配置，利用迭代统计测试来丢弃性能不佳的配置。在比赛结束时，使用贪婪截断选择从那些未被丢弃的幸存者配置中选择一组精英配置。我们研究了两种替代选择方法：一种保留最好的幸存者并从幸存者集合中均匀随机选择剩余配置，而另一种则应用熵来最大化精英的多样性。这些方法经过测试，用于调整针对旅行推销员问题和二次分配问题的蚁群优化算法，以及针对可满足性问题调整精确树搜索求解器。实验结果表明，与默认选择 irace 相比，测试基准有所改善。此外，获得的结果表明非精英可以获得多样化的算法配置，这鼓励我们探索更广泛的解决方案来理解算法的行为。

AI.tldr: 本文研究非精英选择方法在irace工具中的应用，以提升算法配置性能。
AI.motivation: 传统精英选择可能限制算法配置多样性，导致优化效果受限，需探索非精英选择策略以提升性能。
AI.method: 提出两种非精英选择方法：基于最优幸存者随机选择和基于熵值最大化多样性，并在TSP、QAP及SAT问题中验证。
AI.result: 实验表明非精英选择在测试基准上优于irace默认方法，且能生成更多样化的算法配置。
AI.conclusion: 非精英选择可有效提升irace性能并促进算法行为理解，未来需进一步探索其适用范围。

authors_text: Jens Dörpinghaus,Vera Weil,Carsten Düing,Martin W. Sommer
title: Centrality Measures in multi-layer Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 多层知识图中的中心性度量
abstract: Knowledge graphs play a central role for linking different data which leads to multiple layers. Thus, they are widely used in big data integration, especially for connecting data from different domains. Few studies have investigated the questions how multiple layers within graphs impact methods and algorithms developed for single-purpose networks, for example social networks. This manuscript investigates the impact of multiple layers on centrality measures compared to single-purpose graph. In particular, (a) we develop an experimental environment to (b) evaluate two different centrality measures - degree and betweenness centrality - on random graphs inspired by social network analysis: small-world and scale-free networks. The presented approach (c) shows that the graph structures and topology has a great impact on its robustness for additional data stored. Although the experimental analysis of random graphs allows us to make some basic observations we will (d) make suggestions for additional research on particular graph structures that have a great impact on the stability of networks.
summary: Knowledge graphs play a central role for linking different data which leads to multiple layers. Thus, they are widely used in big data integration, especially for connecting data from different domains. Few studies have investigated the questions how multiple layers within graphs impact methods and algorithms developed for single-purpose networks, for example social networks. This manuscript investigates the impact of multiple layers on centrality measures compared to single-purpose graph. In particular, (a) we develop an experimental environment to (b) evaluate two different centrality measures - degree and betweenness centrality - on random graphs inspired by social network analysis: small-world and scale-free networks. The presented approach (c) shows that the graph structures and topology has a great impact on its robustness for additional data stored. Although the experimental analysis of random graphs allows us to make some basic observations we will (d) make suggestions for additional research on particular graph structures that have a great impact on the stability of networks.
abstract_zh: 知识图在链接不同数据从而形成多层方面发挥着核心作用。因此，它们广泛应用于大数据集成，特别是连接不同领域的数据。很少有研究调查图内的多层如何影响为单一用途网络（例如社交网络）开发的方法和算法的问题。本手稿研究了与单一用途图相比多层对中心性度量的影响。特别是，（a）我们开发了一个实验环境来（b）在受社交网络分析启发的随机图上评估两种不同的中心性度量 - 程度和介数中心性：小世界和无标度网络。所提出的方法（c）表明，图结构和拓扑对其存储的附加数据的鲁棒性有很大影响。尽管随机图的实验分析使我们能够做出一些基本观察，但我们将（d）为对网络稳定性有很大影响的特定图结构的额外研究提出建议。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多层知识图谱中中心性度量（度中心性、介数中心性）与单用途网络的差异，分析多层结构对算法的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对多层知识图谱中网络结构如何影响中心性算法的系统分析，而多层数据整合在大数据应用中至关重要。
AI.method: 构建实验环境，基于小世界网络和无标度网络模型，对比评估多层图与单层图的中心性度量表现。
AI.result: 实验发现图结构和拓扑显著影响网络存储额外数据时的鲁棒性，不同网络类型（小世界/无标度）呈现差异性稳定性特征。
AI.conclusion: 随机图实验揭示了结构对稳定性的影响，但需进一步研究特定实际图结构对网络稳定性的具体作用机制。

authors_text: Yudi Dai,Yitai Lin,Chenglu Wen,Siqi Shen,Lan Xu,Jingyi Yu,Yuexin Ma,Cheng Wang
title: HSC4D: Human-centered 4D Scene Capture in Large-scale Indoor-outdoor Space Using Wearable IMUs and LiDAR
title_zh: HSC4D：使用可穿戴 IMU 和 LiDAR 在大型室内外空间中进行以人为中心的 4D 场景捕捉
abstract: We propose Human-centered 4D Scene Capture (HSC4D) to accurately and efficiently create a dynamic digital world, containing large-scale indoor-outdoor scenes, diverse human motions, and rich interactions between humans and environments. Using only body-mounted IMUs and LiDAR, HSC4D is space-free without any external devices' constraints and map-free without pre-built maps. Considering that IMUs can capture human poses but always drift for long-period use, while LiDAR is stable for global localization but rough for local positions and orientations, HSC4D makes both sensors complement each other by a joint optimization and achieves promising results for long-term capture. Relationships between humans and environments are also explored to make their interaction more realistic. To facilitate many down-stream tasks, like AR, VR, robots, autonomous driving, etc., we propose a dataset containing three large scenes (1k-5k $m^2$) with accurate dynamic human motions and locations. Diverse scenarios (climbing gym, multi-story building, slope, etc.) and challenging human activities (exercising, walking up/down stairs, climbing, etc.) demonstrate the effectiveness and the generalization ability of HSC4D. The dataset and code are available at http://www.lidarhumanmotion.net/hsc4d/.
summary: We propose Human-centered 4D Scene Capture (HSC4D) to accurately and efficiently create a dynamic digital world, containing large-scale indoor-outdoor scenes, diverse human motions, and rich interactions between humans and environments. Using only body-mounted IMUs and LiDAR, HSC4D is space-free without any external devices' constraints and map-free without pre-built maps. Considering that IMUs can capture human poses but always drift for long-period use, while LiDAR is stable for global localization but rough for local positions and orientations, HSC4D makes both sensors complement each other by a joint optimization and achieves promising results for long-term capture. Relationships between humans and environments are also explored to make their interaction more realistic. To facilitate many down-stream tasks, like AR, VR, robots, autonomous driving, etc., we propose a dataset containing three large scenes (1k-5k $m^2$) with accurate dynamic human motions and locations. Diverse scenarios (climbing gym, multi-story building, slope, etc.) and challenging human activities (exercising, walking up/down stairs, climbing, etc.) demonstrate the effectiveness and the generalization ability of HSC4D. The dataset and code are available at http://www.lidarhumanmotion.net/hsc4d/.
abstract_zh: 我们提出以人为中心的 4D 场景捕捉（HSC4D），以准确高效地创建动态数字世界，包含大规模的室内外场景、多样化的人体动作以及人与环境之间丰富的交互。 HSC4D 仅使用安装在车身上的 IMU 和 LiDAR，不受空间限制，不受任何外部设备的限制，并且无需预先构建地图，也无需地图。考虑到 IMU 可以捕捉人体姿势，但长期使用时总会发生漂移，而 LiDAR 的全局定位稳定，但局部位置和方向粗糙，HSC4D 通过联合优化使两种传感器相互补充，并在长期捕捉方面取得了可喜的结果。还探索了人类与环境之间的关系，以使他们的互动更加真实。为了促进许多下游任务，如 AR、VR、机器人、自动驾驶等，我们提出了一个包含三个大场景（1k-5k $m^2$）的数据集，具有准确的动态人体运动和位置。多样化的场景（攀岩馆、多层建筑、斜坡等）和具有挑战性的人类活动（锻炼、上下楼梯、攀爬等）证明了HSC4D的有效性和泛化能力。数据集和代码可从 http://www.lidar humanmotion.net/hsc4d/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HSC4D系统，利用可穿戴IMU和LiDAR实现大规模室内外空间的人体中心4D场景捕捉。
AI.motivation: 现有系统依赖外部设备或预建地图，且IMU存在长期漂移问题，LiDAR局部定位精度不足，需融合传感器优势。
AI.method: 通过联合优化算法融合IMU姿态捕捉与LiDAR全局定位，结合人与环境交互建模，实现无地图、无外部约束的长期动态场景重建。
AI.result: 构建包含1k-5k平方米的三个大场景数据集，涵盖攀岩馆、多层建筑等复杂环境及多种人体活动，验证方法有效性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: HSC4D为AR/VR/自动驾驶等下游任务提供高质量动态场景数据，证明传感器融合与交互建模的可行性。

search_text: HSC4D: Human-centered 4D Scene Capture in Large-scale Indoor-outdoor Space Using Wearable IMUs and LiDAR HSC4D：使用可穿戴 IMU 和 LiDAR 在大型室内外空间中进行以人为中心的 4D 场景捕捉 We propose Human-centered 4D Scene Capture (HSC4D) to accurately and efficiently create a dynamic digital world, containing large-scale indoor-outdoor scenes, diverse human motions, and rich interactions between humans and environments. Using only body-mounted IMUs and LiDAR, HSC4D is space-free without any external devices' constraints and map-free without pre-built maps. Considering that IMUs can capture human poses but always drift for long-period use, while LiDAR is stable for global localization but rough for local positions and orientations, HSC4D makes both sensors complement each other by a joint optimization and achieves promising results for long-term capture. Relationships between humans and environments are also explored to make their interaction more realistic. To facilitate many down-stream tasks, like AR, VR, robots, autonomous driving, etc., we propose a dataset containing three large scenes (1k-5k $m^2$) with accurate dynamic human motions and locations. Diverse scenarios (climbing gym, multi-story building, slope, etc.) and challenging human activities (exercising, walking up/down stairs, climbing, etc.) demonstrate the effectiveness and the generalization ability of HSC4D. The dataset and code are available at http://www.lidarhumanmotion.net/hsc4d/. 我们提出以人为中心的 4D 场景捕捉（HSC4D），以准确高效地创建动态数字世界，包含大规模的室内外场景、多样化的人体动作以及人与环境之间丰富的交互。 HSC4D 仅使用安装在车身上的 IMU 和 LiDAR，不受空间限制，不受任何外部设备的限制，并且无需预先构建地图，也无需地图。考虑到 IMU 可以捕捉人体姿势，但长期使用时总会发生漂移，而 LiDAR 的全局定位稳定，但局部位置和方向粗糙，HSC4D 通过联合优化使两种传感器相互补充，并在长期捕捉方面取得了可喜的结果。还探索了人类与环境之间的关系，以使他们的互动更加真实。为了促进许多下游任务，如 AR、VR、机器人、自动驾驶等，我们提出了一个包含三个大场景（1k-5k $m^2$）的数据集，具有准确的动态人体运动和位置。多样化的场景（攀岩馆、多层建筑、斜坡等）和具有挑战性的人类活动（锻炼、上下楼梯、攀爬等）证明了HSC4D的有效性和泛化能力。数据集和代码可从 http://www.lidar humanmotion.net/hsc4d/ 获取。 本文提出HSC4D系统，利用可穿戴IMU和LiDAR实现大规模室内外空间的人体中心4D场景捕捉。 Yudi Dai,Yitai Lin,Chenglu Wen,Siqi Shen,Lan Xu,Jingyi Yu,Yuexin Ma,Cheng Wang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Renzo J. Scholman,Anton Bouter,Leah R. M. Dickhoff,Tanja Alderliesten,Peter A. N. Bosman
title: Obtaining Smoothly Navigable Approximation Sets in Bi-Objective Multi-Modal Optimization
title_zh: 双目标多模态优化中获得平滑可导航的近似集
abstract: Even if a Multi-modal Multi-Objective Evolutionary Algorithm (MMOEA) is designed to find solutions well spread over all locally optimal approximation sets of a Multi-modal Multi-objective Optimization Problem (MMOP), there is a risk that the found set of solutions is not smoothly navigable because the solutions belong to various niches, reducing the insight for decision makers. To tackle this issue, a new MMOEAs is proposed: the Multi-Modal Bézier Evolutionary Algorithm (MM-BezEA), which produces approximation sets that cover individual niches and exhibit inherent decision-space smoothness as they are parameterized by Bézier curves. MM-BezEA combines the concepts behind the recently introduced BezEA and MO-HillVallEA to find all locally optimal approximation sets. When benchmarked against the MMOEAs MO_Ring_PSO_SCD and MO-HillVallEA on MMOPs with linear Pareto sets, MM-BezEA was found to perform best in terms of best hypervolume.
summary: Even if a Multi-modal Multi-Objective Evolutionary Algorithm (MMOEA) is designed to find solutions well spread over all locally optimal approximation sets of a Multi-modal Multi-objective Optimization Problem (MMOP), there is a risk that the found set of solutions is not smoothly navigable because the solutions belong to various niches, reducing the insight for decision makers. To tackle this issue, a new MMOEAs is proposed: the Multi-Modal Bézier Evolutionary Algorithm (MM-BezEA), which produces approximation sets that cover individual niches and exhibit inherent decision-space smoothness as they are parameterized by Bézier curves. MM-BezEA combines the concepts behind the recently introduced BezEA and MO-HillVallEA to find all locally optimal approximation sets. When benchmarked against the MMOEAs MO_Ring_PSO_SCD and MO-HillVallEA on MMOPs with linear Pareto sets, MM-BezEA was found to perform best in terms of best hypervolume.
abstract_zh: 即使多模态多目标进化算法（MMOEA）旨在找到很好地分布在多模态多目标优化问题（MMOP）的所有局部最优近似集中的解决方案，也存在找到的解决方案集无法顺利导航的风险，因为这些解决方案属于不同的领域，从而降低了决策者的洞察力。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种新的 MMOEA：多模态贝塞尔进化算法（MM-BezEA），它产生覆盖各个利基的近似集，并在由贝塞尔曲线参数化时表现出固有的决策空间平滑性。 MM-BezEA 结合了最近推出的 BezEA 和 MO-HillVallEA 背后的概念来查找所有局部最优近似集。当在具有线性 Pareto 集的 MMOP 上针对 MMOEA MO_Ring_PSO_SCD 和 MO-HillVallEA 进行基准测试时，发现 MM-BezEA 在最佳超体积方面表现最佳。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的多模态多目标进化算法MM-BezEA，通过贝塞尔曲线参数化生成具有决策空间平滑性的近似解集。
AI.motivation: 现有算法找到的近似解集可能因分布在不同niche而缺乏平滑性，降低决策者对解集的洞察力。
AI.method: 结合BezEA与MO-HillVallEA算法，利用贝塞尔曲线参数化特性实现解集的决策空间平滑性。
AI.result: 在基准测试中MM-BezEA的超体积指标优于MO_Ring_PSO_SCD和MO-HillVallEA算法。
AI.conclusion: MM-BezEA能有效生成覆盖局部最优且具有决策空间平滑性的近似解集，提升多模态多目标优化效果。

authors_text: Cong Huang,Jiahao Li,Bin Li,Dong Liu,Yan Lu
title: Neural Compression-Based Feature Learning for Video Restoration
title_zh: 用于视频恢复的基于神经压缩的特征学习
abstract: How to efficiently utilize the temporal features is crucial, yet challenging, for video restoration. The temporal features usually contain various noisy and uncorrelated information, and they may interfere with the restoration of the current frame. This paper proposes learning noise-robust feature representations to help video restoration. We are inspired by that the neural codec is a natural denoiser. In neural codec, the noisy and uncorrelated contents which are hard to predict but cost lots of bits are more inclined to be discarded for bitrate saving. Therefore, we design a neural compression module to filter the noise and keep the most useful information in features for video restoration. To achieve robustness to noise, our compression module adopts a spatial channel-wise quantization mechanism to adaptively determine the quantization step size for each position in the latent. Experiments show that our method can significantly boost the performance on video denoising, where we obtain 0.13 dB improvement over BasicVSR++ with only 0.23x FLOPs. Meanwhile, our method also obtains SOTA results on video deraining and dehazing.
summary: How to efficiently utilize the temporal features is crucial, yet challenging, for video restoration. The temporal features usually contain various noisy and uncorrelated information, and they may interfere with the restoration of the current frame. This paper proposes learning noise-robust feature representations to help video restoration. We are inspired by that the neural codec is a natural denoiser. In neural codec, the noisy and uncorrelated contents which are hard to predict but cost lots of bits are more inclined to be discarded for bitrate saving. Therefore, we design a neural compression module to filter the noise and keep the most useful information in features for video restoration. To achieve robustness to noise, our compression module adopts a spatial channel-wise quantization mechanism to adaptively determine the quantization step size for each position in the latent. Experiments show that our method can significantly boost the performance on video denoising, where we obtain 0.13 dB improvement over BasicVSR++ with only 0.23x FLOPs. Meanwhile, our method also obtains SOTA results on video deraining and dehazing.
abstract_zh: 如何有效地利用时间特征对于视频恢复至关重要，但也具有挑战性。时间特征通常包含各种噪声和不相关的信息，它们可能会干扰当前帧的恢复。本文提出学习抗噪声特征表示来帮助视频恢复。我们的灵感来自于神经编解码器是一种自然的降噪器。在神经编解码器中，难以预测但耗费大量比特的噪声和不相关内容更倾向于被丢弃以节省比特率。因此，我们设计了一个神经压缩模块来过滤噪声并保留视频恢复特征中最有用的信息。为了实现对噪声的鲁棒性，我们的压缩模​​块采用空间通道量化机制来自适应地确定潜在位置中每个位置的量化步长。实验表明，我们的方法可以显着提高视频去噪的性能，与 BasicVSR++ 相比，我们仅以 0.23 倍的 FLOPs 就获得了 0.13 dB 的改进。同时，我们的方法在视频去雨和去雾方面也获得了 SOTA 结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于神经压缩的特征学习方法，用于提升视频修复任务中对噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 视频修复中时间特征常包含噪声和不相关信息，影响当前帧的修复效果。神经编解码器能通过丢弃难以预测的内容实现降噪，启发了本文设计压缩模块过滤噪声。
AI.method: 设计神经压缩模块，采用空间通道量化机制自适应调整潜空间量化步长，保留有用信息并过滤噪声。
AI.result: 在视频去噪任务中较BasicVSR++提升0.13dB且计算量减少0.23x，在去雨和去雾任务中达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 神经压缩特征学习有效提升了视频修复的鲁棒性与效率，验证了压缩机制在特征筛选中的潜力。

search_text: Neural Compression-Based Feature Learning for Video Restoration 用于视频恢复的基于神经压缩的特征学习 How to efficiently utilize the temporal features is crucial, yet challenging, for video restoration. The temporal features usually contain various noisy and uncorrelated information, and they may interfere with the restoration of the current frame. This paper proposes learning noise-robust feature representations to help video restoration. We are inspired by that the neural codec is a natural denoiser. In neural codec, the noisy and uncorrelated contents which are hard to predict but cost lots of bits are more inclined to be discarded for bitrate saving. Therefore, we design a neural compression module to filter the noise and keep the most useful information in features for video restoration. To achieve robustness to noise, our compression module adopts a spatial channel-wise quantization mechanism to adaptively determine the quantization step size for each position in the latent. Experiments show that our method can significantly boost the performance on video denoising, where we obtain 0.13 dB improvement over BasicVSR++ with only 0.23x FLOPs. Meanwhile, our method also obtains SOTA results on video deraining and dehazing. 如何有效地利用时间特征对于视频恢复至关重要，但也具有挑战性。时间特征通常包含各种噪声和不相关的信息，它们可能会干扰当前帧的恢复。本文提出学习抗噪声特征表示来帮助视频恢复。我们的灵感来自于神经编解码器是一种自然的降噪器。在神经编解码器中，难以预测但耗费大量比特的噪声和不相关内容更倾向于被丢弃以节省比特率。因此，我们设计了一个神经压缩模块来过滤噪声并保留视频恢复特征中最有用的信息。为了实现对噪声的鲁棒性，我们的压缩模​​块采用空间通道量化机制来自适应地确定潜在位置中每个位置的量化步长。实验表明，我们的方法可以显着提高视频去噪的性能，与 BasicVSR++ 相比，我们仅以 0.23 倍的 FLOPs 就获得了 0.13 dB 的改进。同时，我们的方法在视频去雨和去雾方面也获得了 SOTA 结果。 本文提出基于神经压缩的特征学习方法，用于提升视频修复任务中对噪声的鲁棒性。 Cong Huang,Jiahao Li,Bin Li,Dong Liu,Yan Lu cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Fuxin Fan,Ludwig Ritschl,Marcel Beister,Ramyar Biniazan,Björn Kreher,Tristan M. Gottschalk,Steffen Kappler,Andreas Maier
title: Simulation-Driven Training of Vision Transformers Enabling Metal Segmentation in X-Ray Images
title_zh: 视觉变压器的仿真驱动训练可实现 X 射线图像中的金属分割
abstract: In several image acquisition and processing steps of X-ray radiography, knowledge of the existence of metal implants and their exact position is highly beneficial (e.g. dose regulation, image contrast adjustment). Another application which would benefit from an accurate metal segmentation is cone beam computed tomography (CBCT) which is based on 2D X-ray projections. Due to the high attenuation of metals, severe artifacts occur in the 3D X-ray acquisitions. The metal segmentation in CBCT projections usually serves as a prerequisite for metal artifact avoidance and reduction algorithms. Since the generation of high quality clinical training is a constant challenge, this study proposes to generate simulated X-ray images based on CT data sets combined with self-designed computer aided design (CAD) implants and make use of convolutional neural network (CNN) and vision transformer (ViT) for metal segmentation. Model test is performed on accurately labeled X-ray test datasets obtained from specimen scans. The CNN encoder-based network like U-Net has limited performance on cadaver test data with an average dice score below 0.30, while the metal segmentation transformer with dual decoder (MST-DD) shows high robustness and generalization on the segmentation task, with an average dice score of 0.90. Our study indicates that the CAD model-based data generation has high flexibility and could be a way to overcome the problem of shortage in clinical data sampling and labelling. Furthermore, the MST-DD approach generates a more reliable neural network in case of training on simulated data.

Another application which would benefit from an accurate metal segmentation is cone beam computed tomography (CBCT) which is based on 2D X-ray projections. Due to the high attenuation of metals, severe artifacts occur in the 3D X-ray acquisitions. Since the generation of high quality clinical training is a constant challenge, this study proposes to generate simulated X-ray images based on CT data sets combined with self-designed computer aided design (CAD) implants and make use of convolutional neural network (CNN) and vision transformer (ViT) for metal segmentation. Model test is performed on accurately labeled X-ray test datasets obtained from specimen scans. The CNN encoder-based network like U-Net has limited performance on cadaver test data with an average dice score below 0.30, while the metal segmentation transformer with dual decoder (MST-DD) shows high robustness and generalization on the segmentation task, with an average dice score of 0.90. Our study indicates that the CAD model-based data generation has high flexibility and could be a way to overcome the problem of shortage in clinical data sampling and labelling. Furthermore, the MST-DD approach generates a more reliable neural network in case of training on simulated data.
abstract_zh: 在 X 射线照相的多个图像采集和处理步骤中，了解金属植入物的存在及其确切位置非常有益（例如剂量调节、图像对比度调整）。另一种受益于精确金属分割的应用是基于 2D X 射线投影的锥形束计算机断层扫描 (CBCT)。由于金属的高衰减，3D X 射线采集中会出现严重的伪影。 CBCT 投影中的金属分割通常是金属伪影避免和减少算法的先决条件。由于生成高质量的临床训练是一个持续的挑战，本研究提出基于CT数据集结合自行设计的计算机辅助设计（CAD）植入物生成模拟X射线图像，并利用卷积神经网络（CNN）和视觉变换器（ViT）进行金属分割。模型测试是在从标本扫描获得的准确标记的 X 射线测试数据集上进行的。基于 CNN 编码器的网络（如 U-Net）在尸体测试数据上的性能有限，平均 dice 得分低于 0.30，而具有双解码器的金属分割变压器（MST-DD）在分割任务上显示出较高的鲁棒性和泛化性，平均 dice 得分为 0.90。我们的研究表明，基于 CAD 模型的数据生成具有很高的灵活性，可以成为克服临床数据采样和标签短缺问题的一种方法。此外，在对模拟数据进行训练时，MST-DD 方法会生成更可靠的神经网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于模拟数据训练视觉Transformer模型，用于X光图像中的金属分割，以解决临床数据不足和标注困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 金属分割在X射线成像中对剂量调节和图像质量提升至关重要，但临床数据获取困难且标注成本高，需寻找替代方案。
AI.method: 利用CT数据集与自设计CAD植入物生成模拟X光图像，结合CNN（如U-Net）和视觉Transformer（ViT）进行金属分割，提出双解码器Transformer模型（MST-DD）。
AI.result: MST-DD在尸检测试数据集上达到平均Dice分数0.90，显著优于U-Net的0.30以下表现，验证了模拟数据训练的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于CAD模型的数据生成结合MST-DD方法，能有效克服临床数据不足问题，并提供更可靠的金属分割解决方案。

authors_text: Tamara T. Mueller,Dmitrii Usynin,Johannes C. Paetzold,Daniel Rueckert,Georgios Kaissis
title: SoK: Differential Privacy on Graph-Structured Data
title_zh: SoK：图结构数据的差异隐私
abstract: In this work, we study the applications of differential privacy (DP) in the context of graph-structured data. We discuss the formulations of DP applicable to the publication of graphs and their associated statistics as well as machine learning on graph-based data, including graph neural networks (GNNs). The formulation of DP in the context of graph-structured data is difficult, as individual data points are interconnected (often non-linearly or sparsely). This connectivity complicates the computation of individual privacy loss in differentially private learning. The problem is exacerbated by an absence of a single, well-established formulation of DP in graph settings. This issue extends to the domain of GNNs, rendering private machine learning on graph-structured data a challenging task. A lack of prior systematisation work motivated us to study graph-based learning from a privacy perspective. In this work, we systematise different formulations of DP on graphs, discuss challenges and promising applications, including the GNN domain. We compare and separate works into graph analysis tasks and graph learning tasks with GNNs. Finally, we conclude our work with a discussion of open questions and potential directions for further research in this area.
summary: In this work, we study the applications of differential privacy (DP) in the context of graph-structured data. We discuss the formulations of DP applicable to the publication of graphs and their associated statistics as well as machine learning on graph-based data, including graph neural networks (GNNs). The formulation of DP in the context of graph-structured data is difficult, as individual data points are interconnected (often non-linearly or sparsely). This connectivity complicates the computation of individual privacy loss in differentially private learning. The problem is exacerbated by an absence of a single, well-established formulation of DP in graph settings. This issue extends to the domain of GNNs, rendering private machine learning on graph-structured data a challenging task. A lack of prior systematisation work motivated us to study graph-based learning from a privacy perspective. In this work, we systematise different formulations of DP on graphs, discuss challenges and promising applications, including the GNN domain. We compare and separate works into graph analysis tasks and graph learning tasks with GNNs. Finally, we conclude our work with a discussion of open questions and potential directions for further research in this area.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了差异隐私（DP）在图结构数据背景下的应用。我们讨论了适用于图的发布及其相关统计数据的 DP 公式，以及基于图的数据的机器学习，包括图神经网络（GNN）。在图结构数据的背景下制定DP很困难，因为各个数据点是互连的（通常是非线性或稀疏的）。这种连通性使差分隐私学习中个人隐私损失的计算变得复杂。由于图形设置中缺乏单一的、完善的 DP 公式，该问题变得更加严重。这个问题延伸到了 GNN 领域，使得图结构数据上的私有机器学习成为一项具有挑战性的任务。之前缺乏系统化工作促使我们从隐私角度研究基于图的学​​习。在这项工作中，我们系统化了图上 DP 的不同表述，讨论了挑战和有前景的应用，包括 GNN 领域。我们将工作与 GNN 进行比较并分为图分析任务和图学习任务。最后，我们通过讨论该领域的悬而未决的问题和进一步研究的潜在方向来结束我们的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了图结构数据上的差分隐私（DP）方法，探讨其在图发布、统计分析及图神经网络（GNN）等场景下的应用与挑战。
AI.motivation: 图数据中节点的复杂关联性使得隐私损失计算困难，且缺乏统一的DP框架，导致图结构数据的隐私保护研究分散且不系统。
AI.method: 通过梳理现有DP在图领域的不同形式，将其分为图分析任务与图学习任务（如GNN），分析技术挑战与应用潜力，并比较不同方法的适用性。
AI.result: 总结了图结构数据隐私保护的主要技术路线，明确了当前研究空白，特别是在GNN场景下的隐私学习问题。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步探索适应图结构特性的DP理论框架，并推动其在GNN等领域的实际应用，以解决隐私与效用的平衡难题。

result: 总结了图结构数据隐私保护的主要技术路线，明确了当前研究空白，特别是在GNN场景下的隐私学习问题。
conclusion: 需进一步探索适应图结构特性的DP理论框架，并推动其在GNN等领域的实际应用，以解决隐私与效用的平衡难题。
search_text: SoK: Differential Privacy on Graph-Structured Data SoK：图结构数据的差异隐私 In this work, we study the applications of differential privacy (DP) in the context of graph-structured data. We discuss the formulations of DP applicable to the publication of graphs and their associated statistics as well as machine learning on graph-based data, including graph neural networks (GNNs). The formulation of DP in the context of graph-structured data is difficult, as individual data points are interconnected (often non-linearly or sparsely). This connectivity complicates the computation of individual privacy loss in differentially private learning. The problem is exacerbated by an absence of a single, well-established formulation of DP in graph settings. This issue extends to the domain of GNNs, rendering private machine learning on graph-structured data a challenging task. A lack of prior systematisation work motivated us to study graph-based learning from a privacy perspective. In this work, we systematise different formulations of DP on graphs, discuss challenges and promising applications, including the GNN domain. We compare and separate works into graph analysis tasks and graph learning tasks with GNNs. Finally, we conclude our work with a discussion of open questions and potential directions for further research in this area. 在这项工作中，我们研究了差异隐私（DP）在图结构数据背景下的应用。我们讨论了适用于图的发布及其相关统计数据的 DP 公式，以及基于图的数据的机器学习，包括图神经网络（GNN）。在图结构数据的背景下制定DP很困难，因为各个数据点是互连的（通常是非线性或稀疏的）。这种连通性使差分隐私学习中个人隐私损失的计算变得复杂。由于图形设置中缺乏单一的、完善的 DP 公式，该问题变得更加严重。这个问题延伸到了 GNN 领域，使得图结构数据上的私有机器学习成为一项具有挑战性的任务。之前缺乏系统化工作促使我们从隐私角度研究基于图的学​​习。在这项工作中，我们系统化了图上 DP 的不同表述，讨论了挑战和有前景的应用，包括 GNN 领域。我们将工作与 GNN 进行比较并分为图分析任务和图学习任务。最后，我们通过讨论该领域的悬而未决的问题和进一步研究的潜在方向来结束我们的工作。 本文系统研究了图结构数据上的差分隐私（DP）方法，探讨其在图发布、统计分析及图神经网络（GNN）等场景下的应用与挑战。 Tamara T. Mueller,Dmitrii Usynin,Johannes C. Paetzold,Daniel Rueckert,Georgios Kaissis cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Simon Grosche,Jürgen Seiler,André Kaup
title: Novel Consistency Check For Fast Recursive Reconstruction Of Non-Regularly Sampled Video Data
title_zh: 用于非定期采样视频数据快速递归重建的新颖一致性检查
comment: 5 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables, IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP)
comments: 5 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables, IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP)
abstract: Quarter sampling is a novel sensor design that allows for an acquisition of higher resolution images without increasing the number of pixels. When being used for video data, one out of four pixels is measured in each frame. Effectively, this leads to a non-regular spatio-temporal sub-sampling. Compared to purely spatial or temporal sub-sampling, this allows for an increased reconstruction quality, as aliasing artifacts can be reduced. For the fast reconstruction of such sensor data with a fixed mask, recursive variant of frequency selective reconstruction (FSR) was proposed. Here, pixels measured in previous frames are projected into the current frame to support its reconstruction. In doing so, the motion between the frames is computed using template matching. Since some of the motion vectors may be erroneous, it is important to perform a proper consistency checking. In this paper, we propose faster consistency checking methods as well as a novel recursive FSR that uses the projected pixels different than in literature and can handle dynamic masks. Altogether, we are able to significantly increase the reconstruction quality by + 1.01 dB compared to the state-of-the-art recursive reconstruction method using a fixed mask. Compared to a single frame reconstruction, an average gain of about + 1.52 dB is achieved for dynamic masks. At the same time, the computational complexity of the consistency checks is reduced by a factor of 13 compared to the literature algorithm.
summary: Quarter sampling is a novel sensor design that allows for an acquisition of higher resolution images without increasing the number of pixels. When being used for video data, one out of four pixels is measured in each frame. Effectively, this leads to a non-regular spatio-temporal sub-sampling. Compared to purely spatial or temporal sub-sampling, this allows for an increased reconstruction quality, as aliasing artifacts can be reduced. For the fast reconstruction of such sensor data with a fixed mask, recursive variant of frequency selective reconstruction (FSR) was proposed. Here, pixels measured in previous frames are projected into the current frame to support its reconstruction. In doing so, the motion between the frames is computed using template matching. Since some of the motion vectors may be erroneous, it is important to perform a proper consistency checking. In this paper, we propose faster consistency checking methods as well as a novel recursive FSR that uses the projected pixels different than in literature and can handle dynamic masks. Altogether, we are able to significantly increase the reconstruction quality by + 1.01 dB compared to the state-of-the-art recursive reconstruction method using a fixed mask. Compared to a single frame reconstruction, an average gain of about + 1.52 dB is achieved for dynamic masks. At the same time, the computational complexity of the consistency checks is reduced by a factor of 13 compared to the literature algorithm.
abstract_zh: 四分之一采样是一种新颖的传感器设计，可以在不增加像素数量的情况下获取更高分辨率的图像。当用于视频数据时，每帧测量四个像素中的一个。实际上，这导致了非规则的时空子采样。与纯粹的空间或时间子采样相比，这可以提高重建质量，因为可以减少混叠伪影。为了使用固定掩模快速重建此类传感器数据，提出了频率选择性重建（FSR）的递归变体。在这里，在先前帧中测量的像素被投影到当前帧中以支持其重建。在此过程中，使用模板匹配来计算帧之间的运动。由于某些运动矢量可能是错误的，因此执行适当的一致性检查很重要。在本文中，我们提出了更快的一致性检查方法以及一种新颖的递归 FSR，它使用与文献中不同的投影像素，并且可以处理动态掩模。总而言之，与使用固定掩模的最先进的递归重建方法相比，我们能够将重建质量显着提高 + 1.01 dB。与单帧重建相比，动态掩模的平均增益约为+1.52 dB。同时，与文献算法相比，一致性检查的计算复杂度降低了13倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型一致性检查方法和递归频率选择性重建（FSR）算法，用于快速重建非规则采样的视频数据。
AI.motivation: 现有递归FSR方法在运动矢量计算中存在错误且一致性检查计算复杂度高，影响重建质量与效率。
AI.method: 设计更高效的一致性检查机制，并改进递归FSR算法以支持动态掩膜，通过跨帧像素投影优化重建过程。
AI.result: 相比固定掩膜的最先进方法，重建质量提升1.01 dB；动态掩膜下较单帧重建平均提升1.52 dB，计算复杂度降低13倍。
AI.conclusion: 新方法在保证重建质量的同时显著降低计算成本，适用于非规则采样视频的高效重建场景。

authors_text: Jie Liang,Hui Zeng,Lei Zhang
title: Details or Artifacts: A Locally Discriminative Learning Approach to Realistic Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 细节或伪影：一种实现逼真图像超分辨率的局部判别学习方法
abstract: Single image super-resolution (SISR) with generative adversarial networks (GAN) has recently attracted increasing attention due to its potentials to generate rich details. However, the training of GAN is unstable, and it often introduces many perceptually unpleasant artifacts along with the generated details. In this paper, we demonstrate that it is possible to train a GAN-based SISR model which can stably generate perceptually realistic details while inhibiting visual artifacts. Based on the observation that the local statistics (e.g., residual variance) of artifact areas are often different from the areas of perceptually friendly details, we develop a framework to discriminate between GAN-generated artifacts and realistic details, and consequently generate an artifact map to regularize and stabilize the model training process. Our proposed locally discriminative learning (LDL) method is simple yet effective, which can be easily plugged in off-the-shelf SISR methods and boost their performance. Experiments demonstrate that LDL outperforms the state-of-the-art GAN based SISR methods, achieving not only higher reconstruction accuracy but also superior perceptual quality on both synthetic and real-world datasets. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/csjliang/LDL.
summary: Single image super-resolution (SISR) with generative adversarial networks (GAN) has recently attracted increasing attention due to its potentials to generate rich details. However, the training of GAN is unstable, and it often introduces many perceptually unpleasant artifacts along with the generated details. In this paper, we demonstrate that it is possible to train a GAN-based SISR model which can stably generate perceptually realistic details while inhibiting visual artifacts. Based on the observation that the local statistics (e.g., residual variance) of artifact areas are often different from the areas of perceptually friendly details, we develop a framework to discriminate between GAN-generated artifacts and realistic details, and consequently generate an artifact map to regularize and stabilize the model training process. Our proposed locally discriminative learning (LDL) method is simple yet effective, which can be easily plugged in off-the-shelf SISR methods and boost their performance. Experiments demonstrate that LDL outperforms the state-of-the-art GAN based SISR methods, achieving not only higher reconstruction accuracy but also superior perceptual quality on both synthetic and real-world datasets. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/csjliang/LDL.
abstract_zh: 具有生成对抗网络（GAN）的单图像超分辨率（SISR）由于其生成丰富细节的潜力而最近引起了越来越多的关注。然而，GAN 的训练是不稳定的，它经常会在生成细节的同时引入许多感知上令人不快的伪像。在本文中，我们证明了训练基于 GAN 的 SISR 模型是可能的，该模型可以稳定地生成感知逼真的细节，同时抑制视觉伪影。基于对伪像区域的局部统计数据（例如残差方差）通常与感知友好细节区域不同的观察，我们开发了一个框架来区分 GAN 生成的伪像和现实细节，从而生成伪像图来规范和稳定模型训练过程。我们提出的局部判别学习（LDL）方法简单而有效，可以轻松插入现成的 SISR 方法并提高其性能。实验表明，LDL 优于最先进的基于 GAN 的 SISR 方法，不仅实现了更高的重建精度，而且在合成数据集和真实数据集上都实现了卓越的感知质量。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/csjliang/LDL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种局部判别学习方法（LDL），解决基于GAN的图像超分辨率模型在生成细节时易产生视觉伪影的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN在图像超分辨率任务中虽能生成细节，但训练不稳定且常引入不自然的伪影，影响感知质量。
AI.method: 通过分析伪影区域与真实细节的局部统计差异（如残差方差），构建判别框架生成伪影图，用于正则化训练过程。
AI.result: 实验表明LDL在合成与真实数据集上均优于现有SOTA方法，显著提升重建精度与感知质量，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: LDL方法简单有效，可无缝集成到主流SISR模型中，为稳定生成高质量超分图像提供新思路。

authors_text: Arshia Arya,Soham De,Dibyendu Mishra,Gazal Shekhawat,Ankur Sharma,Anmol Panda,Faisal Lalani,Parantak Singh,Ramaravind Kommiya Mothilal,Rynaa Grover,Sachita Nishal,Saloni Dash,Shehla Shora,Syeda Zainab Akbar,Joyojeet Pal
title: Database of Indian Social Media Influencers on Twitter
title_zh: Twitter 上的印度社交媒体影响者数据库
abstract: Databases of highly networked individuals have been indispensable in studying narratives and influence on social media. To support studies on Twitter in India, we present a systematically categorised database of accounts of influence on Twitter in India, identified and annotated through an iterative process of friends, networks, and self-described profile information, verified manually. We built an initial set of accounts based on the friend network of a seed set of accounts based on real-world renown in various fields, and then snowballed "friends of friends" multiple times, and rank ordered individuals based on the number of in-group connections, and overall followers. We then manually classified identified accounts under the categories of entertainment, sports, business, government, institutions, journalism, civil society accounts that have independent standing outside of social media, as well as a category of "digital first" referring to accounts that derive their primary influence from online activity. Overall, we annotated 11580 unique accounts across all categories. The database is useful studying various questions related to the role of influencers in polarisation, misinformation, extreme speech, political discourse etc.
summary: Databases of highly networked individuals have been indispensable in studying narratives and influence on social media. To support studies on Twitter in India, we present a systematically categorised database of accounts of influence on Twitter in India, identified and annotated through an iterative process of friends, networks, and self-described profile information, verified manually. We built an initial set of accounts based on the friend network of a seed set of accounts based on real-world renown in various fields, and then snowballed "friends of friends" multiple times, and rank ordered individuals based on the number of in-group connections, and overall followers. We then manually classified identified accounts under the categories of entertainment, sports, business, government, institutions, journalism, civil society accounts that have independent standing outside of social media, as well as a category of "digital first" referring to accounts that derive their primary influence from online activity. Overall, we annotated 11580 unique accounts across all categories. The database is useful studying various questions related to the role of influencers in polarisation, misinformation, extreme speech, political discourse etc.
abstract_zh: 高度网络化个人的数据库对于研究社交媒体的叙事和影响是不可或缺的。为了支持印度 Twitter 的研究，我们提出了一个系统分类的印度 Twitter 影响力帐户数据库，通过好友、网络和自我描述的个人资料信息的迭代过程进行识别和注释，并手动验证。我们根据种子账户的朋友网络建立了初始账户，种子账户的朋友网络基于现实世界中各个领域的知名度，然后多次“朋友的朋友”滚雪球，并根据组内连接数和总体关注者数量对个人进行排名。然后，我们将识别出的帐户手动分类为在社交媒体之外具有独立地位的娱乐、体育、商业、政府、机构、新闻、民间社会帐户类别，以及“数字优先”类别，即主要影响力来自在线活动的帐户。总体而言，我们对所有类别的 11580 个独特帐户进行了注释。该数据库有助于研究与影响者在两极分化、错误信息、极端言论、政治话语等中的作用相关的各种问题。

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个系统分类的印度推特社交网络意见领袖数据库，用于支持相关社会科学研究。
AI.motivation: 为研究印度推特平台上的叙事传播与影响力提供结构化数据支持，填补该领域系统性数据库的空白。
AI.method: 基于现实领域知名账号的种子集，通过好友网络扩展（雪球抽样）、连接数排序和人工分类，建立多维度标注体系。
AI.result: 最终标注获得11580个独立账号，涵盖娱乐、政务、媒体等八大类别，并区分出以线上活动为主导的'Digital First'群体。
AI.conclusion: 该数据库为研究印度网络极化、虚假信息传播及政治话语等议题提供了可靠的实证分析基础。

To support studies on Twitter in India, we present a systematically categorised database of accounts of influence on Twitter in India, identified and annotated through an iterative process of friends, networks, and self-described profile information, verified manually. We then manually classified identified accounts under the categories of entertainment, sports, business, government, institutions, journalism, civil society accounts that have independent standing outside of social media, as well as a category of "digital first" referring to accounts that derive their primary influence from online activity. Overall, we annotated 11580 unique accounts across all categories. authors_text: Md Rashad Al Hasan Rony,Liubov Kovriguina,Debanjan Chaudhuri,Ricardo Usbeck,Jens Lehmann
title: RoMe: A Robust Metric for Evaluating Natural Language Generation
title_zh: RoMe：评估自然语言生成的稳健指标
comment: Accepted by the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL) 2022
comments: Accepted by the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL) 2022
abstract: Evaluating Natural Language Generation (NLG) systems is a challenging task. Firstly, the metric should ensure that the generated hypothesis reflects the reference's semantics. Secondly, it should consider the grammatical quality of the generated sentence. Thirdly, it should be robust enough to handle various surface forms of the generated sentence. Thus, an effective evaluation metric has to be multifaceted. In this paper, we propose an automatic evaluation metric incorporating several core aspects of natural language understanding (language competence, syntactic and semantic variation). Our proposed metric, RoMe, is trained on language features such as semantic similarity combined with tree edit distance and grammatical acceptability, using a self-supervised neural network to assess the overall quality of the generated sentence. Moreover, we perform an extensive robustness analysis of the state-of-the-art methods and RoMe. Empirical results suggest that RoMe has a stronger correlation to human judgment over state-of-the-art metrics in evaluating system-generated sentences across several NLG tasks.
summary: Evaluating Natural Language Generation (NLG) systems is a challenging task. Firstly, the metric should ensure that the generated hypothesis reflects the reference's semantics. Secondly, it should consider the grammatical quality of the generated sentence. Thirdly, it should be robust enough to handle various surface forms of the generated sentence. Thus, an effective evaluation metric has to be multifaceted. In this paper, we propose an automatic evaluation metric incorporating several core aspects of natural language understanding (language competence, syntactic and semantic variation). Our proposed metric, RoMe, is trained on language features such as semantic similarity combined with tree edit distance and grammatical acceptability, using a self-supervised neural network to assess the overall quality of the generated sentence. Moreover, we perform an extensive robustness analysis of the state-of-the-art methods and RoMe. Empirical results suggest that RoMe has a stronger correlation to human judgment over state-of-the-art metrics in evaluating system-generated sentences across several NLG tasks.
abstract_zh: 评估自然语言生成（NLG）系统是一项具有挑战性的任务。首先，度量应该确保生成的假设反映参考文献的语义。其次，应该考虑生成句子的语法质量。第三，它应该足够强大，能够处理生成的句子的各种表面形式。因此，有效的评价指标必须是多方面的。在本文中，我们提出了一种自动评估指标，结合了自然语言理解的几个核心方面（语言能力、句法和语义变化）。我们提出的指标 RoMe 是根据语言特征进行训练的，例如语义相似性与树编辑距离和语法可接受性相结合，使用自监督神经网络来评估生成句子的整体质量。此外，我们对最先进的方法和 RoMe 进行了广泛的稳健性分析。实证结果表明，在评估多个 NLG 任务中系统生成的句子时，RoMe 与人类判断相比最先进的指标具有更强的相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为RoMe的鲁棒评估指标，用于综合评估自然语言生成系统的语义、语法及表面形式多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有NLG评估指标难以同时满足语义准确性、语法质量及对表面形式变化的鲁棒性要求，需设计多维度的评估方法。
AI.method: 结合语义相似度、树编辑距离和语法可接受性特征，通过自监督神经网络训练模型，并进行对比实验验证鲁棒性。
AI.result: RoMe在多个NLG任务中与人类评估的相关性显著高于现有指标，展现出更强的综合评估能力。
AI.conclusion: RoMe通过融合语言理解核心要素，为自然语言生成系统提供了更全面、鲁棒的自动评估解决方案。

authors_text: Dennis Müller,Michael März,Stephan Scheele,Ute Schmid
title: An Interactive Explanatory AI System for Industrial Quality Control
title_zh: 用于工业质量控制的交互式解释性人工智能系统
abstract: Machine learning based image classification algorithms, such as deep neural network approaches, will be increasingly employed in critical settings such as quality control in industry, where transparency and comprehensibility of decisions are crucial. Therefore, we aim to extend the defect detection task towards an interactive human-in-the-loop approach that allows us to integrate rich background knowledge and the inference of complex relationships going beyond traditional purely data-driven approaches. We propose an approach for an interactive support system for classifications in an industrial quality control setting that combines the advantages of both (explainable) knowledge-driven and data-driven machine learning methods, in particular inductive logic programming and convolutional neural networks, with human expertise and control. The resulting system can assist domain experts with decisions, provide transparent explanations for results, and integrate feedback from users; thus reducing workload for humans while both respecting their expertise and without removing their agency or accountability.
summary: Machine learning based image classification algorithms, such as deep neural network approaches, will be increasingly employed in critical settings such as quality control in industry, where transparency and comprehensibility of decisions are crucial. Therefore, we aim to extend the defect detection task towards an interactive human-in-the-loop approach that allows us to integrate rich background knowledge and the inference of complex relationships going beyond traditional purely data-driven approaches. We propose an approach for an interactive support system for classifications in an industrial quality control setting that combines the advantages of both (explainable) knowledge-driven and data-driven machine learning methods, in particular inductive logic programming and convolutional neural networks, with human expertise and control. The resulting system can assist domain experts with decisions, provide transparent explanations for results, and integrate feedback from users; thus reducing workload for humans while both respecting their expertise and without removing their agency or accountability.
abstract_zh: 基于机器学习的图像分类算法（例如深度神经网络方法）将越来越多地应用于关键环境，例如工业质量控制，其中决策的透明度和可理解性至关重要。因此，我们的目标是将缺陷检测任务扩展到交互式人机交互方法，使我们能够整合丰富的背景知识和复杂关系的推理，超越传统的纯数据驱动方法。我们提出了一种用于工业质量控制环境中分类的交互式支持系统的方法，该方法结合了（可解释的）知识驱动和数据驱动的机器学习方法的优点，特别是归纳逻辑编程和卷积神经网络，以及人类的专业知识和控制。由此产生的系统可以协助领域专家做出决策，为结果提供透明的解释，并整合用户的反馈；从而减少人类的工作量，同时尊重他们的专业知识，并且不消除他们的代理权或责任。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合可解释知识驱动方法与数据驱动机器学习的工业质量控制交互式AI系统，整合人类专业知识与反馈以提升决策透明度。
AI.motivation: 传统数据驱动方法在工业质量控制中缺乏透明度，而人类专家的知识与复杂关系推断对关键场景至关重要，需开发兼顾可解释性与数据驱动的交互系统。
AI.method: 融合归纳逻辑编程与卷积神经网络，构建人机协同框架，通过人类反馈动态调整模型，实现分类决策支持与结果解释。
AI.result: 系统有效辅助领域专家决策，提供透明解释并整合用户反馈，在降低工作负荷的同时保留人类专业判断权与责任归属。
AI.conclusion: 该混合方法通过结合知识驱动与数据驱动技术，结合人类专家参与，为工业质量控制提供了更透明、可解释且高效的AI解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合可解释知识驱动方法与数据驱动机器学习的工业质量控制交互式AI系统，整合人类专业知识与反馈以提升决策透明度。
ai_content.motivation: 传统数据驱动方法在工业质量控制中缺乏透明度，而人类专家的知识与复杂关系推断对关键场景至关重要，需开发兼顾可解释性与数据驱动的交互系统。

search_text: An Interactive Explanatory AI System for Industrial Quality Control 用于工业质量控制的交互式解释性人工智能系统 Machine learning based image classification algorithms, such as deep neural network approaches, will be increasingly employed in critical settings such as quality control in industry, where transparency and comprehensibility of decisions are crucial. Therefore, we aim to extend the defect detection task towards an interactive human-in-the-loop approach that allows us to integrate rich background knowledge and the inference of complex relationships going beyond traditional purely data-driven approaches. We propose an approach for an interactive support system for classifications in an industrial quality control setting that combines the advantages of both (explainable) knowledge-driven and data-driven machine learning methods, in particular inductive logic programming and convolutional neural networks, with human expertise and control. The resulting system can assist domain experts with decisions, provide transparent explanations for results, and integrate feedback from users; thus reducing workload for humans while both respecting their expertise and without removing their agency or accountability. 基于机器学习的图像分类算法（例如深度神经网络方法）将越来越多地应用于关键环境，例如工业质量控制，其中决策的透明度和可理解性至关重要。因此，我们的目标是将缺陷检测任务扩展到交互式人机交互方法，使我们能够整合丰富的背景知识和复杂关系的推理，超越传统的纯数据驱动方法。我们提出了一种用于工业质量控制环境中分类的交互式支持系统的方法，该方法结合了（可解释的）知识驱动和数据驱动的机器学习方法的优点，特别是归纳逻辑编程和卷积神经网络，以及人类的专业知识和控制。由此产生的系统可以协助领域专家做出决策，为结果提供透明的解释，并整合用户的反馈；从而减少人类的工作量，同时尊重他们的专业知识，并且不消除他们的代理权或责任。 本文提出了一种结合可解释知识驱动方法与数据驱动机器学习的工业质量控制交互式AI系统，整合人类专业知识与反馈以提升决策透明度。 Dennis Müller,Michael März,Stephan Scheele,Ute Schmid cs.LG,cs.CV,cs.HC

authors_text: Simon Grosche,Fabian Brand,André Kaup
title: A Novel End-To-End Network for Reconstruction of Non-Regularly Sampled Image Data Using Locally Fully Connected Layers
title_zh: 一种使用局部全连接层重建非规则采样图像数据的新型端到端网络
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables, IEEE 23rd International Workshop on Multimedia Signal Processing (MMSP). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.00336
comments: 6 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables, IEEE 23rd International Workshop on Multimedia Signal Processing (MMSP). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.00336
abstract: Quarter sampling and three-quarter sampling are novel sensor concepts that enable the acquisition of higher resolution images without increasing the number of pixels. This is achieved by non-regularly covering parts of each pixel of a low-resolution sensor such that only one quadrant or three quadrants of the sensor area of each pixel is sensitive to light. Combining a properly designed mask and a high-quality reconstruction algorithm, a higher image quality can be achieved than using a low-resolution sensor and subsequent upsampling. For the latter case, the image quality can be further enhanced using super resolution algorithms such as the very deep super resolution network (VDSR). In this paper, we propose a novel end-to-end neural network to reconstruct high resolution images from non-regularly sampled sensor data. The network is a concatenation of a locally fully connected reconstruction network (LFCR) and a standard VDSR network. Altogether, using a three-quarter sampling sensor with our novel neural network layout, the image quality in terms of PSNR for the Urban100 dataset can be increased by 2.96 dB compared to the state-of-the-art approach. Compared to a low-resolution sensor with VDSR, a gain of 1.11 dB is achieved.
summary: Quarter sampling and three-quarter sampling are novel sensor concepts that enable the acquisition of higher resolution images without increasing the number of pixels. This is achieved by non-regularly covering parts of each pixel of a low-resolution sensor such that only one quadrant or three quadrants of the sensor area of each pixel is sensitive to light. Combining a properly designed mask and a high-quality reconstruction algorithm, a higher image quality can be achieved than using a low-resolution sensor and subsequent upsampling. For the latter case, the image quality can be further enhanced using super resolution algorithms such as the very deep super resolution network (VDSR). In this paper, we propose a novel end-to-end neural network to reconstruct high resolution images from non-regularly sampled sensor data. The network is a concatenation of a locally fully connected reconstruction network (LFCR) and a standard VDSR network. Altogether, using a three-quarter sampling sensor with our novel neural network layout, the image quality in terms of PSNR for the Urban100 dataset can be increased by 2.96 dB compared to the state-of-the-art approach. Compared to a low-resolution sensor with VDSR, a gain of 1.11 dB is achieved.
abstract_zh: 四分之一采样和四分之三采样是新颖的传感器概念，可以在不增加像素数量的情况下获取更高分辨率的图像。这是通过不规则地覆盖低分辨率传感器的每个像素的部分来实现的，使得每个像素的传感器区域中只有一个象限或三个象限对光敏感。结合正确设计的掩模和高质量的重建算法，可以获得比使用低分辨率传感器和后续上采样更高的图像质量。对于后一种情况，可以使用超深度超分辨率网络（VDSR）等超分辨率算法进一步增强图像质量。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的端到端神经网络，用于从非定期采样的传感器数据重建高分辨率图像。该网络是本地全连接重建网络（LFCR）和标准 VDSR 网络的串联。总而言之，使用四分之三采样传感器和我们新颖的神经网络布局，与最先进的方法相比，Urban100 数据集的 PSNR 图像质量可以提高 2.96 dB。与具有 VDSR 的低分辨率传感器相比，可实现 1.11 dB 的增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型端到端神经网络，利用局部全连接层从非规则采样传感器数据中重建高分辨率图像。
AI.motivation: 传统低分辨率传感器结合超分辨率算法（如VDSR）在图像质量上存在局限，而新型非规则采样传感器（如四分之一或四分之三采样）尚未被有效利用。
AI.method: 设计由局部全连接重建网络（LFCR）和标准VDSR网络组成的端到端架构，结合非规则采样传感器数据进行训练。
AI.result: 在Urban100数据集上，使用四分之三采样传感器与所提网络相比现有方法PSNR提升2.96 dB，较低分辨率传感器+VDSR提升1.11 dB。
AI.conclusion: 所提网络有效利用非规则采样特性，在图像重建质量上显著优于现有方法，验证了设计的有效性。
