authors_text: Joachim Nyborg,Charlotte Pelletier,Ira Assent
title: Generalized Classification of Satellite Image Time Series with Thermal Positional Encoding
title_zh: 热位置编码卫星图像时间序列的广义分类
comment: In proceedings of the 2022 IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) Workshops
comments: In proceedings of the 2022 IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) Workshops
abstract: Large-scale crop type classification is a task at the core of remote sensing efforts with applications of both economic and ecological importance. Current state-of-the-art deep learning methods are based on self-attention and use satellite image time series (SITS) to discriminate crop types based on their unique growth patterns. However, existing methods generalize poorly to regions not seen during training mainly due to not being robust to temporal shifts of the growing season caused by variations in climate. To this end, we propose Thermal Positional Encoding (TPE) for attention-based crop classifiers. Unlike previous positional encoding based on calendar time (e.g. day-of-year), TPE is based on thermal time, which is obtained by accumulating daily average temperatures over the growing season. Since crop growth is directly related to thermal time, but not calendar time, TPE addresses the temporal shifts between different regions to improve generalization. We propose multiple TPE strategies, including learnable methods, to further improve results compared to the common fixed positional encodings. We demonstrate our approach on a crop classification task across four different European regions, where we obtain state-of-the-art generalization results.
summary: Large-scale crop type classification is a task at the core of remote sensing efforts with applications of both economic and ecological importance. Current state-of-the-art deep learning methods are based on self-attention and use satellite image time series (SITS) to discriminate crop types based on their unique growth patterns. However, existing methods generalize poorly to regions not seen during training mainly due to not being robust to temporal shifts of the growing season caused by variations in climate. To this end, we propose Thermal Positional Encoding (TPE) for attention-based crop classifiers. Unlike previous positional encoding based on calendar time (e.g. day-of-year), TPE is based on thermal time, which is obtained by accumulating daily average temperatures over the growing season. Since crop growth is directly related to thermal time, but not calendar time, TPE addresses the temporal shifts between different regions to improve generalization. We propose multiple TPE strategies, including learnable methods, to further improve results compared to the common fixed positional encodings. We demonstrate our approach on a crop classification task across four different European regions, where we obtain state-of-the-art generalization results.
abstract_zh: 大规模作物类型分类是遥感工作的核心任务，具有经济和生态重要性。当前最先进的深度学习方法基于自注意力，并使用卫星图像时间序列（SITS）根据作物独特的生长模式来区分作物类型。然而，现有方法对于训练期间未见过的区域的泛化能力较差，这主要是因为对气候变化引起的生长季节的时间变化不具有鲁棒性。为此，我们提出了基于注意力的作物分类器的热位置编码（TPE）。与之前基于日历时间（例如一年中的某一天）的位置编码不同，TPE 基于热时间，通过累积生长季节的日平均温度获得。由于作物生长与热时间直接相关，但与日历时间无关，因此 TPE 解决了不同区域之间的时间变化以提高泛化能力。我们提出了多种 TPE 策略，包括可学习的方法，以进一步改善与常见固定位置编码相比的结果。我们在四个不同的欧洲地区展示了我们的作物分类任务方法，并获得了最先进的泛化结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于热时间位置编码的卫星影像时间序列分类方法，用于改进大范围作物类型的分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有基于自注意力机制的作物分类方法因依赖日历时间导致对不同气候区域的生长季节时间偏移不鲁棒，从而泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 提出热时间位置编码（TPE）替代传统日历时间编码，通过累积生长季平均气温计算热时间，结合可学习策略优化位置编码。
AI.result: 在欧洲四个不同区域的作物分类任务中，该方法取得了当前最优的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 热时间编码通过更贴合作物生长规律的时间表征，有效解决了跨区域时间偏移问题，提升了模型的泛化能力。

However, existing methods generalize poorly to regions not seen during training mainly due to not being robust to temporal shifts of the growing season caused by variations in climate. To this end, we propose Thermal Positional Encoding (TPE) for attention-based crop classifiers. Unlike previous positional encoding based on calendar time (e.g. day-of-year), TPE is based on thermal time, which is obtained by accumulating daily average temperatures over the growing season. Since crop growth is directly related to thermal time, but not calendar time, TPE addresses the temporal shifts between different regions to improve generalization. We propose multiple TPE strategies, including learnable methods, to further improve results compared to the common fixed positional encodings. We demonstrate our approach on a crop classification task across four different European regions, where we obtain state-of-the-art generalization results. 大规模作物类型分类是遥感工作的核心任务，具有经济和生态重要性。当前最先进的深度学习方法基于自注意力，并使用卫星图像时间序列（SITS）根据作物独特的生长模式来区分作物类型。然而，现有方法对于训练期间未见过的区域的泛化能力较差，这主要是因为对气候变化引起的生长季节的时间变化不具有鲁棒性。为此，我们提出了基于注意力的作物分类器的热位置编码（TPE）。与之前基于日历时间（例如一年中的某一天）的位置编码不同，TPE 基于热时间，通过累积生长季节的日平均温度获得。由于作物生长与热时间直接相关，但与日历时间无关，因此 TPE 解决了不同区域之间的时间变化以提高泛化能力。我们提出了多种 TPE 策略，包括可学习的方法，以进一步改善与常见固定位置编码相比的结果。我们在四个不同的欧洲地区展示了我们的作物分类任务方法，并获得了最先进的泛化结果。 本文提出了一种基于热时间位置编码的卫星影像时间序列分类方法，用于改进大范围作物类型的分类任务。 Joachim Nyborg,Charlotte Pelletier,Ira Assent cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jean Pierre Richa,Jean-Emmanuel Deschaud,François Goulette,Nicolas Dalmasso
title: Unsigned Distance Field as an Accurate 3D Scene Representation for Neural Scene Completion
title_zh: 无符号距离场作为神经场景补全的准确 3D 场景表示
abstract: Scene Completion is the task of completing missing geometry from a partial scan of a scene. Most previous methods compute an implicit representation from range data using a Truncated Signed Distance Function (T-SDF) computed on a 3D grid as input to neural networks. The truncation decreases but does not remove the border errors introduced by the sign of SDF for open surfaces. As an alternative, we present an Unsigned Distance Function (UDF) as an input representation to scene completion neural networks. The proposed UDF is simple, and efficient as a geometry representation, and can be computed on any point cloud. In contrast to usual Signed Distance Functions, our UDF does not require normal computation. To obtain the explicit geometry, we present a method for extracting a point cloud from discretized UDF values on a sparse grid. We compare different SDFs and UDFs for the scene completion task on indoor and outdoor point clouds collected using RGB-D and LiDAR sensors and show improved completion using the proposed UDF function.
summary: Scene Completion is the task of completing missing geometry from a partial scan of a scene. Most previous methods compute an implicit representation from range data using a Truncated Signed Distance Function (T-SDF) computed on a 3D grid as input to neural networks. The truncation decreases but does not remove the border errors introduced by the sign of SDF for open surfaces. As an alternative, we present an Unsigned Distance Function (UDF) as an input representation to scene completion neural networks. The proposed UDF is simple, and efficient as a geometry representation, and can be computed on any point cloud. In contrast to usual Signed Distance Functions, our UDF does not require normal computation. To obtain the explicit geometry, we present a method for extracting a point cloud from discretized UDF values on a sparse grid. We compare different SDFs and UDFs for the scene completion task on indoor and outdoor point clouds collected using RGB-D and LiDAR sensors and show improved completion using the proposed UDF function.
abstract_zh: 场景补全是从场景的部分扫描中补全缺失几何体的任务。大多数先前的方法使用在 3D 网格上计算的截断符号距离函数 (T-SDF) 作为神经网络的输入来计算范围数据的隐式表示。截断会减少但不会消除开放曲面的 SDF 符号引入的边界错误。作为替代方案，我们提出无符号距离函数（UDF）作为场景完成神经网络的输入表示。所提出的 UDF 作为几何表示简单且高效，并且可以在任何点云上计算。与通常的有符号距离函数相比，我们的 UDF 不需要正常计算。为了获得显式几何形状，我们提出了一种从稀疏网格上的离散 UDF 值中提取点云的方法。我们比较了使用 RGB-D 和 LiDAR 传感器收集的室内和室外点云上的场景完成任务的不同 SDF 和 UDF，并显示了使用所提出的 UDF 函数改进的完成能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用无符号距离场（UDF）作为神经场景补全的3D场景表示方法，以替代传统截断符号距离函数（T-SDF）。
AI.motivation: 传统T-SDF因截断操作无法完全消除符号距离函数在开放表面的边界误差，且需依赖法线计算。UDF无需法线计算，且能更高效准确地表示几何形状。
AI.method: 提出以UDF作为神经网络输入表示，通过稀疏网格离散化UDF值并提取点云，实现场景几何的显式重建。
AI.result: 在室内和室外点云数据集（RGB-D和LiDAR）上，UDF相比多种SDF方法在场景补全任务中表现出更优的完成效果。
AI.conclusion: UDF作为一种简单高效的几何表示方法，能够有效解决传统SDF的边界误差问题，为神经场景补全提供更准确的3D表示。

authors_text: Krishna Pai,Rakhee Kallimani,Sridhar Iyer,B. Uma Maheswari,Rajashri Khanai,Dattaprasad Torse
title: A Survey on Brain-Computer Interface and Related Applications
title_zh: 脑机接口及相关应用综述
comment: ef:Machine Intelligence for Internet of Medical Things: Applications and Future Trends, Computational Intelligence for Data Analysis (2023) 2:210-228 (19)
comments: ef:Machine Intelligence for Internet of Medical Things: Applications and Future Trends, Computational Intelligence for Data Analysis (2023) 2:210-228 (19)
abstract: BCI systems are able to communicate directly between the brain and computer using neural activity measurements without the involvement of muscle movements. For BCI systems to be widely used by people with severe disabilities, long-term studies of their real-world use are needed, along with effective and feasible dissemination models. In addition, the robustness of the BCI systems' performance should be improved so they reach the same level of robustness as natural muscle-based health monitoring. In this chapter, we review the recent BCI related studies, followed by the most relevant applications of BCI systems. We also present the key issues and challenges which exist in regard to the BCI systems and also provide future directions.
summary: BCI systems are able to communicate directly between the brain and computer using neural activity measurements without the involvement of muscle movements. For BCI systems to be widely used by people with severe disabilities, long-term studies of their real-world use are needed, along with effective and feasible dissemination models. In addition, the robustness of the BCI systems' performance should be improved so they reach the same level of robustness as natural muscle-based health monitoring. In this chapter, we review the recent BCI related studies, followed by the most relevant applications of BCI systems. We also present the key issues and challenges which exist in regard to the BCI systems and also provide future directions.
abstract_zh: BCI 系统能够使用神经活动测量直接在大脑和计算机之间进行通信，而无需肌肉运动的参与。为了让脑机接口系统广泛被重度残疾人使用，需要对其现实世界的使用进行长期研究，并建立有效可行的传播模型。此外，BCI 系统性能的稳健性应该得到提高，以便达到与基于自然肌肉的健康监测相同的稳健性水平。在本章中，我们回顾了最近的 BCI 相关研究，然后介绍了 BCI 系统最相关的应用。我们还提出了 BCI 系统存在的关键问题和挑战，并提供了未来的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了脑机接口（BCI）系统的最新研究及其相关应用，并探讨了当前存在的关键问题和未来发展方向。
AI.motivation: BCI系统有望为严重残疾人士提供新的沟通方式，但需解决长期实际应用中的稳定性与推广模式问题。
AI.method: 通过回顾近期BCI相关文献，总结其应用案例，并分析技术挑战与改进方向。
AI.result: 梳理了BCI技术的发展现状，明确了其在医疗、康复等领域的应用潜力，同时指出现有系统在鲁棒性和长期使用方面的不足。
AI.conclusion: 未来需加强BCI系统的稳定性研究，并探索适合实际推广的长期应用模式，以推动其临床与日常应用落地。

authors_text: Shaolei Zhang,Yang Feng
title: Modeling Dual Read/Write Paths for Simultaneous Machine Translation
title_zh: 同步机器翻译的双读/写路径建模
comment: Accept to ACL 2022 main conference. 19 pages, 12 figures, 8 tables
comments: Accept to ACL 2022 main conference. 19 pages, 12 figures, 8 tables
abstract: Simultaneous machine translation (SiMT) outputs translation while reading source sentence and hence requires a policy to decide whether to wait for the next source word (READ) or generate a target word (WRITE), the actions of which form a read/write path. Although the read/write path is essential to SiMT performance, no direct supervision is given to the path in the existing methods. In this paper, we propose a method of dual-path SiMT which introduces duality constraints to direct the read/write path. According to duality constraints, the read/write path in source-to-target and target-to-source SiMT models can be mapped to each other. As a result, the two SiMT models can be optimized jointly by forcing their read/write paths to satisfy the mapping. Experiments on En-Vi and De-En tasks show that our method can outperform strong baselines under all latency.
summary: Simultaneous machine translation (SiMT) outputs translation while reading source sentence and hence requires a policy to decide whether to wait for the next source word (READ) or generate a target word (WRITE), the actions of which form a read/write path. Although the read/write path is essential to SiMT performance, no direct supervision is given to the path in the existing methods. In this paper, we propose a method of dual-path SiMT which introduces duality constraints to direct the read/write path. According to duality constraints, the read/write path in source-to-target and target-to-source SiMT models can be mapped to each other. As a result, the two SiMT models can be optimized jointly by forcing their read/write paths to satisfy the mapping. Experiments on En-Vi and De-En tasks show that our method can outperform strong baselines under all latency.
abstract_zh: 同步机器翻译（SiMT）在读取源句子的同时输出翻译，因此需要一个策略来决定是等待下一个源单词（READ）还是生成目标单词（WRITE），其动作形成读/写路径。尽管读/写路径对于 SiMT 性能至关重要，但现有方法中没有对该路径进行直接监督。在本文中，我们提出了一种双路径 SiMT 方法，该方法引入对偶约束来指导读/写路径。根据对偶约束，源到目标和目标到源SiMT模型中的读/写路径可以相互映射。因此，两个 SiMT 模型可以通过强制其读/写路径满足映射来联合优化。 En-Vi 和 De-En 任务的实验表明，我们的方法在所有延迟下都可以优于强基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双路径同时机器翻译模型，通过引入对偶约束来优化读/写路径决策，提升翻译效率与质量。
AI.motivation: 现有同时机器翻译方法缺乏对读/写路径的直接监督，导致路径决策不够精准，影响翻译性能。
AI.method: 设计双路径模型，通过对偶约束将源语到目标语与目标语到源语的读/写路径相互映射，并联合优化两个模型的路径决策。
AI.result: 在En-Vi和De-En任务中，该方法在所有延迟设置下均优于现有强基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过对偶约束联合优化双路径模型，能有效提升同时机器翻译的性能，为路径决策提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种双路径同时机器翻译模型，通过引入对偶约束来优化读/写路径决策，提升翻译效率与质量。
ai_content.motivation: 现有同时机器翻译方法缺乏对读/写路径的直接监督，导致路径决策不够精准，影响翻译性能。
ai_content.method: 设计双路径模型，通过对偶约束将源语到目标语与目标语到源语的读/写路径相互映射，并联合优化两个模型的路径决策。
ai_content.result: 在En-Vi和De-En任务中，该方法在所有延迟设置下均优于现有强基线模型。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过对偶约束联合优化双路径模型，能有效提升同时机器翻译的性能，为路径决策提供新思路。

search_text: Modeling Dual Read/Write Paths for Simultaneous Machine Translation 同步机器翻译的双读/写路径建模 Simultaneous machine translation (SiMT) outputs translation while reading source sentence and hence requires a policy to decide whether to wait for the next source word (READ) or generate a target word (WRITE), the actions of which form a read/write path. Although the read/write path is essential to SiMT performance, no direct supervision is given to the path in the existing methods. In this paper, we propose a method of dual-path SiMT which introduces duality constraints to direct the read/write path. According to duality constraints, the read/write path in source-to-target and target-to-source SiMT models can be mapped to each other. As a result, the two SiMT models can be optimized jointly by forcing their read/write paths to satisfy the mapping. Experiments on En-Vi and De-En tasks show that our method can outperform strong baselines under all latency. 同步机器翻译（SiMT）在读取源句子的同时输出翻译，因此需要一个策略来决定是等待下一个源单词（READ）还是生成目标单词（WRITE），其动作形成读/写路径。尽管读/写路径对于 SiMT 性能至关重要，但现有方法中没有对该路径进行直接监督。在本文中，我们提出了一种双路径 SiMT 方法，该方法引入对偶约束来指导读/写路径。根据对偶约束，源到目标和目标到源SiMT模型中的读/写路径可以相互映射。因此，两个 SiMT 模型可以通过强制其读/写路径满足映射来联合优化。 En-Vi 和 De-En 任务的实验表明，我们的方法在所有延迟下都可以优于强基线。 本文提出一种双路径同时机器翻译模型，通过引入对偶约束来优化读/写路径决策，提升翻译效率与质量。 Shaolei Zhang,Yang Feng cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Ravsehaj Singh Puri,Swaroop Mishra,Mihir Parmar,Chitta Baral
title: How Many Data Samples is an Additional Instruction Worth?
title_zh: 额外的指令值得多少数据样本？
abstract: Recently introduced instruction-paradigm empowers non-expert users to leverage NLP resources by defining a new task in natural language. Instruction-tuned models have significantly outperformed multitask learning models (without instruction); however they are far from state-of-the-art task-specific models. Conventional approaches to improve model performance via creating datasets with large number of task instances or architectural changes in the model may not be feasible for non-expert users. However, they can write alternate instructions to represent an instruction task. Is Instruction-augmentation helpful? We augment a subset of tasks in the expanded version of NATURAL INSTRUCTIONS with additional instructions and find that it significantly improves model performance (up to 35%), especially in the low-data regime. Our results indicate that an additional instruction can be equivalent to ~200 data samples on average across tasks.
summary: Recently introduced instruction-paradigm empowers non-expert users to leverage NLP resources by defining a new task in natural language. Instruction-tuned models have significantly outperformed multitask learning models (without instruction); however they are far from state-of-the-art task-specific models. Conventional approaches to improve model performance via creating datasets with large number of task instances or architectural changes in the model may not be feasible for non-expert users. However, they can write alternate instructions to represent an instruction task. Is Instruction-augmentation helpful? We augment a subset of tasks in the expanded version of NATURAL INSTRUCTIONS with additional instructions and find that it significantly improves model performance (up to 35%), especially in the low-data regime. Our results indicate that an additional instruction can be equivalent to ~200 data samples on average across tasks.
abstract_zh: 最近引入的指令范式使非专家用户能够通过用自然语言定义新任务来利用 NLP 资源。指令调整模型的性能显着优于多任务学习模型（无指令）；然而，它们距离最先进的特定任务模型还很远。通过创建具有大量任务实例的数据集或模型中的架构更改来提高模型性能的传统方法对于非专家用户来说可能不可行。但是，他们可以编写替代指令来表示指令任务。指令增强有帮助吗？我们用附加指令增强了 NATURAL INSTRUCTIONS 扩展版本中的任务子集，发现它显着提高了模型性能（高达 35%），特别是在低数据情况下。我们的结果表明，一条额外的指令平均相当于跨任务约 200 个数据样本。

AI.tldr: 研究额外指令对模型性能的影响，并量化其等效的数据样本数量。
AI.motivation: 非专家用户难以通过传统方法（如增加数据量或修改模型架构）提升模型性能，但可以通过编写替代指令来优化任务表现。
AI.method: 在扩展版NATURAL INSTRUCTIONS数据集中为部分任务添加额外指令，评估模型性能变化。
AI.result: 模型性能提升最高达35%，尤其在低数据场景下，额外指令平均等效于200个数据样本。
AI.conclusion: 指令增强是一种有效的数据高效优化方法，为非专家用户提供了一种替代传统数据扩展的途径。

authors_text: Xiaoguang Chang,Teng Wang,Changyin Sun,Wenzhe Cai
title: Biasing Like Human: A Cognitive Bias Framework for Scene Graph Generation
title_zh: 像人类一样存在偏差：场景图生成的认知偏差框架
abstract: Scene graph generation is a sophisticated task because there is no specific recognition pattern (e.g., "looking at" and "near" have no conspicuous difference concerning vision, whereas "near" could occur between entities with different morphology). Thus some scene graph generation methods are trapped into most frequent relation predictions caused by capricious visual features and trivial dataset annotations. Therefore, recent works emphasized the "unbiased" approaches to balance predictions for a more informative scene graph. However, human's quick and accurate judgments over relations between numerous objects should be attributed to "bias" (i.e., experience and linguistic knowledge) rather than pure vision. To enhance the model capability, inspired by the "cognitive bias" mechanism, we propose a novel 3-paradigms framework that simulates how humans incorporate the label linguistic features as guidance of vision-based representations to better mine hidden relation patterns and alleviate noisy visual propagation. Our framework is model-agnostic to any scene graph model. Comprehensive experiments prove our framework outperforms baseline modules in several metrics with minimum parameters increment and achieves new SOTA performance on Visual Genome dataset.
summary: Scene graph generation is a sophisticated task because there is no specific recognition pattern (e.g., "looking at" and "near" have no conspicuous difference concerning vision, whereas "near" could occur between entities with different morphology). Thus some scene graph generation methods are trapped into most frequent relation predictions caused by capricious visual features and trivial dataset annotations. Therefore, recent works emphasized the "unbiased" approaches to balance predictions for a more informative scene graph. However, human's quick and accurate judgments over relations between numerous objects should be attributed to "bias" (i.e., experience and linguistic knowledge) rather than pure vision. To enhance the model capability, inspired by the "cognitive bias" mechanism, we propose a novel 3-paradigms framework that simulates how humans incorporate the label linguistic features as guidance of vision-based representations to better mine hidden relation patterns and alleviate noisy visual propagation. Our framework is model-agnostic to any scene graph model. Comprehensive experiments prove our framework outperforms baseline modules in several metrics with minimum parameters increment and achieves new SOTA performance on Visual Genome dataset.
abstract_zh: 场景图生成是一项复杂的任务，因为没有特定的识别模式（例如，“看”和“近”在视觉方面没有明显的差异，而“近”可能发生在具有不同形态的实体之间）。因此，一些场景图生成方法陷入了由反复无常的视觉特征和琐碎的数据集注释引起的最常见的关系预测中。因此，最近的工作强调了“无偏见”的方法来平衡预测以获得更多信息的场景图。然而，人类对众多物体之间关系的快速而准确的判断应该归因于“偏见”（即经验和语言知识），而不是纯粹的视觉。为了增强模型能力，受“认知偏差”机制的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的三范式框架，该框架模拟人类如何将标签语言特征作为基于视觉的表示的指导，以更好地挖掘隐藏的关系模式并减轻嘈杂的视觉传播。我们的框架对于任何场景图模型来说都是模型不可知的。综合实验证明，我们的框架在参数增量最小的情况下在多个指标上优于基线模块，并在 Visual Genome 数据集上实现了新的 SOTA 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种模拟人类认知偏见的框架，用于改进场景图生成任务中的关系预测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因依赖视觉特征和数据集标注导致预测偏向高频关系，而人类通过经验与语言知识实现快速准确判断，因此需引入认知偏见机制增强模型能力。
AI.method: 设计一个模型无关的三范式框架，通过语言特征引导视觉表示，挖掘隐藏关系模式并缓解视觉噪声传播。
AI.result: 在Visual Genome数据集上以最小参数增量超越基线方法，达到新的SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 认知偏见框架有效提升了场景图生成质量，证明了语言知识引导视觉表征的重要性。

authors_text: Jean Pierre Richa,Jean-Emmanuel Deschaud,François Goulette,Nicolas Dalmasso
title: AdaSplats: Adaptive Splatting of Point Clouds for Accurate 3D Modeling and Real-time High-Fidelity LiDAR Simulation
title_zh: AdaSplats：点云的自适应泼溅，用于精确的 3D 建模和实时高保真 LiDAR 仿真
abstract: LiDAR sensors provide rich 3D information about their surrounding{s} and are becoming increasingly important for autonomous vehicles tasks such as {localization}, semantic segmentation, object detection, and tracking. {Simulation} accelerates the testing, validation, and deployment of autonomous vehicles while {also} reducing cost and eliminating the risks of testing in real-world scenarios. We address the problem of high-fidelity LiDAR simulation and present a pipeline that leverages real-world point clouds acquired by mobile mapping systems. Point-based geometry representations, more specifically splats {(2D oriented disks with normals)}, have proven their ability to accurately model the underlying surface in large point clouds{, mainly with uniform density}. We introduce an adaptive splat generation method that accurately models the underlying 3D geometry {to handle real-world point clouds with variable densities}, especially for thin structures. Moreover, we introduce a {fast} LiDAR {sensor} simulator, {working} in the splatted model, {that leverages} the GPU parallel architecture with an acceleration structure while focusing on efficiently handling large point clouds. We test our LiDAR simulation in real-world conditions, showing qualitative and quantitative results compared to basic splatting and meshing techniques, demonstrating the interest of our modeling technique.
summary: LiDAR sensors provide rich 3D information about their surrounding{s} and are becoming increasingly important for autonomous vehicles tasks such as {localization}, semantic segmentation, object detection, and tracking. {Simulation} accelerates the testing, validation, and deployment of autonomous vehicles while {also} reducing cost and eliminating the risks of testing in real-world scenarios. We address the problem of high-fidelity LiDAR simulation and present a pipeline that leverages real-world point clouds acquired by mobile mapping systems. Point-based geometry representations, more specifically splats {(2D oriented disks with normals)}, have proven their ability to accurately model the underlying surface in large point clouds{, mainly with uniform density}. Moreover, we introduce a {fast} LiDAR {sensor} simulator, {working} in the splatted model, {that leverages} the GPU parallel architecture with an acceleration structure while focusing on efficiently handling large point clouds. We test our LiDAR simulation in real-world conditions, showing qualitative and quantitative results compared to basic splatting and meshing techniques, demonstrating the interest of our modeling technique.
abstract_zh: LiDAR 传感器提供有关周围环境的丰富 3D 信息，对于{定位}、语义分割、物体检测和跟踪等自动驾驶车辆任务变得越来越重要。 {模拟}加速了自动驾驶汽车的测试、验证和部署，同时{还}降低了成本并消除了现实场景中的测试风险。我们解决了高保真 LiDAR 模拟的问题，并提出了一个利用移动测绘系统获取的现实世界点云的管道。基于点的几何表示，更具体地说是 splats {（具有法线的二维定向圆盘）}，已经证明了它们能够准确地对大型点云中的下层表面进行建模{，主要具有均匀的密度}。我们引入了一种自适应 splat 生成方法，可以准确地模拟底层 3D 几何形状{以处理具有可变密度的现实世界点云}，特别是对于薄结构。此外，我们引入了一个{快速}LiDAR {传感器}模拟器，在splatted模型中{工作}，{利用}具有加速结构的GPU并行架构，同时专注于有效处理大型点云。我们在现实条件下测试了 LiDAR 模拟，与基本的泼溅和网格划分技术相比，显示了定性和定量结果，展示了我们建模技术的兴趣。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaSplats方法，通过自适应点云溅射技术实现高精度3D建模与实时高保真LiDAR仿真。
AI.motivation: LiDAR传感器对自动驾驶任务至关重要，但真实测试成本高风险大。现有方法难以处理密度不均的点云数据，尤其对薄结构建模效果差。
AI.method: 设计自适应溅射生成算法处理变密度点云，并开发基于GPU加速结构的快速LiDAR仿真器，支持大规模点云高效处理。
AI.result: 在真实场景测试中，相比基础溅射和网格化方法，定性和定量结果均显示其建模精度和仿真效率优势。
AI.conclusion: AdaSplats方法有效解决了变密度点云建模难题，为自动驾驶提供了更准确的实时LiDAR仿真方案。

search_text: AdaSplats: Adaptive Splatting of Point Clouds for Accurate 3D Modeling and Real-time High-Fidelity LiDAR Simulation AdaSplats：点云的自适应泼溅，用于精确的 3D 建模和实时高保真 LiDAR 仿真 LiDAR sensors provide rich 3D information about their surrounding{s} and are becoming increasingly important for autonomous vehicles tasks such as {localization}, semantic segmentation, object detection, and tracking. {Simulation} accelerates the testing, validation, and deployment of autonomous vehicles while {also} reducing cost and eliminating the risks of testing in real-world scenarios. We address the problem of high-fidelity LiDAR simulation and present a pipeline that leverages real-world point clouds acquired by mobile mapping systems. Point-based geometry representations, more specifically splats {(2D oriented disks with normals)}, have proven their ability to accurately model the underlying surface in large point clouds{, mainly with uniform density}. We introduce an adaptive splat generation method that accurately models the underlying 3D geometry {to handle real-world point clouds with variable densities}, especially for thin structures. Moreover, we introduce a {fast} LiDAR {sensor} simulator, {working} in the splatted model, {that leverages} the GPU parallel architecture with an acceleration structure while focusing on efficiently handling large point clouds. We test our LiDAR simulation in real-world conditions, showing qualitative and quantitative results compared to basic splatting and meshing techniques, demonstrating the interest of our modeling technique. authors_text: Xiaotong Ji,Yuchen Zheng,Daiki Suehiro,Seiichi Uchida
title: Optimal Rejection Function Meets Character Recognition Tasks
title_zh: 最优拒绝函数满足字符识别任务
abstract: In this paper, we propose an optimal rejection method for rejecting ambiguous samples by a rejection function. This rejection function is trained together with a classification function under the framework of Learning-with-Rejection (LwR). The highlights of LwR are: (1) the rejection strategy is not heuristic but has a strong background from a machine learning theory, and (2) the rejection function can be trained on an arbitrary feature space which is different from the feature space for classification. The latter suggests we can choose a feature space that is more suitable for rejection. Although the past research on LwR focused only on its theoretical aspect, we propose to utilize LwR for practical pattern classification tasks. Moreover, we propose to use features from different CNN layers for classification and rejection. Our extensive experiments of notMNIST classification and character/non-character classification demonstrate that the proposed method achieves better performance than traditional rejection strategies.
summary: In this paper, we propose an optimal rejection method for rejecting ambiguous samples by a rejection function. This rejection function is trained together with a classification function under the framework of Learning-with-Rejection (LwR). The highlights of LwR are: (1) the rejection strategy is not heuristic but has a strong background from a machine learning theory, and (2) the rejection function can be trained on an arbitrary feature space which is different from the feature space for classification. The latter suggests we can choose a feature space that is more suitable for rejection. Although the past research on LwR focused only on its theoretical aspect, we propose to utilize LwR for practical pattern classification tasks. Moreover, we propose to use features from different CNN layers for classification and rejection. Our extensive experiments of notMNIST classification and character/non-character classification demonstrate that the proposed method achieves better performance than traditional rejection strategies.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种通过拒绝函数拒绝模糊样本的最佳拒绝方法。该拒绝函数是在拒绝学习（LwR）框架下与分类函数一起训练的。 LwR的亮点在于：（1）拒绝策略不是启发式的，而是具有很强的机器学习理论背景；（2）拒绝函数可以在不同于分类特征空间的任意特征空间上进行训练。后者建议我们可以选择一个更适合拒绝的特征空间。尽管过去对 LwR 的研究仅集中在其理论方面，但我们建议将 LwR 用于实际的模式分类任务。此外，我们建议使用不同 CNN 层的特征进行分类和拒绝。我们对 notMNIST 分类和字符/非字符分类的广泛实验表明，所提出的方法比传统的拒绝策略具有更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于学习拒绝（LwR）框架的最优拒绝方法，通过训练拒绝函数与分类函数共同处理字符识别任务中的模糊样本。
AI.motivation: 传统拒绝策略多依赖启发式方法，缺乏理论支持且特征空间选择受限，难以适应实际分类任务需求。
AI.method: 在LwR框架下联合训练拒绝函数与分类函数，允许拒绝函数使用与分类不同的特征空间，并利用CNN不同层的特征进行分类与拒绝。
AI.result: 在notMNIST分类和字符/非字符分类实验中，该方法优于传统拒绝策略，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论指导的拒绝函数设计与特征空间优化，LwR框架能显著提升字符识别任务的拒绝性能，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Lukas Rustler,Jens Lundell,Jan Kristof Behrens,Ville Kyrki,Matej Hoffmann
title: Active Visuo-Haptic Object Shape Completion
title_zh: 主动视觉触觉物体形状完成
abstract: Recent advancements in object shape completion have enabled impressive object reconstructions using only visual input. However, due to self-occlusion, the reconstructions have high uncertainty in the occluded object parts, which negatively impacts the performance of downstream robotic tasks such as grasping. In this work, we propose an active visuo-haptic shape completion method called Act-VH that actively computes where to touch the objects based on the reconstruction uncertainty. Act-VH reconstructs objects from point clouds and calculates the reconstruction uncertainty using IGR, a recent state-of-the-art implicit surface deep neural network. We experimentally evaluate the reconstruction accuracy of Act-VH against five baselines in simulation and in the real world. We also propose a new simulation environment for this purpose. The results show that Act-VH outperforms all baselines and that an uncertainty-driven haptic exploration policy leads to higher reconstruction accuracy than a random policy and a policy driven by Gaussian Process Implicit Surfaces. As a final experiment, we evaluate Act-VH and the best reconstruction baseline on grasping 10 novel objects. The results show that Act-VH reaches a significantly higher grasp success rate than the baseline on all objects. Together, this work opens up the door for using active visuo-haptic shape completion in more complex cluttered scenes.
summary: Recent advancements in object shape completion have enabled impressive object reconstructions using only visual input. However, due to self-occlusion, the reconstructions have high uncertainty in the occluded object parts, which negatively impacts the performance of downstream robotic tasks such as grasping. In this work, we propose an active visuo-haptic shape completion method called Act-VH that actively computes where to touch the objects based on the reconstruction uncertainty. Act-VH reconstructs objects from point clouds and calculates the reconstruction uncertainty using IGR, a recent state-of-the-art implicit surface deep neural network. We experimentally evaluate the reconstruction accuracy of Act-VH against five baselines in simulation and in the real world. We also propose a new simulation environment for this purpose. The results show that Act-VH outperforms all baselines and that an uncertainty-driven haptic exploration policy leads to higher reconstruction accuracy than a random policy and a policy driven by Gaussian Process Implicit Surfaces. As a final experiment, we evaluate Act-VH and the best reconstruction baseline on grasping 10 novel objects. The results show that Act-VH reaches a significantly higher grasp success rate than the baseline on all objects. Together, this work opens up the door for using active visuo-haptic shape completion in more complex cluttered scenes.
abstract_zh: 物体形状完成方面的最新进展使得仅使用视觉输入就可以实现令人印象深刻的物体重建。然而，由于自遮挡，被遮挡物体部分的重建具有很高的不确定性，这会对下游机器人任务（例如抓取）的性能产生负面影响。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为 Act-VH 的主动视觉触觉形状完成方法，该方法根据重建不确定性主动计算触摸对象的位置。 Act-VH 从点云重建对象，并使用 IGR（一种最新的隐式表面深度神经网络）计算重建不确定性。我们根据模拟和现实世界中的五个基线，通过实验评估 Act-VH 的重建精度。我们还为此提出了一个新的模拟环境。结果表明，Act-VH 优于所有基线，并且不确定性驱动的触觉探索策略比随机策略和高斯过程隐式曲面驱动的策略具有更高的重建精度。作为最后的实验，我们评估了 Act-VH 和抓取 10 个新物体的最佳重建基线。结果表明，Act-VH 在所有物体上的抓取成功率均明显高于基线。总之，这项工作为在更复杂的杂乱场景中使用主动视觉触觉形状完成打开了大门。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种主动视觉-触觉物体形状补全方法Act-VH，通过结合视觉和触觉信息提高物体重建的准确性，特别是在自遮挡区域。
AI.motivation: 现有仅依赖视觉的物体重建方法在自遮挡区域存在较高不确定性，影响机器人抓取等下游任务性能，需通过触觉主动探索优化重建效果。
AI.method: 基于点云重建物体并利用IGR网络计算重建不确定性，通过主动触觉探索策略选择接触位置，提出新的仿真环境进行评估。
AI.result: Act-VH在仿真和真实环境中均优于五个基线方法，不确定性驱动策略比随机策略和高斯过程隐式曲面策略精度更高，抓取成功率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 主动视觉-触觉形状补全方法在复杂杂乱场景中具有应用潜力，为机器人感知与操作任务提供了新思路。

search_text: Active Visuo-Haptic Object Shape Completion 主动视觉触觉物体形状完成 Recent advancements in object shape completion have enabled impressive object reconstructions using only visual input. However, due to self-occlusion, the reconstructions have high uncertainty in the occluded object parts, which negatively impacts the performance of downstream robotic tasks such as grasping. In this work, we propose an active visuo-haptic shape completion method called Act-VH that actively computes where to touch the objects based on the reconstruction uncertainty. Act-VH reconstructs objects from point clouds and calculates the reconstruction uncertainty using IGR, a recent state-of-the-art implicit surface deep neural network. We experimentally evaluate the reconstruction accuracy of Act-VH against five baselines in simulation and in the real world. We also propose a new simulation environment for this purpose. The results show that Act-VH outperforms all baselines and that an uncertainty-driven haptic exploration policy leads to higher reconstruction accuracy than a random policy and a policy driven by Gaussian Process Implicit Surfaces. As a final experiment, we evaluate Act-VH and the best reconstruction baseline on grasping 10 novel objects. The results show that Act-VH reaches a significantly higher grasp success rate than the baseline on all objects. Together, this work opens up the door for using active visuo-haptic shape completion in more complex cluttered scenes. 物体形状完成方面的最新进展使得仅使用视觉输入就可以实现令人印象深刻的物体重建。然而，由于自遮挡，被遮挡物体部分的重建具有很高的不确定性，这会对下游机器人任务（例如抓取）的性能产生负面影响。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为 Act-VH 的主动视觉触觉形状完成方法，该方法根据重建不确定性主动计算触摸对象的位置。 Act-VH 从点云重建对象，并使用 IGR（一种最新的隐式表面深度神经网络）计算重建不确定性。我们根据模拟和现实世界中的五个基线，通过实验评估 Act-VH 的重建精度。我们还为此提出了一个新的模拟环境。结果表明，Act-VH 优于所有基线，并且不确定性驱动的触觉探索策略比随机策略和高斯过程隐式曲面驱动的策略具有更高的重建精度。作为最后的实验，我们评估了 Act-VH 和抓取 10 个新物体的最佳重建基线。结果表明，Act-VH 在所有物体上的抓取成功率均明显高于基线。总之，这项工作为在更复杂的杂乱场景中使用主动视觉触觉形状完成打开了大门。 本文提出了一种主动视觉-触觉物体形状补全方法Act-VH，通过结合视觉和触觉信息提高物体重建的准确性，特别是在自遮挡区域。 Lukas Rustler,Jens Lundell,Jan Kristof Behrens,Ville Kyrki,Matej Hoffmann cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Angel Mario Castro Martinez,Constantin Spille,Jana Roßbach,Birger Kollmeier,Bernd T. Meyer
title: Prediction of speech intelligibility with DNN-based performance measures
title_zh: 使用基于 DNN 的性能测量预测语音清晰度
abstract: This paper presents a speech intelligibility model based on automatic speech recognition (ASR), combining phoneme probabilities from deep neural networks (DNN) and a performance measure that estimates the word error rate from these probabilities. This model does not require the clean speech reference nor the word labels during testing as the ASR decoding step, which finds the most likely sequence of words given phoneme posterior probabilities, is omitted. The model is evaluated via the root-mean-squared error between the predicted and observed speech reception thresholds from eight normal-hearing listeners. The recognition task consists of identifying noisy words from a German matrix sentence test. The speech material was mixed with eight noise maskers covering different modulation types, from speech-shaped stationary noise to a single-talker masker. The prediction performance is compared to five established models and an ASR-model using word labels. Two combinations of features and networks were tested. Both include temporal information either at the feature level (amplitude modulation filterbanks and a feed-forward network) or captured by the architecture (mel-spectrograms and a time-delay deep neural network, TDNN). The TDNN model is on par with the DNN while reducing the number of parameters by a factor of 37; this optimization allows parallel streams on dedicated hearing aid hardware as a forward-pass can be computed within the 10ms of each frame. The proposed model performs almost as well as the label-based model and produces more accurate predictions than the baseline models.
summary: This paper presents a speech intelligibility model based on automatic speech recognition (ASR), combining phoneme probabilities from deep neural networks (DNN) and a performance measure that estimates the word error rate from these probabilities. This model does not require the clean speech reference nor the word labels during testing as the ASR decoding step, which finds the most likely sequence of words given phoneme posterior probabilities, is omitted. The model is evaluated via the root-mean-squared error between the predicted and observed speech reception thresholds from eight normal-hearing listeners. The recognition task consists of identifying noisy words from a German matrix sentence test. The speech material was mixed with eight noise maskers covering different modulation types, from speech-shaped stationary noise to a single-talker masker. The prediction performance is compared to five established models and an ASR-model using word labels. Two combinations of features and networks were tested. Both include temporal information either at the feature level (amplitude modulation filterbanks and a feed-forward network) or captured by the architecture (mel-spectrograms and a time-delay deep neural network, TDNN). The TDNN model is on par with the DNN while reducing the number of parameters by a factor of 37; this optimization allows parallel streams on dedicated hearing aid hardware as a forward-pass can be computed within the 10ms of each frame. The proposed model performs almost as well as the label-based model and produces more accurate predictions than the baseline models.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于自动语音识别 (ASR) 的语音清晰度模型，结合了深度神经网络 (DNN) 的音素概率和根据这些概率估计单词错误率的性能度量。该模型在测试期间不需要干净的语音参考，也不需要单词标签，因为省略了 ASR 解码步骤，该步骤在给定音素后验概率的情况下找到最可能的单词序列。该模型通过八名正常听力听众的预测语音接收阈值和观察到的语音接收阈值之间的均方根误差进行评估。识别任务包括从德语矩阵句子测试中识别嘈杂的单词。语音材料与涵盖不同调制类型的八个噪声掩蔽器混合，从语音形状的固定噪声到单说话者掩蔽器。将预测性能与五个已建立的模型和使用单词标签的 ASR 模型进行比较。测试了功能和网络的两种组合。两者都包含特征级别的时间信息（调幅滤波器组和前馈网络）或由架构捕获的时间信息（梅尔频谱图和时延深度神经网络，TDNN）。 TDNN模型与DNN相当，同时参数数量减少了37倍；这种优化允许专用助听器硬件上的并行流，因为可以在每帧的 10 毫秒内计算前向传递。所提出的模型的性能几乎与基于标签的模型一样好，并且比基线模型产生更准确的预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度神经网络（DNN）的语音可懂度预测模型，无需清洁语音参考或词标签即可估计词错误率。
AI.motivation: 传统语音可懂度预测方法依赖清洁语音或词标签，限制了实际应用。本文旨在开发一种无需这些信息的高效预测模型。
AI.method: 结合DNN生成的音素概率与词错误率估计指标，采用两种特征-网络组合：基于时域特征的滤波器组与前馈网络，或通过时延神经网络（TDNN）捕获时序信息。
AI.result: TDNN模型参数减少37倍，预测性能与DNN相当，且优于其他基线模型；模型在助听器硬件上可实现并行处理。
AI.conclusion: 提出的DNN方法在保持预测精度的同时显著降低计算复杂度，适用于实时助听设备中的语音可懂度评估。

authors_text: Yang Ding,Jing Yu,Bang Liu,Yue Hu,Mingxin Cui,Qi Wu
title: MuKEA: Multimodal Knowledge Extraction and Accumulation for Knowledge-based Visual Question Answering
title_zh: MuKEA：基于知识的视觉问答的多模态知识提取和积累
abstract: Knowledge-based visual question answering requires the ability of associating external knowledge for open-ended cross-modal scene understanding. One limitation of existing solutions is that they capture relevant knowledge from text-only knowledge bases, which merely contain facts expressed by first-order predicates or language descriptions while lacking complex but indispensable multimodal knowledge for visual understanding. How to construct vision-relevant and explainable multimodal knowledge for the VQA scenario has been less studied. In this paper, we propose MuKEA to represent multimodal knowledge by an explicit triplet to correlate visual objects and fact answers with implicit relations. To bridge the heterogeneous gap, we propose three objective losses to learn the triplet representations from complementary views: embedding structure, topological relation and semantic space. By adopting a pre-training and fine-tuning learning strategy, both basic and domain-specific multimodal knowledge are progressively accumulated for answer prediction. We outperform the state-of-the-art by 3.35% and 6.08% respectively on two challenging knowledge-required datasets: OK-VQA and KRVQA. Experimental results prove the complementary benefits of the multimodal knowledge with existing knowledge bases and the advantages of our end-to-end framework over the existing pipeline methods. The code is available at https://github.com/AndersonStra/MuKEA.
summary: Knowledge-based visual question answering requires the ability of associating external knowledge for open-ended cross-modal scene understanding. One limitation of existing solutions is that they capture relevant knowledge from text-only knowledge bases, which merely contain facts expressed by first-order predicates or language descriptions while lacking complex but indispensable multimodal knowledge for visual understanding. How to construct vision-relevant and explainable multimodal knowledge for the VQA scenario has been less studied. In this paper, we propose MuKEA to represent multimodal knowledge by an explicit triplet to correlate visual objects and fact answers with implicit relations. To bridge the heterogeneous gap, we propose three objective losses to learn the triplet representations from complementary views: embedding structure, topological relation and semantic space. By adopting a pre-training and fine-tuning learning strategy, both basic and domain-specific multimodal knowledge are progressively accumulated for answer prediction. We outperform the state-of-the-art by 3.35% and 6.08% respectively on two challenging knowledge-required datasets: OK-VQA and KRVQA. Experimental results prove the complementary benefits of the multimodal knowledge with existing knowledge bases and the advantages of our end-to-end framework over the existing pipeline methods. The code is available at https://github.com/AndersonStra/MuKEA.
abstract_zh: 基于知识的视觉问答需要关联外部知识以实现开放式跨模态场景理解的能力。现有解决方案的一个局限性是它们从纯文本知识库中捕获相关知识，这些知识库仅包含由一阶谓词或语言描述表达的事实，而缺乏用于视觉理解的复杂但不可或缺的多模态知识。如何为 VQA 场景构建与视觉相关且可解释的多模态知识的研究较少。在本文中，我们提出 MuKEA 通过显式三元组来表示多模态知识，以将视觉对象和事实答案与隐式关系相关联。为了弥合异构差距，我们提出了三种客观损失来从互补视图中学习三元组表示：嵌入结构、拓扑关系和语义空间。通过采用预训练和微调学习策略，逐步积累基础和特定领域的多模态知识以进行答案预测。我们在两个具有挑战性的知识需求数据集 OK-VQA 和 KRVQA 上分别比最先进的技术高出 3.35% 和 6.08%。实验结果证明了多模态知识与现有知识库的互补优势以及我们的端到端框架相对于现有管道方法的优势。代码可在 https://github.com/AndersonStra/MuKEA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MuKEA框架，通过多模态知识提取与积累提升基于知识的视觉问答性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉问答方法依赖文本知识库，缺乏复杂且必要的多模态知识，难以支持可解释的视觉场景理解。
AI.method: 构建显式三元组关联视觉对象与事实答案，设计嵌入结构、拓扑关系和语义空间三种损失函数，并采用预训练-微调策略积累多模态知识。
AI.result: 在OK-VQA和KRVQA数据集上分别超越现有方法3.35%和6.08%，验证多模态知识互补性及端到端框架优势。
AI.conclusion: MuKEA通过多模态知识表示和学习策略有效提升视觉问答性能，代码已开源促进后续研究。

ai_content.conclusion: MuKEA通过多模态知识表示和学习策略有效提升视觉问答性能，代码已开源促进后续研究。

motivation: 现有视觉问答方法依赖文本知识库，缺乏复杂且必要的多模态知识，难以支持可解释的视觉场景理解。
method: 构建显式三元组关联视觉对象与事实答案，设计嵌入结构、拓扑关系和语义空间三种损失函数，并采用预训练-微调策略积累多模态知识。

search_text: MuKEA: Multimodal Knowledge Extraction and Accumulation for Knowledge-based Visual Question Answering MuKEA：基于知识的视觉问答的多模态知识提取和积累 Knowledge-based visual question answering requires the ability of associating external knowledge for open-ended cross-modal scene understanding. One limitation of existing solutions is that they capture relevant knowledge from text-only knowledge bases, which merely contain facts expressed by first-order predicates or language descriptions while lacking complex but indispensable multimodal knowledge for visual understanding. How to construct vision-relevant and explainable multimodal knowledge for the VQA scenario has been less studied. In this paper, we propose MuKEA to represent multimodal knowledge by an explicit triplet to correlate visual objects and fact answers with implicit relations. To bridge the heterogeneous gap, we propose three objective losses to learn the triplet representations from complementary views: embedding structure, topological relation and semantic space. By adopting a pre-training and fine-tuning learning strategy, both basic and domain-specific multimodal knowledge are progressively accumulated for answer prediction. We outperform the state-of-the-art by 3.35% and 6.08% respectively on two challenging knowledge-required datasets: OK-VQA and KRVQA. Experimental results prove the complementary benefits of the multimodal knowledge with existing knowledge bases and the advantages of our end-to-end framework over the existing pipeline methods. The code is available at https://github.com/AndersonStra/MuKEA. 基于知识的视觉问答需要关联外部知识以实现开放式跨模态场景理解的能力。现有解决方案的一个局限性是它们从纯文本知识库中捕获相关知识，这些知识库仅包含由一阶谓词或语言描述表达的事实，而缺乏用于视觉理解的复杂但不可或缺的多模态知识。如何为 VQA 场景构建与视觉相关且可解释的多模态知识的研究较少。在本文中，我们提出 MuKEA 通过显式三元组来表示多模态知识，以将视觉对象和事实答案与隐式关系相关联。为了弥合异构差距，我们提出了三种客观损失来从互补视图中学习三元组表示：嵌入结构、拓扑关系和语义空间。通过采用预训练和微调学习策略，逐步积累基础和特定领域的多模态知识以进行答案预测。我们在两个具有挑战性的知识需求数据集 OK-VQA 和 KRVQA 上分别比最先进的技术高出 3.35% 和 6.08%。实验结果证明了多模态知识与现有知识库的互补优势以及我们的端到端框架相对于现有管道方法的优势。代码可在 https://github.com/AndersonStra/MuKEA 获取。 本文提出MuKEA框架，通过多模态知识提取与积累提升基于知识的视觉问答性能。 Yang Ding,Jing Yu,Bang Liu,Yue Hu,Mingxin Cui,Qi Wu cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Haoxiang Wang,Yite Wang,Ruoyu Sun,Bo Li
title: Global Convergence of MAML and Theory-Inspired Neural Architecture Search for Few-Shot Learning
title_zh: MAML 的全局收敛和理论启发的神经架构搜索用于少样本学习
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2022. The code will be released at https://github.com/YiteWang/MetaNTK-NAS Authors' note: This work has an overlap with our previous tech report, arXiv:2006.14606
comments: Accepted at CVPR 2022. The code will be released at https://github.com/YiteWang/MetaNTK-NAS Authors' note: This work has an overlap with our previous tech report, arXiv:2006.14606
abstract: Model-agnostic meta-learning (MAML) and its variants have become popular approaches for few-shot learning. However, due to the non-convexity of deep neural nets (DNNs) and the bi-level formulation of MAML, the theoretical properties of MAML with DNNs remain largely unknown. In this paper, we first prove that MAML with over-parameterized DNNs is guaranteed to converge to global optima at a linear rate. Our convergence analysis indicates that MAML with over-parameterized DNNs is equivalent to kernel regression with a novel class of kernels, which we name as Meta Neural Tangent Kernels (MetaNTK). Then, we propose MetaNTK-NAS, a new training-free neural architecture search (NAS) method for few-shot learning that uses MetaNTK to rank and select architectures. Empirically, we compare our MetaNTK-NAS with previous NAS methods on two popular few-shot learning benchmarks, miniImageNet, and tieredImageNet. We show that the performance of MetaNTK-NAS is comparable or better than the state-of-the-art NAS method designed for few-shot learning while enjoying more than 100x speedup. We believe the efficiency of MetaNTK-NAS makes itself more practical for many real-world tasks.
summary: Model-agnostic meta-learning (MAML) and its variants have become popular approaches for few-shot learning. However, due to the non-convexity of deep neural nets (DNNs) and the bi-level formulation of MAML, the theoretical properties of MAML with DNNs remain largely unknown. In this paper, we first prove that MAML with over-parameterized DNNs is guaranteed to converge to global optima at a linear rate. Our convergence analysis indicates that MAML with over-parameterized DNNs is equivalent to kernel regression with a novel class of kernels, which we name as Meta Neural Tangent Kernels (MetaNTK). Then, we propose MetaNTK-NAS, a new training-free neural architecture search (NAS) method for few-shot learning that uses MetaNTK to rank and select architectures. Empirically, we compare our MetaNTK-NAS with previous NAS methods on two popular few-shot learning benchmarks, miniImageNet, and tieredImageNet. We show that the performance of MetaNTK-NAS is comparable or better than the state-of-the-art NAS method designed for few-shot learning while enjoying more than 100x speedup. We believe the efficiency of MetaNTK-NAS makes itself more practical for many real-world tasks.
abstract_zh: 与模型无关的元学习（MAML）及其变体已成为小样本学习的流行方法。然而，由于深度神经网络（DNN）的非凸性和 MAML 的双层表述，带有 DNN 的 MAML 的理论特性在很大程度上仍然未知。在本文中，我们首先证明具有超参数化 DNN 的 MAML 能够保证以线性速率收敛到全局最优值。我们的收敛分析表明，具有超参数化 DNN 的 MAML 相当于具有一类新型内核的内核回归，我们将其命名为元神经正切内核 (MetaNTK)。然后，我们提出了 MetaNTK-NAS，这是一种新的免训练神经架构搜索（NAS）方法，用于小样本学习，使用 MetaNTK 来排序和选择架构。根据经验，我们在两个流行的少样本学习基准（miniImageNet 和 tieredImageNet）上将我们的 MetaNTK-NAS 与之前的 NAS 方法进行了比较。我们表明，MetaNTK-NAS 的性能与专为少样本学习而设计的最先进的 NAS 方法相当或更好，同时享受超过 100 倍的加速。我们相信 MetaNTK-NAS 的效率使其对于许多现实世界的任务更加实用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了MAML在少样本学习中的全局收敛性，并提出了一种基于理论分析的高效神经架构搜索方法MetaNTK-NAS。
AI.motivation: MAML在深度神经网络中的理论性质尚不明确，且现有神经架构搜索方法在少样本学习中效率较低。
AI.method: 通过证明过参数化DNN的MAML等价于MetaNTK核回归，提出无需训练的MetaNTK-NAS架构搜索方法。
AI.result: MetaNTK-NAS在miniImageNet和tieredImageNet基准上性能优于或接近SOTA方法，且速度提升超100倍。
AI.conclusion: MetaNTK-NAS的高效性使其更适用于实际少样本学习任务。

search_text: Global Convergence of MAML and Theory-Inspired Neural Architecture Search for Few-Shot Learning MAML 的全局收敛和理论启发的神经架构搜索用于少样本学习 Model-agnostic meta-learning (MAML) and its variants have become popular approaches for few-shot learning. However, due to the non-convexity of deep neural nets (DNNs) and the bi-level formulation of MAML, the theoretical properties of MAML with DNNs remain largely unknown. In this paper, we first prove that MAML with over-parameterized DNNs is guaranteed to converge to global optima at a linear rate. Our convergence analysis indicates that MAML with over-parameterized DNNs is equivalent to kernel regression with a novel class of kernels, which we name as Meta Neural Tangent Kernels (MetaNTK). Then, we propose MetaNTK-NAS, a new training-free neural architecture search (NAS) method for few-shot learning that uses MetaNTK to rank and select architectures. Empirically, we compare our MetaNTK-NAS with previous NAS methods on two popular few-shot learning benchmarks, miniImageNet, and tieredImageNet. We show that the performance of MetaNTK-NAS is comparable or better than the state-of-the-art NAS method designed for few-shot learning while enjoying more than 100x speedup. We believe the efficiency of MetaNTK-NAS makes itself more practical for many real-world tasks. 与模型无关的元学习（MAML）及其变体已成为小样本学习的流行方法。然而，由于深度神经网络（DNN）的非凸性和 MAML 的双层表述，带有 DNN 的 MAML 的理论特性在很大程度上仍然未知。在本文中，我们首先证明具有超参数化 DNN 的 MAML 能够保证以线性速率收敛到全局最优值。我们的收敛分析表明，具有超参数化 DNN 的 MAML 相当于具有一类新型内核的内核回归，我们将其命名为元神经正切内核 (MetaNTK)。然后，我们提出了 MetaNTK-NAS，这是一种新的免训练神经架构搜索（NAS）方法，用于小样本学习，使用 MetaNTK 来排序和选择架构。根据经验，我们在两个流行的少样本学习基准（miniImageNet 和 tieredImageNet）上将我们的 MetaNTK-NAS 与之前的 NAS 方法进行了比较。我们表明，MetaNTK-NAS 的性能与专为少样本学习而设计的最先进的 NAS 方法相当或更好，同时享受超过 100 倍的加速。我们相信 MetaNTK-NAS 的效率使其对于许多现实世界的任务更加实用。 本文研究了MAML在少样本学习中的全局收敛性，并提出了一种基于理论分析的高效神经架构搜索方法MetaNTK-NAS。 Haoxiang Wang,Yite Wang,Ruoyu Sun,Bo Li cs.LG,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Jianwei Zhao,Qiang Zhai,Pengbo Zhao,Rui Huang,Hong Cheng
title: Co-visual pattern augmented generative transformer learning for automobile geo-localization
title_zh: 共同视觉模式增强了汽车地理定位的生成变压器学习
abstract: Geolocation is a fundamental component of route planning and navigation for unmanned vehicles, but GNSS-based geolocation fails under denial-of-service conditions. Cross-view geo-localization (CVGL), which aims to estimate the geographical location of the ground-level camera by matching against enormous geo-tagged aerial (\emph{e.g.}, satellite) images, has received lots of attention but remains extremely challenging due to the drastic appearance differences across aerial-ground views. In existing methods, global representations of different views are extracted primarily using Siamese-like architectures, but their interactive benefits are seldom taken into account. In this paper, we present a novel approach using cross-view knowledge generative techniques in combination with transformers, namely mutual generative transformer learning (MGTL), for CVGL. Specifically, by taking the initial representations produced by the backbone network, MGTL develops two separate generative sub-modules -- one for aerial-aware knowledge generation from ground-view semantics and vice versa -- and fully exploits the entirely mutual benefits through the attention mechanism. Moreover, to better capture the co-visual relationships between aerial and ground views, we introduce a cascaded attention masking algorithm to further boost accuracy. Extensive experiments on challenging public benchmarks, \emph{i.e.}, {CVACT} and {CVUSA}, demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method which sets new records compared with the existing state-of-the-art models.
summary: Geolocation is a fundamental component of route planning and navigation for unmanned vehicles, but GNSS-based geolocation fails under denial-of-service conditions. Cross-view geo-localization (CVGL), which aims to estimate the geographical location of the ground-level camera by matching against enormous geo-tagged aerial (\emph{e.g.}, satellite) images, has received lots of attention but remains extremely challenging due to the drastic appearance differences across aerial-ground views. In existing methods, global representations of different views are extracted primarily using Siamese-like architectures, but their interactive benefits are seldom taken into account. In this paper, we present a novel approach using cross-view knowledge generative techniques in combination with transformers, namely mutual generative transformer learning (MGTL), for CVGL. Specifically, by taking the initial representations produced by the backbone network, MGTL develops two separate generative sub-modules -- one for aerial-aware knowledge generation from ground-view semantics and vice versa -- and fully exploits the entirely mutual benefits through the attention mechanism. Moreover, to better capture the co-visual relationships between aerial and ground views, we introduce a cascaded attention masking algorithm to further boost accuracy. Extensive experiments on challenging public benchmarks, \emph{i.e.}, {CVACT} and {CVUSA}, demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method which sets new records compared with the existing state-of-the-art models.
abstract_zh: 地理定位是无人驾驶车辆路线规划和导航的基本组成部分，但基于 GNSS 的地理定位在拒绝服务条件下会失败。跨视图地理定位（CVGL）旨在通过与大量带有地理标记的航空（\emph{例如，卫星）图像进行匹配来估计地面摄像机的地理位置，它受到了广泛的关注，但由于空中与地面视图之间的巨大外观差异，仍然极具挑战性。在现有的方法中，主要使用类似暹罗的架构来提取不同视图的全局表示，但很少考虑它们的交互优势。在本文中，我们提出了一种将跨视图知识生成技术与 Transformer 相结合的新方法，即用于 CVGL 的互生成式 Transformer 学习（MGTL）。具体来说，通过采用主干网络产生的初始表示，MGTL 开发了两个独立的生成子模块——一个用于从地面视图语义生成空中感知知识，反之亦然——并通过注意力机制充分利用完全互惠互利。此外，为了更好地捕捉空中和地面视图之间的共同视觉关系，我们引入了级联注意掩蔽算法以进一步提高准确性。对具有挑战性的公共基准 \emph{i.e.}、{CVACT} 和 {CVUSA} 进行的广泛实验证明了所提出方法的有效性，与现有的最先进模型相比，该方法创造了新记录。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合交叉视图知识生成技术和Transformer的方法，用于提高无人驾驶车辆在无GNSS信号条件下的地理定位精度。
AI.motivation: 由于GNSS信号可能被干扰，基于GNSS的地理定位在无人驾驶车辆中存在局限性。现有的交叉视图地理定位方法未能充分利用不同视图之间的交互优势，因此仍面临挑战。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为相互生成Transformer学习（MGTL）的方法，利用生成子模块从地面视图和空中视图中生成知识，并通过注意力机制充分利用它们之间的相互作用。此外，引入级联注意力掩码算法以更好地捕捉空中和地面视图之间的共视关系。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的公共基准数据集CVACT和CVUSA上的实验表明，该方法在地理定位任务上优于现有最先进的模型，取得了新的记录。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法通过结合生成技术和Transformer模型，有效提高了交叉视图地理定位的性能，为无人驾驶车辆在无GNSS信号条件下的导航提供了新的解决方案。

search_text: Co-visual pattern augmented generative transformer learning for automobile geo-localization 共同视觉模式增强了汽车地理定位的生成变压器学习 Geolocation is a fundamental component of route planning and navigation for unmanned vehicles, but GNSS-based geolocation fails under denial-of-service conditions. Cross-view geo-localization (CVGL), which aims to estimate the geographical location of the ground-level camera by matching against enormous geo-tagged aerial (\emph{e.g.}, satellite) images, has received lots of attention but remains extremely challenging due to the drastic appearance differences across aerial-ground views. In existing methods, global representations of different views are extracted primarily using Siamese-like architectures, but their interactive benefits are seldom taken into account. In this paper, we present a novel approach using cross-view knowledge generative techniques in combination with transformers, namely mutual generative transformer learning (MGTL), for CVGL. Specifically, by taking the initial representations produced by the backbone network, MGTL develops two separate generative sub-modules -- one for aerial-aware knowledge generation from ground-view semantics and vice versa -- and fully exploits the entirely mutual benefits through the attention mechanism. Moreover, to better capture the co-visual relationships between aerial and ground views, we introduce a cascaded attention masking algorithm to further boost accuracy. Extensive experiments on challenging public benchmarks, \emph{i.e.}, {CVACT} and {CVUSA}, demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method which sets new records compared with the existing state-of-the-art models. 地理定位是无人驾驶车辆路线规划和导航的基本组成部分，但基于 GNSS 的地理定位在拒绝服务条件下会失败。跨视图地理定位（CVGL）旨在通过与大量带有地理标记的航空（\emph{例如，卫星）图像进行匹配来估计地面摄像机的地理位置，它受到了广泛的关注，但由于空中与地面视图之间的巨大外观差异，仍然极具挑战性。在现有的方法中，主要使用类似暹罗的架构来提取不同视图的全局表示，但很少考虑它们的交互优势。在本文中，我们提出了一种将跨视图知识生成技术与 Transformer 相结合的新方法，即用于 CVGL 的互生成式 Transformer 学习（MGTL）。具体来说，通过采用主干网络产生的初始表示，MGTL 开发了两个独立的生成子模块——一个用于从地面视图语义生成空中感知知识，反之亦然——并通过注意力机制充分利用完全互惠互利。此外，为了更好地捕捉空中和地面视图之间的共同视觉关系，我们引入了级联注意掩蔽算法以进一步提高准确性。对具有挑战性的公共基准 \emph{i.e.}、{CVACT} 和 {CVUSA} 进行的广泛实验证明了所提出方法的有效性，与现有的最先进模型相比，该方法创造了新记录。 本文提出了一种结合交叉视图知识生成技术和Transformer的方法，用于提高无人驾驶车辆在无GNSS信号条件下的地理定位精度。 Jianwei Zhao,Qiang Zhai,Pengbo Zhao,Rui Huang,Hong Cheng cs.CV

authors_text: Dong Yao,Zhou Zhao,Shengyu Zhang,Jieming Zhu,Yudong Zhu,Rui Zhang,Xiuqiang He
title: Contrastive Learning with Positive-Negative Frame Mask for Music Representation
title_zh: 用于音乐表示的正负框架掩模的对比学习
abstract: Self-supervised learning, especially contrastive learning, has made an outstanding contribution to the development of many deep learning research fields. Recently, researchers in the acoustic signal processing field noticed its success and leveraged contrastive learning for better music representation. Typically, existing approaches maximize the similarity between two distorted audio segments sampled from the same music. In other words, they ensure a semantic agreement at the music level. However, those coarse-grained methods neglect some inessential or noisy elements at the frame level, which may be detrimental to the model to learn the effective representation of music. Towards this end, this paper proposes a novel Positive-nEgative frame mask for Music Representation based on the contrastive learning framework, abbreviated as PEMR. Concretely, PEMR incorporates a Positive-Negative Mask Generation module, which leverages transformer blocks to generate frame masks on the Log-Mel spectrogram. We can generate self-augmented negative and positive samples by masking important components or inessential components, respectively. We devise a novel contrastive learning objective to accommodate both self-augmented positives/negatives sampled from the same music. We conduct experiments on four public datasets. The experimental results of two music-related downstream tasks, music classification, and cover song identification, demonstrate the generalization ability and transferability of music representation learned by PEMR.
summary: Self-supervised learning, especially contrastive learning, has made an outstanding contribution to the development of many deep learning research fields. Recently, researchers in the acoustic signal processing field noticed its success and leveraged contrastive learning for better music representation. Typically, existing approaches maximize the similarity between two distorted audio segments sampled from the same music. In other words, they ensure a semantic agreement at the music level. However, those coarse-grained methods neglect some inessential or noisy elements at the frame level, which may be detrimental to the model to learn the effective representation of music. Towards this end, this paper proposes a novel Positive-nEgative frame mask for Music Representation based on the contrastive learning framework, abbreviated as PEMR. Concretely, PEMR incorporates a Positive-Negative Mask Generation module, which leverages transformer blocks to generate frame masks on the Log-Mel spectrogram. We can generate self-augmented negative and positive samples by masking important components or inessential components, respectively. We devise a novel contrastive learning objective to accommodate both self-augmented positives/negatives sampled from the same music. We conduct experiments on four public datasets. The experimental results of two music-related downstream tasks, music classification, and cover song identification, demonstrate the generalization ability and transferability of music representation learned by PEMR.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习，特别是对比学习，为许多深度学习研究领域的发展做出了突出的贡献。最近，声学信号处理领域的研究人员注意到了它的成功，并利用对比学习来更好地表达音乐。通常，现有方法最大化从同一音乐采样的两个失真音频片段之间的相似性。换句话说，它们确保了音乐层面的语义一致性。然而，这些粗粒度的方法忽略了帧级别的一些不重要或噪声的元素，这可能不利于模型学习音乐的有效表示。为此，本文提出了一种基于对比学习框架的新型音乐表示正负框架掩模，简称PEMR。具体而言，PEMR 包含正负掩码生成模块，该模块利用变压器块在 Log-Mel 频谱图上生成帧掩码。我们可以通过分别屏蔽重要组件或非重要组件来生成自我增强的负样本和正样本。我们设计了一种新颖的对比学习目标，以适应从同一音乐中采样的自我增强的积极/消极。我们在四个公共数据集上进行了实验。音乐分类和翻唱歌曲识别这两个与音乐相关的下游任务的实验结果证明了 PEMR 学习的音乐表示的泛化能力和可迁移性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习框架的正负帧掩码方法（PEMR），用于改进音乐表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐表示方法仅关注音乐级别的语义一致性，忽视了帧级别噪声或无关元素对模型学习的影响。
AI.method: 设计正负帧掩码生成模块，利用Transformer块在Log-Mel频谱图上生成掩码，通过掩码重要成分或无关成分生成自增强正负样本，并构建新型对比学习目标。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集上进行音乐分类和歌曲封面识别任务验证，证明PEMR学习的音乐表示具有良好的泛化性和迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: PEMR通过引入帧级别掩码机制有效提升了音乐表示质量，为音乐自监督学习提供了新思路。

search_text: Contrastive Learning with Positive-Negative Frame Mask for Music Representation 用于音乐表示的正负框架掩模的对比学习 Self-supervised learning, especially contrastive learning, has made an outstanding contribution to the development of many deep learning research fields. Recently, researchers in the acoustic signal processing field noticed its success and leveraged contrastive learning for better music representation. Typically, existing approaches maximize the similarity between two distorted audio segments sampled from the same music. In other words, they ensure a semantic agreement at the music level. However, those coarse-grained methods neglect some inessential or noisy elements at the frame level, which may be detrimental to the model to learn the effective representation of music. Towards this end, this paper proposes a novel Positive-nEgative frame mask for Music Representation based on the contrastive learning framework, abbreviated as PEMR. Concretely, PEMR incorporates a Positive-Negative Mask Generation module, which leverages transformer blocks to generate frame masks on the Log-Mel spectrogram. We can generate self-augmented negative and positive samples by masking important components or inessential components, respectively. We devise a novel contrastive learning objective to accommodate both self-augmented positives/negatives sampled from the same music. We conduct experiments on four public datasets. authors_text: Jizhou Huang,Haifeng Wang,Yibo Sun,Yunsheng Shi,Zhengjie Huang,An Zhuo,Shikun Feng
title: ERNIE-GeoL: A Geography-and-Language Pre-trained Model and its Applications in Baidu Maps
title_zh: ERNIE-GeoL：地理和语言预训练模型及其在百度地图中的应用
abstract: Pre-trained models (PTMs) have become a fundamental backbone for downstream tasks in natural language processing and computer vision. Despite initial gains that were obtained by applying generic PTMs to geo-related tasks at Baidu Maps, a clear performance plateau over time was observed. One of the main reasons for this plateau is the lack of readily available geographic knowledge in generic PTMs. To address this problem, in this paper, we present ERNIE-GeoL, which is a geography-and-language pre-trained model designed and developed for improving the geo-related tasks at Baidu Maps. ERNIE-GeoL is elaborately designed to learn a universal representation of geography-language by pre-training on large-scale data generated from a heterogeneous graph that contains abundant geographic knowledge. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments conducted on large-scale real-world datasets demonstrate the superiority and effectiveness of ERNIE-GeoL. ERNIE-GeoL has already been deployed in production at Baidu Maps since April 2021, which significantly benefits the performance of various downstream tasks. This demonstrates that ERNIE-GeoL can serve as a fundamental backbone for a wide range of geo-related tasks.
summary: Pre-trained models (PTMs) have become a fundamental backbone for downstream tasks in natural language processing and computer vision. Despite initial gains that were obtained by applying generic PTMs to geo-related tasks at Baidu Maps, a clear performance plateau over time was observed. One of the main reasons for this plateau is the lack of readily available geographic knowledge in generic PTMs. To address this problem, in this paper, we present ERNIE-GeoL, which is a geography-and-language pre-trained model designed and developed for improving the geo-related tasks at Baidu Maps. ERNIE-GeoL is elaborately designed to learn a universal representation of geography-language by pre-training on large-scale data generated from a heterogeneous graph that contains abundant geographic knowledge. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments conducted on large-scale real-world datasets demonstrate the superiority and effectiveness of ERNIE-GeoL. ERNIE-GeoL has already been deployed in production at Baidu Maps since April 2021, which significantly benefits the performance of various downstream tasks. This demonstrates that ERNIE-GeoL can serve as a fundamental backbone for a wide range of geo-related tasks.
abstract_zh: 预训练模型 (PTM) 已成为自然语言处理和计算机视觉下游任务的基本支柱。尽管通过将通用 PTM 应用于百度地图的地理相关任务获得了初步收益，但随着时间的推移，我们观察到了明显的性能瓶颈。造成这种停滞状态的主要原因之一是通用 PTM 中缺乏现成的地理知识。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了 ERNIE-GeoL，这是一种地理和语言预训练模型，旨在改进百度地图上的地理相关任务。 ERNIE-GeoL 经过精心设计，通过对包含丰富地理知识的异构图生成的大规模数据进行预训练来学习地理语言的通用表示。在大规模现实世界数据集上进行的广泛的定量和定性实验证明了 ERNIE-GeoL 的优越性和有效性。自 2021 年 4 月起，ERNIE-GeoL 已在百度地图生产中部署，这显着提高了各种下游任务的性能。这表明 ERNIE-GeoL 可以作为广泛的地理相关任务的基本支柱。

AI.tldr: 提出ERNIE-GeoL地理-语言预训练模型，用于提升百度地图地理相关任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 通用预训练模型在地理任务中存在性能瓶颈，因缺乏地理知识表示能力。
AI.method: 基于异构图生成地理知识数据，预训练融合地理与语言表示的联合模型。
AI.result: 模型在百度地图实际部署后显著提升下游任务效果，实验验证其优越性。
AI.conclusion: ERNIE-GeoL为地理相关任务提供了有效的基础模型架构解决方案。

authors_text: Dietmar Jannach,Li Chen
title: Conversational Recommendation: A Grand AI Challenge
title_zh: 对话式推荐：人工智能的重大挑战
abstract: Animated avatars, which look and talk like humans, are iconic visions of the future of AI-powered systems. Through many sci-fi movies we are acquainted with the idea of speaking to such virtual personalities as if they were humans. Today, we talk more and more to machines like Apple's Siri, e.g., to ask them for the weather forecast. However, when asked for recommendations, e.g., for a restaurant to go to, the limitations of such devices quickly become obvious. They do not engage in a conversation to find out what we might prefer, they often do not provide explanations for what they recommend, and they may have difficulties remembering what was said one minute earlier. Conversational recommender systems promise to address these limitations. In this paper, we review existing approaches to build such systems, which developments we observe today, which challenges are still open and why the development of conversational recommenders represents one of the next grand challenges of AI.
summary: Animated avatars, which look and talk like humans, are iconic visions of the future of AI-powered systems. Through many sci-fi movies we are acquainted with the idea of speaking to such virtual personalities as if they were humans. Today, we talk more and more to machines like Apple's Siri, e.g., to ask them for the weather forecast. However, when asked for recommendations, e.g., for a restaurant to go to, the limitations of such devices quickly become obvious. They do not engage in a conversation to find out what we might prefer, they often do not provide explanations for what they recommend, and they may have difficulties remembering what was said one minute earlier. Conversational recommender systems promise to address these limitations. In this paper, we review existing approaches to build such systems, which developments we observe today, which challenges are still open and why the development of conversational recommenders represents one of the next grand challenges of AI.
abstract_zh: 动画化身看起来和说话都像人类，是人工智能驱动系统未来的标志性愿景。通过许多科幻电影，我们熟悉了与虚拟人物交谈的想法，就好像他们是人类一样。如今，我们越来越多地与苹果 Siri 等机器交谈，例如向它们询问天气预报。然而，当被要求提供建议时，例如去一家餐馆时，此类设备的局限性很快就会变得明显。他们不会通过对话来了解我们可能更喜欢什么，他们通常不会对他们的建议提供解释，而且他们可能很难记住一分钟前说过的话。对话式推荐系统有望解决这些限制。在本文中，我们回顾了构建此类系统的现有方法，我们今天观察到了哪些发展，哪些挑战仍然存在，以及为什么对话式推荐系统的发展代表了人工智能的下一个重大挑战之一。

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了对话推荐系统的研究现状，分析其面临的挑战，并强调其作为人工智能领域重大挑战的意义。
AI.motivation: 当前语音助手在推荐任务中存在对话能力不足、缺乏解释性和上下文记忆的问题，亟需更智能的对话推荐系统。
AI.method: 通过文献综述和案例分析，总结现有对话推荐系统的方法，梳理技术发展现状并识别核心挑战。
AI.result: 现有系统在对话理解、多轮交互和个性化推荐方面存在局限，需解决上下文建模、用户意图识别及可解释性等关键技术难题。
AI.conclusion: 对话推荐系统是人工智能领域的重要前沿方向，需跨学科协作突破技术瓶颈以实现更自然的交互体验。

search_text: Conversational Recommendation: A Grand AI Challenge 对话式推荐：人工智能的重大挑战 Animated avatars, which look and talk like humans, are iconic visions of the future of AI-powered systems. Through many sci-fi movies we are acquainted with the idea of speaking to such virtual personalities as if they were humans. Today, we talk more and more to machines like Apple's Siri, e.g., to ask them for the weather forecast. However, when asked for recommendations, e.g., for a restaurant to go to, the limitations of such devices quickly become obvious. They do not engage in a conversation to find out what we might prefer, they often do not provide explanations for what they recommend, and they may have difficulties remembering what was said one minute earlier. Conversational recommender systems promise to address these limitations. In this paper, we review existing approaches to build such systems, which developments we observe today, which challenges are still open and why the development of conversational recommenders represents one of the next grand challenges of AI. 动画化身看起来和说话都像人类，是人工智能驱动系统未来的标志性愿景。通过许多科幻电影，我们熟悉了与虚拟人物交谈的想法，就好像他们是人类一样。如今，我们越来越多地与苹果 Siri 等机器交谈，例如向它们询问天气预报。然而，当被要求提供建议时，例如去一家餐馆时，此类设备的局限性很快就会变得明显。他们不会通过对话来了解我们可能更喜欢什么，他们通常不会对他们的建议提供解释，而且他们可能很难记住一分钟前说过的话。对话式推荐系统有望解决这些限制。在本文中，我们回顾了构建此类系统的现有方法，我们今天观察到了哪些发展，哪些挑战仍然存在，以及为什么对话式推荐系统的发展代表了人工智能的下一个重大挑战之一。 本文回顾了对话推荐系统的研究现状，分析其面临的挑战，并强调其作为人工智能领域重大挑战的意义。 Dietmar Jannach,Li Chen cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.IR

authors_text: Soumya Suvra Ghosal,Yifei Ming,Yixuan Li
title: Are Vision Transformers Robust to Spurious Correlations?
title_zh: 视觉变换器对虚假相关性是否具有鲁棒性？
abstract: Deep neural networks may be susceptible to learning spurious correlations that hold on average but not in atypical test samples. As with the recent emergence of vision transformer (ViT) models, it remains underexplored how spurious correlations are manifested in such architectures. In this paper, we systematically investigate the robustness of vision transformers to spurious correlations on three challenging benchmark datasets and compare their performance with popular CNNs. Our study reveals that when pre-trained on a sufficiently large dataset, ViT models are more robust to spurious correlations than CNNs. Key to their success is the ability to generalize better from the examples where spurious correlations do not hold. Further, we perform extensive ablations and experiments to understand the role of the self-attention mechanism in providing robustness under spuriously correlated environments. We hope that our work will inspire future research on further understanding the robustness of ViT models.
summary: Deep neural networks may be susceptible to learning spurious correlations that hold on average but not in atypical test samples. As with the recent emergence of vision transformer (ViT) models, it remains underexplored how spurious correlations are manifested in such architectures. In this paper, we systematically investigate the robustness of vision transformers to spurious correlations on three challenging benchmark datasets and compare their performance with popular CNNs. Our study reveals that when pre-trained on a sufficiently large dataset, ViT models are more robust to spurious correlations than CNNs. Key to their success is the ability to generalize better from the examples where spurious correlations do not hold. Further, we perform extensive ablations and experiments to understand the role of the self-attention mechanism in providing robustness under spuriously correlated environments. We hope that our work will inspire future research on further understanding the robustness of ViT models.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络可能容易受到学习虚假相关性的影响，这些相关性在平均情况下成立，但在非典型测试样本中却不然。与最近出现的视觉变换器 (ViT) 模型一样，人们对此类架构中虚假相关性如何表现的研究仍未充分。在本文中，我们系统地研究了视觉 Transformer 在三个具有挑战性的基准数据集上对虚假相关性的鲁棒性，并将其性能与流行的 CNN 进行了比较。我们的研究表明，当在足够大的数据集上进行预训练时，ViT 模型对于虚假相关性比 CNN 更稳健。他们成功的关键是能够从虚假相关性不成立的例子中更好地进行概括。此外，我们进行了广泛的消融和实验，以了解自注意力机制在虚假相关环境下提供鲁棒性方面的作用。我们希望我们的工作能够激发未来的研究，进一步了解 ViT 模型的稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究视觉Transformer（ViT）模型对虚假相关性的鲁棒性，并与CNN进行比较，分析其鲁棒性的关键因素。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络可能因学习虚假相关性导致性能下降，但ViT模型在此方面的鲁棒性尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 在三个具有挑战性的数据集上，通过对比实验分析ViT与CNN的性能差异，并进行自注意力机制的消融实验。
AI.result: 预训练于大规模数据集的ViT模型比CNN更鲁棒，其优势在于从无虚假相关性的样本中更好推广；自注意力机制对此有重要作用。
AI.conclusion: ViT模型在应对虚假相关性时表现更优，未来研究可进一步探索其鲁棒性的内在机制。

authors_text: Junyoung Byun,Seungju Cho,Myung-Joon Kwon,Hee-Seon Kim,Changick Kim
title: Improving the Transferability of Targeted Adversarial Examples through Object-Based Diverse Input
title_zh: 通过基于对象的多样化输入提高目标对抗样本的可迁移性
abstract: The transferability of adversarial examples allows the deception on black-box models, and transfer-based targeted attacks have attracted a lot of interest due to their practical applicability. To maximize the transfer success rate, adversarial examples should avoid overfitting to the source model, and image augmentation is one of the primary approaches for this. However, prior works utilize simple image transformations such as resizing, which limits input diversity. To tackle this limitation, we propose the object-based diverse input (ODI) method that draws an adversarial image on a 3D object and induces the rendered image to be classified as the target class. Our motivation comes from the humans' superior perception of an image printed on a 3D object. If the image is clear enough, humans can recognize the image content in a variety of viewing conditions. Likewise, if an adversarial example looks like the target class to the model, the model should also classify the rendered image of the 3D object as the target class. The ODI method effectively diversifies the input by leveraging an ensemble of multiple source objects and randomizing viewing conditions. In our experimental results on the ImageNet-Compatible dataset, this method boosts the average targeted attack success rate from 28.3% to 47.0% compared to the state-of-the-art methods. We also demonstrate the applicability of the ODI method to adversarial examples on the face verification task and its superior performance improvement. Our code is available at https://github.com/dreamflake/ODI.
summary: The transferability of adversarial examples allows the deception on black-box models, and transfer-based targeted attacks have attracted a lot of interest due to their practical applicability. To maximize the transfer success rate, adversarial examples should avoid overfitting to the source model, and image augmentation is one of the primary approaches for this. However, prior works utilize simple image transformations such as resizing, which limits input diversity. To tackle this limitation, we propose the object-based diverse input (ODI) method that draws an adversarial image on a 3D object and induces the rendered image to be classified as the target class. Our motivation comes from the humans' superior perception of an image printed on a 3D object. If the image is clear enough, humans can recognize the image content in a variety of viewing conditions. Likewise, if an adversarial example looks like the target class to the model, the model should also classify the rendered image of the 3D object as the target class. The ODI method effectively diversifies the input by leveraging an ensemble of multiple source objects and randomizing viewing conditions. In our experimental results on the ImageNet-Compatible dataset, this method boosts the average targeted attack success rate from 28.3% to 47.0% compared to the state-of-the-art methods. We also demonstrate the applicability of the ODI method to adversarial examples on the face verification task and its superior performance improvement. Our code is available at https://github.com/dreamflake/ODI.
abstract_zh: 对抗样本的可转移性允许对黑盒模型进行欺骗，而基于转移的针对性攻击由于其实际适用性而引起了人们的广泛兴趣。为了最大限度地提高传输成功率，对抗性示例应避免与源模型过度拟合，而图像增强是实现这一目标的主要方法之一。然而，先前的工作利用简单的图像变换（例如调整大小），这限制了输入多样性。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了基于对象的多样化输入（ODI）方法，该方法在 3D 对象上绘制对抗性图像，并导致渲染图像被分类为目标类。我们的动机来自于人类对打印在 3D 物体上的图像的卓越感知。如果图像足够清晰，人类就可以在各种观看条件下识别图像内容。同样，如果对抗性示例看起来像模型的目标类，则模型还应将 3D 对象的渲染图像分类为目标类。 ODI 方法通过利用多个源对象的集合和随机化观看条件，有效地使输入多样化。在我们在 ImageNet-Compatible 数据集上的实验结果中，与最先进的方法相比，该方法将平均目标攻击成功率从 28.3% 提高到 47.0%。我们还展示了 ODI 方法在人脸验证任务的对抗性示例中的适用性及其卓越的性能改进。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/dreamflake/ODI 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于3D物体的多样化输入方法（ODI），以提高目标对抗样本在黑盒模型中的可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 人类对3D物体上印刷图像的感知具有鲁棒性，若对抗样本在3D物体上渲染后能被模型识别为目标类，则可提升迁移成功率。
AI.method: 通过在多个3D物体表面绘制对抗图像，并随机化视角条件，利用物体集合生成多样化输入以避免源模型过拟合。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-Compatible数据集上，目标攻击成功率从28.3%提升至47.0%，并在人脸识别任务中验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: ODI方法通过3D物体渲染和视角随机化显著提升对抗样本迁移性，为黑盒攻击提供了新思路。
