result: 在ImageNet-Compatible数据集上，目标攻击成功率从28.3%提升至47.0%，并在人脸识别任务中验证了有效性。
conclusion: ODI方法通过3D物体渲染和视角随机化显著提升对抗样本迁移性，为黑盒攻击提供了新思路。
search_text: Improving the Transferability of Targeted Adversarial Examples through Object-Based Diverse Input 通过基于对象的多样化输入提高目标对抗样本的可迁移性 The transferability of adversarial examples allows the deception on black-box models, and transfer-based targeted attacks have attracted a lot of interest due to their practical applicability. To maximize the transfer success rate, adversarial examples should avoid overfitting to the source model, and image augmentation is one of the primary approaches for this. However, prior works utilize simple image transformations such as resizing, which limits input diversity. To tackle this limitation, we propose the object-based diverse input (ODI) method that draws an adversarial image on a 3D object and induces the rendered image to be classified as the target class. Our motivation comes from the humans' superior perception of an image printed on a 3D object. If the image is clear enough, humans can recognize the image content in a variety of viewing conditions. Likewise, if an adversarial example looks like the target class to the model, the model should also classify the rendered image of the 3D object as the target class. The ODI method effectively diversifies the input by leveraging an ensemble of multiple source objects and randomizing viewing conditions. In our experimental results on the ImageNet-Compatible dataset, this method boosts the average targeted attack success rate from 28.3% to 47.0% compared to the state-of-the-art methods. We also demonstrate the applicability of the ODI method to adversarial examples on the face verification task and its superior performance improvement. Our code is available at https://github.com/dreamflake/ODI. 对抗样本的可转移性允许对黑盒模型进行欺骗，而基于转移的针对性攻击由于其实际适用性而引起了人们的广泛兴趣。为了最大限度地提高传输成功率，对抗性示例应避免与源模型过度拟合，而图像增强是实现这一目标的主要方法之一。然而，先前的工作利用简单的图像变换（例如调整大小），这限制了输入多样性。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了基于对象的多样化输入（ODI）方法，该方法在 3D 对象上绘制对抗性图像，并导致渲染图像被分类为目标类。我们的动机来自于人类对打印在 3D 物体上的图像的卓越感知。如果图像足够清晰，人类就可以在各种观看条件下识别图像内容。同样，如果对抗性示例看起来像模型的目标类，则模型还应将 3D 对象的渲染图像分类为目标类。 ODI 方法通过利用多个源对象的集合和随机化观看条件，有效地使输入多样化。在我们在 ImageNet-Compatible 数据集上的实验结果中，与最先进的方法相比，该方法将平均目标攻击成功率从 28.3% 提高到 47.0%。我们还展示了 ODI 方法在人脸验证任务的对抗性示例中的适用性及其卓越的性能改进。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/dreamflake/ODI 获取。 本文提出一种基于3D物体的多样化输入方法（ODI），以提高目标对抗样本在黑盒模型中的可迁移性。 Junyoung Byun,Seungju Cho,Myung-Joon Kwon,Hee-Seon Kim,Changick Kim cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Guang Yang,Juan Cao,Qiang Sheng,Peng Qi,Xirong Li,Jintao Li
title: DRAG: Dynamic Region-Aware GCN for Privacy-Leaking Image Detection
title_zh: DRAG：用于隐私泄露图像检测的动态区域感知 GCN
abstract: The daily practice of sharing images on social media raises a severe issue about privacy leakage. To address the issue, privacy-leaking image detection is studied recently, with the goal to automatically identify images that may leak privacy. Recent advance on this task benefits from focusing on crucial objects via pretrained object detectors and modeling their correlation. However, these methods have two limitations: 1) they neglect other important elements like scenes, textures, and objects beyond the capacity of pretrained object detectors; 2) the correlation among objects is fixed, but a fixed correlation is not appropriate for all the images. To overcome the limitations, we propose the Dynamic Region-Aware Graph Convolutional Network (DRAG) that dynamically finds out crucial regions including objects and other important elements, and models their correlation adaptively for each input image. To find out crucial regions, we cluster spatially-correlated feature channels into several region-aware feature maps. Further, we dynamically model the correlation with the self-attention mechanism and explore the interaction among the regions with a graph convolutional network. The DRAG achieved an accuracy of 87% on the largest dataset for privacy-leaking image detection, which is 10 percentage points higher than the state of the art. The further case study demonstrates that it found out crucial regions containing not only objects but other important elements like textures.
summary: The daily practice of sharing images on social media raises a severe issue about privacy leakage. To address the issue, privacy-leaking image detection is studied recently, with the goal to automatically identify images that may leak privacy. Recent advance on this task benefits from focusing on crucial objects via pretrained object detectors and modeling their correlation. However, these methods have two limitations: 1) they neglect other important elements like scenes, textures, and objects beyond the capacity of pretrained object detectors; 2) the correlation among objects is fixed, but a fixed correlation is not appropriate for all the images. To overcome the limitations, we propose the Dynamic Region-Aware Graph Convolutional Network (DRAG) that dynamically finds out crucial regions including objects and other important elements, and models their correlation adaptively for each input image. To find out crucial regions, we cluster spatially-correlated feature channels into several region-aware feature maps. Further, we dynamically model the correlation with the self-attention mechanism and explore the interaction among the regions with a graph convolutional network. The DRAG achieved an accuracy of 87% on the largest dataset for privacy-leaking image detection, which is 10 percentage points higher than the state of the art. The further case study demonstrates that it found out crucial regions containing not only objects but other important elements like textures.
abstract_zh: 在社交媒体上分享图像的日常做法引发了隐私泄露的严重问题。为了解决这个问题，最近研究了隐私泄露图像检测，目标是自动识别可能泄露隐私的图像。这项任务的最新进展得益于通过预训练的对象检测器关注关键对象并对其相关性进行建模。然而，这些方法有两个局限性：1）它们忽略了超出预训练对象检测器能力的其他重要元素，例如场景、纹理和对象； 2）物体之间的相关性是固定的，但固定的相关性并不适合所有图像。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了动态区域感知图卷积网络（DRAG），它动态地找出包括对象和其他重要元素在内的关键区域，并为每个输入图像自适应地建模它们的相关性。为了找出关键区域，我们将空间相关的特征通道聚类成几个区域感知的特征图。此外，我们动态地对自注意力机制的相关性进行建模，并通过图卷积网络探索区域之间的交互。 DRAG 在最大的隐私泄露图像检测数据集上实现了 87% 的准确率，比现有技术高出 10 个百分点。进一步的案例研究表明，它发现了不仅包含对象还包含其他重要元素（例如纹理）的关键区域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态区域感知图卷积网络（DRAG），用于检测可能泄露隐私的图像，通过动态识别关键区域并建模其自适应关联。
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽视场景、纹理等非物体元素，且物体间固定关联难以适应所有图像，导致隐私泄露检测效果受限。
AI.method: 通过空间相关特征通道聚类生成区域感知特征图，结合自注意力机制与图卷积网络动态建模区域间交互关系。
AI.result: 在最大数据集上达到87%准确率，较现有最佳方法提升10个百分点，案例验证其能识别物体及纹理等非物体关键元素。
AI.conclusion: DRAG通过动态区域感知与自适应关联建模，有效提升隐私泄露图像检测性能，为隐私保护提供新思路。

authors_text: Takahiro Maeda,Norimichi Ukita
title: MotionAug: Augmentation with Physical Correction for Human Motion Prediction
title_zh: MotionAug：通过物理校正增强人体运动预测
abstract: This paper presents a motion data augmentation scheme incorporating motion synthesis encouraging diversity and motion correction imposing physical plausibility. This motion synthesis consists of our modified Variational AutoEncoder (VAE) and Inverse Kinematics (IK). In this VAE, our proposed sampling-near-samples method generates various valid motions even with insufficient training motion data. Our IK-based motion synthesis method allows us to generate a variety of motions semi-automatically. Since these two schemes generate unrealistic artifacts in the synthesized motions, our motion correction rectifies them. This motion correction scheme consists of imitation learning with physics simulation and subsequent motion debiasing. For this imitation learning, we propose the PD-residual force that significantly accelerates the training process. Furthermore, our motion debiasing successfully offsets the motion bias induced by imitation learning to maximize the effect of augmentation. As a result, our method outperforms previous noise-based motion augmentation methods by a large margin on both Recurrent Neural Network-based and Graph Convolutional Network-based human motion prediction models. The code is available at https://github.com/meaten/MotionAug.
summary: This paper presents a motion data augmentation scheme incorporating motion synthesis encouraging diversity and motion correction imposing physical plausibility. This motion synthesis consists of our modified Variational AutoEncoder (VAE) and Inverse Kinematics (IK). In this VAE, our proposed sampling-near-samples method generates various valid motions even with insufficient training motion data. Our IK-based motion synthesis method allows us to generate a variety of motions semi-automatically. Since these two schemes generate unrealistic artifacts in the synthesized motions, our motion correction rectifies them. This motion correction scheme consists of imitation learning with physics simulation and subsequent motion debiasing. For this imitation learning, we propose the PD-residual force that significantly accelerates the training process. Furthermore, our motion debiasing successfully offsets the motion bias induced by imitation learning to maximize the effect of augmentation. As a result, our method outperforms previous noise-based motion augmentation methods by a large margin on both Recurrent Neural Network-based and Graph Convolutional Network-based human motion prediction models. The code is available at https://github.com/meaten/MotionAug.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种运动数据增强方案，结合了鼓励多样性的运动合成和强加物理合理性的运动校正。该运动合成由我们改进的变分自动编码器 (VAE) 和逆运动学 (IK) 组成。在这个 VAE 中，我们提出的采样附近样本方法即使在训练运动数据不足的情况下也能生成各种有效的运动。我们基于 IK 的运动合成方法使我们能够半自动生成各种运动。由于这两种方案在合成运动中产生不切实际的伪影，因此我们的运动校正会纠正它们。该运动校正方案包括物理模拟的模仿学习和随后的运动去偏置。对于这种模仿学习，我们提出了 PD 残余力，可以显着加速训练过程。此外，我们的运动去偏差成功抵消了模仿学习引起的运动偏差，以最大限度地提高增强效果。因此，我们的方法在基于循环神经网络和基于图卷积网络的人体运动预测模型上都大大优于以前的基于噪声的运动增强方法。该代码可在 https://github.com/meaten/MotionAug 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合运动合成与物理修正的运动数据增强方法MotionAug，用于提升人体运动预测模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于噪声的运动增强方法生成的运动数据缺乏物理合理性，难以满足复杂运动预测任务的需求。
AI.method: 方法包含两阶段：1) 使用改进的VAE和逆运动学（IK）生成多样化运动数据；2) 通过物理仿真模仿学习与运动去偏置（debiasing）修正非现实 artifacts，其中PD残差力加速训练过程。
AI.result: 在基于循环神经网络和图卷积网络的运动预测模型上，该方法显著优于现有噪声增强方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合运动合成多样性与物理合理性修正，MotionAug有效提升了运动预测模型的泛化能力与生成质量。

As a result, our method outperforms previous noise-based motion augmentation methods by a large margin on both Recurrent Neural Network-based and Graph Convolutional Network-based human motion prediction models. The code is available at https://github.com/meaten/MotionAug. 本文提出了一种运动数据增强方案，结合了鼓励多样性的运动合成和强加物理合理性的运动校正。该运动合成由我们改进的变分自动编码器 (VAE) 和逆运动学 (IK) 组成。在这个 VAE 中，我们提出的采样附近样本方法即使在训练运动数据不足的情况下也能生成各种有效的运动。我们基于 IK 的运动合成方法使我们能够半自动生成各种运动。由于这两种方案在合成运动中产生不切实际的伪影，因此我们的运动校正会纠正它们。该运动校正方案包括物理模拟的模仿学习和随后的运动去偏置。对于这种模仿学习，我们提出了 PD 残余力，可以显着加速训练过程。此外，我们的运动去偏差成功抵消了模仿学习引起的运动偏差，以最大限度地提高增强效果。因此，我们的方法在基于循环神经网络和基于图卷积网络的人体运动预测模型上都大大优于以前的基于噪声的运动增强方法。该代码可在 https://github.com/meaten/MotionAug 获取。 本文提出一种结合运动合成与物理修正的运动数据增强方法MotionAug，用于提升人体运动预测模型的性能。 Takahiro Maeda,Norimichi Ukita cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhao Han,Boyoung Kim,Holly A. Yanco,Tom Williams
title: Causal Robot Communication Inspired by Observational Learning Insights
title_zh: 受观察学习见解启发的因果机器人通信
comment: Appears in Proceedings of the AAAI SSS-22 Symposium "Closing the Assessment Loop: Communicating Proficiency and Intent in Human-Robot Teaming". Paper webpage: https://zhaohanphd.com/aaai-sss22/
comments: Appears in Proceedings of the AAAI SSS-22 Symposium "Closing the Assessment Loop: Communicating Proficiency and Intent in Human-Robot Teaming". Paper webpage: https://zhaohanphd.com/aaai-sss22/
abstract: Autonomous robots must communicate about their decisions to gain trust and acceptance. When doing so, robots must determine which actions are causal, i.e., which directly give rise to the desired outcome, so that these actions can be included in explanations. In behavior learning in psychology, this sort of reasoning during an action sequence has been studied extensively in the context of imitation learning. And yet, these techniques and empirical insights are rarely applied to human-robot interaction (HRI). In this work, we discuss the relevance of behavior learning insights for robot intent communication, and present the first application of these insights for a robot to efficiently communicate its intent by selectively explaining the causal actions in an action sequence.
summary: Autonomous robots must communicate about their decisions to gain trust and acceptance. When doing so, robots must determine which actions are causal, i.e., which directly give rise to the desired outcome, so that these actions can be included in explanations. In behavior learning in psychology, this sort of reasoning during an action sequence has been studied extensively in the context of imitation learning. And yet, these techniques and empirical insights are rarely applied to human-robot interaction (HRI). In this work, we discuss the relevance of behavior learning insights for robot intent communication, and present the first application of these insights for a robot to efficiently communicate its intent by selectively explaining the causal actions in an action sequence.
abstract_zh: 自主机器人必须就其决定进行沟通，以获得信任和接受。这样做时，机器人必须确定哪些行为是因果行为，即哪些行为直接导致期望的结果，以便这些行为可以包含在解释中。在心理学的行为学习中，在模仿学习的背景下，对动作序列期间的这种推理进行了广泛的研究。然而，这些技术和经验见解很少应用于人机交互（HRI）。在这项工作中，我们讨论了行为学习见解与机器人意图通信的相关性，并首次将这些见解应用于机器人，通过有选择地解释动作序列中的因果动作来有效地传达其意图。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何借鉴心理学中的行为学习理论，使机器人能够通过选择性解释因果动作序列来有效沟通其意图。
AI.motivation: 自主机器人需通过解释决策中的因果动作以建立信任，但现有研究较少将心理学中的观察学习理论应用于人机交互领域。
AI.method: 基于心理学中的模仿学习理论，提出通过识别并选择性解释因果动作序列来实现机器人意图沟通的方法。
AI.result: 首次将行为学习理论应用于机器人通信，实现了通过因果动作解释提升意图传达效率的验证。
AI.conclusion: 借鉴观察学习理论的因果动作解释方法，为人机交互中的机器人意图沟通提供了有效且可信的解决方案。

authors_text: Shintaro Yamamoto,Hirokatsu Kataoka,Ryota Suzuki,Seitaro Shinagawa,Shigeo Morishima
title: Community-Driven Comprehensive Scientific Paper Summarization: Insight from cvpaper.challenge
title_zh: 社区驱动的综合科学论文摘要：来自 cvpaper.challenge 的见解
abstract: The present paper introduces a group activity involving writing summaries of conference proceedings by volunteer participants. The rapid increase in scientific papers is a heavy burden for researchers, especially non-native speakers, who need to survey scientific literature. To alleviate this problem, we organized a group of non-native English speakers to write summaries of papers presented at a computer vision conference to share the knowledge of the papers read by the group. We summarized a total of 2,000 papers presented at the Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition, a top-tier conference on computer vision, in 2019 and 2020. We quantitatively analyzed participants' selection regarding which papers they read among the many available papers. The experimental results suggest that we can summarize a wide range of papers without asking participants to read papers unrelated to their interests.
summary: The present paper introduces a group activity involving writing summaries of conference proceedings by volunteer participants. The rapid increase in scientific papers is a heavy burden for researchers, especially non-native speakers, who need to survey scientific literature. To alleviate this problem, we organized a group of non-native English speakers to write summaries of papers presented at a computer vision conference to share the knowledge of the papers read by the group. We summarized a total of 2,000 papers presented at the Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition, a top-tier conference on computer vision, in 2019 and 2020. We quantitatively analyzed participants' selection regarding which papers they read among the many available papers. The experimental results suggest that we can summarize a wide range of papers without asking participants to read papers unrelated to their interests.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一项由志愿者参与者撰写会议记录摘要的小组活动。科学论文的快速增加对于需要调查科学文献的研究人员，尤其是非母语人士来说是一个沉重的负担。为了缓解这个问题，我们组织了一群非英语母语人士撰写计算机视觉会议上发表的论文摘要，以分享小组阅读的论文知识。我们总结了 2019 年和 2020 年计算机视觉顶级会议计算机视觉与模式识别会议上发表的总共 2000 篇论文。我们定量分析了参与者在众多可用论文中阅读哪些论文的选择。实验结果表明，我们可以总结广泛的论文，而无需要求参与者阅读与其兴趣无关的论文。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个由志愿者参与的社区驱动科学论文摘要项目，通过非英语母语者为计算机视觉会议论文撰写摘要以减轻研究人员负担。
AI.motivation: 科学论文数量激增给研究人员（尤其是非英语母语者）带来沉重负担，需要高效的知识共享方式。
AI.method: 组织非英语母语志愿者对CVPR 2019-2020的2000篇论文进行摘要撰写，并分析参与者论文选择偏好。
AI.result: 实验表明通过兴趣驱动机制可有效覆盖广泛论文范围，无需强制阅读无关论文即可完成高质量摘要。
AI.conclusion: 社区协作模式结合兴趣驱动机制能有效解决科学文献阅读负担问题，促进知识共享与传播。

authors_text: Majid Ramezani,Mohammad-Reza Feizi-Derakhshi,Mohammad-Ali Balafar
title: Knowledge Graph-Enabled Text-Based Automatic Personality Prediction
title_zh: 基于知识图谱的基于文本的自动性格预测
comment: This is a preprint of an article published in "Computational Intelligence and Neuroscience"
comments: This is a preprint of an article published in "Computational Intelligence and Neuroscience"
abstract: How people think, feel, and behave, primarily is a representation of their personality characteristics. By being conscious of personality characteristics of individuals whom we are dealing with or decided to deal with, one can competently ameliorate the relationship, regardless of its type. With the rise of Internet-based communication infrastructures (social networks, forums, etc.), a considerable amount of human communications take place there. The most prominent tool in such communications, is the language in written and spoken form that adroitly encodes all those essential personality characteristics of individuals. Text-based Automatic Personality Prediction (APP) is the automated forecasting of the personality of individuals based on the generated/exchanged text contents. This paper presents a novel knowledge graph-enabled approach to text-based APP that relies on the Big Five personality traits. To this end, given a text a knowledge graph which is a set of interlinked descriptions of concepts, was built through matching the input text's concepts with DBpedia knowledge base entries. Then, due to achieving more powerful representation the graph was enriched with the DBpedia ontology, NRC Emotion Intensity Lexicon, and MRC psycholinguistic database information. Afterwards, the knowledge graph which is now a knowledgeable alternative for the input text was embedded to yield an embedding matrix. Finally, to perform personality predictions the resulting embedding matrix was fed to four suggested deep learning models independently, which are based on convolutional neural network (CNN), simple recurrent neural network (RNN), long short term memory (LSTM) and bidirectional long short term memory (BiLSTM). The results indicated a considerable improvements in prediction accuracies in all of the suggested classifiers.
summary: How people think, feel, and behave, primarily is a representation of their personality characteristics. By being conscious of personality characteristics of individuals whom we are dealing with or decided to deal with, one can competently ameliorate the relationship, regardless of its type. With the rise of Internet-based communication infrastructures (social networks, forums, etc.), a considerable amount of human communications take place there. The most prominent tool in such communications, is the language in written and spoken form that adroitly encodes all those essential personality characteristics of individuals. Text-based Automatic Personality Prediction (APP) is the automated forecasting of the personality of individuals based on the generated/exchanged text contents. This paper presents a novel knowledge graph-enabled approach to text-based APP that relies on the Big Five personality traits. To this end, given a text a knowledge graph which is a set of interlinked descriptions of concepts, was built through matching the input text's concepts with DBpedia knowledge base entries. Then, due to achieving more powerful representation the graph was enriched with the DBpedia ontology, NRC Emotion Intensity Lexicon, and MRC psycholinguistic database information. Afterwards, the knowledge graph which is now a knowledgeable alternative for the input text was embedded to yield an embedding matrix. Finally, to perform personality predictions the resulting embedding matrix was fed to four suggested deep learning models independently, which are based on convolutional neural network (CNN), simple recurrent neural network (RNN), long short term memory (LSTM) and bidirectional long short term memory (BiLSTM). The results indicated a considerable improvements in prediction accuracies in all of the suggested classifiers.
abstract_zh: 人们如何思考、感受和行为，主要是其人格特征的体现。通过意识到我们正在打交道或决定打交道的人的个性特征，我们可以有效地改善这种关系，无论其类型如何。随着基于互联网的通信基础设施（社交网络、论坛等）的兴起，大量的人类通信发生在那里。这种交流中最重要的工具是书面和口头形式的语言，它巧妙地编码了个人的所有这些基本人格特征。基于文本的自动性格预测（APP）是根据生成/交换的文本内容对个体的性格进行自动预测。本文提出了一种新颖的基于知识图谱的基于文本的 APP 方法，该方法依赖于大五人格特征。为此，给定一个文本，通过将输入文本的概念与 DBpedia 知识库条目进行匹配，构建了一个知识图谱，它是一组相互链接的概念描述。然后，由于实现了更强大的表示，该图通过 DBpedia 本体、NRC 情感强度词典和 MRC 心理语言学数据库信息进行了丰富。之后，知识图谱（现在是输入文本的知识替代品）被嵌入以产生嵌入矩阵。最后，为了执行个性预测，将所得嵌入矩阵独立输入到四个建议的深度学习模型，这些模型基于卷积神经网络（CNN）、简单循环神经网络（RNN）、长期短期记忆（LSTM）和双向长期短期记忆（BiLSTM）。结果表明，所有建议的分类器的预测精度都有相当大的提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于知识图谱的文本自动人格预测方法，利用DBpedia等知识库和情感词典构建知识图谱，并结合深度学习模型进行人格预测。
AI.motivation: 传统文本人格预测方法难以全面捕捉人格特质的复杂关联，需通过知识图谱整合多源语义信息以提升预测准确性。
AI.method: 通过匹配文本概念与DBpedia构建知识图谱，融合DBpedia本体、NRC情感强度词典和MRC心理语言学数据库信息生成嵌入矩阵，输入CNN、RNN、LSTM和BiLSTM模型进行预测。
AI.result: 所有深度学习模型在人格预测任务中均取得显著准确率提升，验证了知识图谱增强方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱与深度学习结合能有效提升文本人格预测性能，为基于自然语言的人格分析提供新思路。

search_text: Knowledge Graph-Enabled Text-Based Automatic Personality Prediction 基于知识图谱的基于文本的自动性格预测 How people think, feel, and behave, primarily is a representation of their personality characteristics. By being conscious of personality characteristics of individuals whom we are dealing with or decided to deal with, one can competently ameliorate the relationship, regardless of its type. With the rise of Internet-based communication infrastructures (social networks, forums, etc.), a considerable amount of human communications take place there. The most prominent tool in such communications, is the language in written and spoken form that adroitly encodes all those essential personality characteristics of individuals. Text-based Automatic Personality Prediction (APP) is the automated forecasting of the personality of individuals based on the generated/exchanged text contents. This paper presents a novel knowledge graph-enabled approach to text-based APP that relies on the Big Five personality traits. To this end, given a text a knowledge graph which is a set of interlinked descriptions of concepts, was built through matching the input text's concepts with DBpedia knowledge base entries. Then, due to achieving more powerful representation the graph was enriched with the DBpedia ontology, NRC Emotion Intensity Lexicon, and MRC psycholinguistic database information. Afterwards, the knowledge graph which is now a knowledgeable alternative for the input text was embedded to yield an embedding matrix. Finally, to perform personality predictions the resulting embedding matrix was fed to four suggested deep learning models independently, which are based on convolutional neural network (CNN), simple recurrent neural network (RNN), long short term memory (LSTM) and bidirectional long short term memory (BiLSTM). The results indicated a considerable improvements in prediction accuracies in all of the suggested classifiers. 人们如何思考、感受和行为，主要是其人格特征的体现。通过意识到我们正在打交道或决定打交道的人的个性特征，我们可以有效地改善这种关系，无论其类型如何。随着基于互联网的通信基础设施（社交网络、论坛等）的兴起，大量的人类通信发生在那里。这种交流中最重要的工具是书面和口头形式的语言，它巧妙地编码了个人的所有这些基本人格特征。基于文本的自动性格预测（APP）是根据生成/交换的文本内容对个体的性格进行自动预测。本文提出了一种新颖的基于知识图谱的基于文本的 APP 方法，该方法依赖于大五人格特征。为此，给定一个文本，通过将输入文本的概念与 DBpedia 知识库条目进行匹配，构建了一个知识图谱，它是一组相互链接的概念描述。然后，由于实现了更强大的表示，该图通过 DBpedia 本体、NRC 情感强度词典和 MRC 心理语言学数据库信息进行了丰富。之后，知识图谱（现在是输入文本的知识替代品）被嵌入以产生嵌入矩阵。最后，为了执行个性预测，将所得嵌入矩阵独立输入到四个建议的深度学习模型，这些模型基于卷积神经网络（CNN）、简单循环神经网络（RNN）、长期短期记忆（LSTM）和双向长期短期记忆（BiLSTM）。结果表明，所有建议的分类器的预测精度都有相当大的提高。 本文提出了一种基于知识图谱的文本自动人格预测方法，利用DBpedia等知识库和情感词典构建知识图谱，并结合深度学习模型进行人格预测。 Majid Ramezani,Mohammad-Reza Feizi-Derakhshi,Mohammad-Ali Balafar cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Ruiteng Zhang,Jianguo Wei,Xugang Lu,Wenhuan Lu,Di Jin,Junhai Xu,Lin Zhang,Yantao Ji,Jianwu Dang
title: TMS: A Temporal Multi-scale Backbone Design for Speaker Embedding
title_zh: TMS：用于扬声器嵌入的时态多尺度骨干设计
comment: Due to the limitation "The abstract field cannot be longer than 1,920 characters", the abstract here is shorter than that in the PDF file
comments: Due to the limitation "The abstract field cannot be longer than 1,920 characters", the abstract here is shorter than that in the PDF file
abstract: Speaker embedding is an important front-end module to explore discriminative speaker features for many speech applications where speaker information is needed. Current SOTA backbone networks for speaker embedding are designed to aggregate multi-scale features from an utterance with multi-branch network architectures for speaker representation. However, naively adding many branches of multi-scale features with the simple fully convolutional operation could not efficiently improve the performance due to the rapid increase of model parameters and computational complexity. Therefore, in the most current state-of-the-art network architectures, only a few branches corresponding to a limited number of temporal scales could be designed for speaker embeddings. To address this problem, in this paper, we propose an effective temporal multi-scale (TMS) model where multi-scale branches could be efficiently designed in a speaker embedding network almost without increasing computational costs. The new model is based on the conventional TDNN, where the network architecture is smartly separated into two modeling operators: a channel-modeling operator and a temporal multi-branch modeling operator. Adding temporal multi-scale in the temporal multi-branch operator needs only a little bit increase of the number of parameters, and thus save more computational budget for adding more branches with large temporal scales. Moreover, in the inference stage, we further developed a systemic re-parameterization method to convert the TMS-based model into a single-path-based topology in order to increase inference speed. We investigated the performance of the new TMS method for automatic speaker verification (ASV) on in-domain and out-of-domain conditions. Results show that the TMS-based model obtained a significant increase in the performance over the SOTA ASV models, meanwhile, had a faster inference speed.
summary: Speaker embedding is an important front-end module to explore discriminative speaker features for many speech applications where speaker information is needed. Current SOTA backbone networks for speaker embedding are designed to aggregate multi-scale features from an utterance with multi-branch network architectures for speaker representation. However, naively adding many branches of multi-scale features with the simple fully convolutional operation could not efficiently improve the performance due to the rapid increase of model parameters and computational complexity. Therefore, in the most current state-of-the-art network architectures, only a few branches corresponding to a limited number of temporal scales could be designed for speaker embeddings. To address this problem, in this paper, we propose an effective temporal multi-scale (TMS) model where multi-scale branches could be efficiently designed in a speaker embedding network almost without increasing computational costs. The new model is based on the conventional TDNN, where the network architecture is smartly separated into two modeling operators: a channel-modeling operator and a temporal multi-branch modeling operator. Adding temporal multi-scale in the temporal multi-branch operator needs only a little bit increase of the number of parameters, and thus save more computational budget for adding more branches with large temporal scales. Moreover, in the inference stage, we further developed a systemic re-parameterization method to convert the TMS-based model into a single-path-based topology in order to increase inference speed. We investigated the performance of the new TMS method for automatic speaker verification (ASV) on in-domain and out-of-domain conditions. Results show that the TMS-based model obtained a significant increase in the performance over the SOTA ASV models, meanwhile, had a faster inference speed.
abstract_zh: 说话人嵌​​入是一个重要的前端模块，用于探索许多需要说话人信息的语音应用的辨别说话人特征。当前用于说话人嵌入的 SOTA 主干网络旨在聚合来自话语的多尺度特征，并使用多分支网络架构来表示说话人。然而，由于模型参数和计算复杂度的快速增加，通过简单的全卷积运算简单地添加许多多尺度特征的分支并不能有效地提高性能。因此，在当前最先进的网络架构中，只能为说话者嵌入设计与有限数量的时间尺度相对应的几个分支。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的时间多尺度（TMS）模型，其中可以在说话人嵌入网络中有效地设计多尺度分支，几乎不会增加计算成本。新模型基于传统的 TDNN，其中网络架构被巧妙地分为两个建模算子：通道建模算子和时间多分支建模算子。在时间多分支算子中添加时间多尺度只需要稍微增加参数数量，从而节省更多的计算预算来添加更多具有大时间尺度的分支。此外，在推理阶段，我们进一步开发了一种系统的重新参数化方法，将基于TMS的模型转换为基于单路径的拓扑，以提高推理速度。我们研究了用于自动说话人验证 (ASV) 的新 TMS 方法在域内和域外条件下的性能。结果表明，基于 TMS 的模型比 SOTA ASV 模型获得了显着的性能提升，同时具有更快的推理速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TMS的时序多尺度骨干网络设计，用于改进说话人嵌入的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有说话人嵌入模型在增加多尺度分支时面临计算复杂度和参数量激增的问题，限制了模型性能的进一步提升。
AI.method: 基于传统TDNN架构，将网络分离为通道建模算子和时序多分支建模算子，并通过系统化重参数化方法将TMS模型转换为单路径拓扑以加速推理。
AI.result: TMS模型在域内和域外条件下均显著优于现有SOTA模型，在保持较低计算成本的同时实现了更快的推理速度。
AI.conclusion: TMS通过高效多尺度建模和重参数化技术，为说话人验证任务提供了性能与效率兼具的解决方案。

To address this problem, in this paper, we propose an effective temporal multi-scale (TMS) model where multi-scale branches could be efficiently designed in a speaker embedding network almost without increasing computational costs. The new model is based on the conventional TDNN, where the network architecture is smartly separated into two modeling operators: a channel-modeling operator and a temporal multi-branch modeling operator. Adding temporal multi-scale in the temporal multi-branch operator needs only a little bit increase of the number of parameters, and thus save more computational budget for adding more branches with large temporal scales. Moreover, in the inference stage, we further developed a systemic re-parameterization method to convert the TMS-based model into a single-path-based topology in order to increase inference speed. We investigated the performance of the new TMS method for automatic speaker verification (ASV) on in-domain and out-of-domain conditions. authors_text: Somaye Hashemifar,Claudia Iriondo,Evan Casey,Mohsen Hejrati,for Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative
title: DeepAD: A Robust Deep Learning Model of Alzheimer's Disease Progression for Real-World Clinical Applications
title_zh: DeepAD：用于实际临床应用的阿尔茨海默病进展的稳健深度学习模型
abstract: The ability to predict the future trajectory of a patient is a key step toward the development of therapeutics for complex diseases such as Alzheimer's disease (AD). However, most machine learning approaches developed for prediction of disease progression are either single-task or single-modality models, which can not be directly adopted to our setting involving multi-task learning with high dimensional images. Moreover, most of those approaches are trained on a single dataset (i.e. cohort), which can not be generalized to other cohorts. We propose a novel multimodal multi-task deep learning model to predict AD progression by analyzing longitudinal clinical and neuroimaging data from multiple cohorts. Our proposed model integrates high dimensional MRI features from a 3D convolutional neural network with other data modalities, including clinical and demographic information, to predict the future trajectory of patients. Our model employs an adversarial loss to alleviate the study-specific imaging bias, in particular the inter-study domain shifts. In addition, a Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) optimization technique is applied to further improve model generalization. The proposed model is trained and tested on various datasets in order to evaluate and validate the results. Our results showed that 1) our model yields significant improvement over the baseline models, and 2) models using extracted neuroimaging features from 3D convolutional neural network outperform the same models when applied to MRI-derived volumetric features.
summary: The ability to predict the future trajectory of a patient is a key step toward the development of therapeutics for complex diseases such as Alzheimer's disease (AD). However, most machine learning approaches developed for prediction of disease progression are either single-task or single-modality models, which can not be directly adopted to our setting involving multi-task learning with high dimensional images. Moreover, most of those approaches are trained on a single dataset (i.e. cohort), which can not be generalized to other cohorts. We propose a novel multimodal multi-task deep learning model to predict AD progression by analyzing longitudinal clinical and neuroimaging data from multiple cohorts. Our proposed model integrates high dimensional MRI features from a 3D convolutional neural network with other data modalities, including clinical and demographic information, to predict the future trajectory of patients. Our model employs an adversarial loss to alleviate the study-specific imaging bias, in particular the inter-study domain shifts. In addition, a Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) optimization technique is applied to further improve model generalization. The proposed model is trained and tested on various datasets in order to evaluate and validate the results. Our results showed that 1) our model yields significant improvement over the baseline models, and 2) models using extracted neuroimaging features from 3D convolutional neural network outperform the same models when applied to MRI-derived volumetric features.
abstract_zh: 预测患者未来轨迹的能力是开发阿尔茨海默病（AD）等复杂疾病疗法的关键一步。然而，大多数为预测疾病进展而开发的机器学习方法都是单任务或单模态模型，不能直接应用于我们涉及高维图像多任务学习的环境。此外，大多数这些方法都是在单个数据集（即队列）上进行训练的，不能推广到其他队列。我们提出了一种新颖的多模式多任务深度学习模型，通过分析来自多个队列的纵向临床和神经影像数据来预测 AD 进展。我们提出的模型将 3D 卷积神经网络的高维 MRI 特征与其他数据模式（包括临床和人口统计信息）相集成，以预测患者的未来轨迹。我们的模型采用对抗性损失来减轻研究特定的成像偏差，特别是研究间的领域转移。此外，还应用了锐度感知最小化（SAM）优化技术来进一步提高模型泛化能力。所提出的模型在各种数据集上进行训练和测试，以评估和验证结果。我们的结果表明，1）我们的模型比基线模型有了显着的改进，2）使用从 3D 卷积神经网络提取的神经影像特征的模型在应用于 MRI 衍生的体积特征时优于相同的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态多任务深度学习模型DeepAD，用于预测阿尔茨海默病（AD）进展，结合纵向临床数据和神经影像数据，并解决跨数据集泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有AD进展预测模型多为单任务或单模态，难以处理多任务学习和跨队列数据泛化问题，且依赖单一数据集训练，限制了临床应用。
AI.method: 整合3D卷积神经网络提取的高维MRI特征与临床/人口学数据，采用对抗损失消除跨研究影像偏差，并引入Sharpness-Aware Minimization（SAM）优化技术提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 模型在多个数据集上表现优于基线模型，且基于3D CNN的神经影像特征优于传统MRI容积特征。
AI.conclusion: DeepAD通过多模态融合与对抗训练有效提升了AD进展预测的准确性与跨队列泛化能力，适用于真实临床场景。

search_text: DeepAD: A Robust Deep Learning Model of Alzheimer's Disease Progression for Real-World Clinical Applications DeepAD：用于实际临床应用的阿尔茨海默病进展的稳健深度学习模型 The ability to predict the future trajectory of a patient is a key step toward the development of therapeutics for complex diseases such as Alzheimer's disease (AD). However, most machine learning approaches developed for prediction of disease progression are either single-task or single-modality models, which can not be directly adopted to our setting involving multi-task learning with high dimensional images. Moreover, most of those approaches are trained on a single dataset (i.e. cohort), which can not be generalized to other cohorts. We propose a novel multimodal multi-task deep learning model to predict AD progression by analyzing longitudinal clinical and neuroimaging data from multiple cohorts. Our proposed model integrates high dimensional MRI features from a 3D convolutional neural network with other data modalities, including clinical and demographic information, to predict the future trajectory of patients. Our model employs an adversarial loss to alleviate the study-specific imaging bias, in particular the inter-study domain shifts. In addition, a Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) optimization technique is applied to further improve model generalization. The proposed model is trained and tested on various datasets in order to evaluate and validate the results. Our results showed that 1) our model yields significant improvement over the baseline models, and 2) models using extracted neuroimaging features from 3D convolutional neural network outperform the same models when applied to MRI-derived volumetric features. 预测患者未来轨迹的能力是开发阿尔茨海默病（AD）等复杂疾病疗法的关键一步。然而，大多数为预测疾病进展而开发的机器学习方法都是单任务或单模态模型，不能直接应用于我们涉及高维图像多任务学习的环境。此外，大多数这些方法都是在单个数据集（即队列）上进行训练的，不能推广到其他队列。我们提出了一种新颖的多模式多任务深度学习模型，通过分析来自多个队列的纵向临床和神经影像数据来预测 AD 进展。我们提出的模型将 3D 卷积神经网络的高维 MRI 特征与其他数据模式（包括临床和人口统计信息）相集成，以预测患者的未来轨迹。我们的模型采用对抗性损失来减轻研究特定的成像偏差，特别是研究间的领域转移。此外，还应用了锐度感知最小化（SAM）优化技术来进一步提高模型泛化能力。所提出的模型在各种数据集上进行训练和测试，以评估和验证结果。我们的结果表明，1）我们的模型比基线模型有了显着的改进，2）使用从 3D 卷积神经网络提取的神经影像特征的模型在应用于 MRI 衍生的体积特征时优于相同的模型。 本文提出一种多模态多任务深度学习模型DeepAD，用于预测阿尔茨海默病（AD）进展，结合纵向临床数据和神经影像数据，并解决跨数据集泛化问题。 Somaye Hashemifar,Claudia Iriondo,Evan Casey,Mohsen Hejrati,for Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Zhiyu Li,Shuai Lu,Daya Guo,Nan Duan,Shailesh Jannu,Grant Jenks,Deep Majumder,Jared Green,Alexey Svyatkovskiy,Shengyu Fu,Neel Sundaresan
title: Automating Code Review Activities by Large-Scale Pre-training
title_zh: 通过大规模预训练自动化代码审查活动
abstract: Code review is an essential part to software development lifecycle since it aims at guaranteeing the quality of codes. Modern code review activities necessitate developers viewing, understanding and even running the programs to assess logic, functionality, latency, style and other factors. It turns out that developers have to spend far too much time reviewing the code of their peers. Accordingly, it is in significant demand to automate the code review process. In this research, we focus on utilizing pre-training techniques for the tasks in the code review scenario. We collect a large-scale dataset of real-world code changes and code reviews from open-source projects in nine of the most popular programming languages. To better understand code diffs and reviews, we propose CodeReviewer, a pre-trained model that utilizes four pre-training tasks tailored specifically for the code review scenario. To evaluate our model, we focus on three key tasks related to code review activities, including code change quality estimation, review comment generation and code refinement. Furthermore, we establish a high-quality benchmark dataset based on our collected data for these three tasks and conduct comprehensive experiments on it. The experimental results demonstrate that our model outperforms the previous state-of-the-art pre-training approaches in all tasks. Further analysis show that our proposed pre-training tasks and the multilingual pre-training dataset benefit the model on the understanding of code changes and reviews.
summary: Code review is an essential part to software development lifecycle since it aims at guaranteeing the quality of codes. Modern code review activities necessitate developers viewing, understanding and even running the programs to assess logic, functionality, latency, style and other factors. It turns out that developers have to spend far too much time reviewing the code of their peers. Accordingly, it is in significant demand to automate the code review process. In this research, we focus on utilizing pre-training techniques for the tasks in the code review scenario. We collect a large-scale dataset of real-world code changes and code reviews from open-source projects in nine of the most popular programming languages. To better understand code diffs and reviews, we propose CodeReviewer, a pre-trained model that utilizes four pre-training tasks tailored specifically for the code review scenario. To evaluate our model, we focus on three key tasks related to code review activities, including code change quality estimation, review comment generation and code refinement. Furthermore, we establish a high-quality benchmark dataset based on our collected data for these three tasks and conduct comprehensive experiments on it. The experimental results demonstrate that our model outperforms the previous state-of-the-art pre-training approaches in all tasks. Further analysis show that our proposed pre-training tasks and the multilingual pre-training dataset benefit the model on the understanding of code changes and reviews.
abstract_zh: 代码审查是软件开发生命周期的重要组成部分，因为它的目的是保证代码的质量。现代代码审查活动要求开发人员查看、理解甚至运行程序来评估逻辑、功能、延迟、风格和其他因素。事实证明，开发人员必须花费太多时间来审查同行的代码。因此，非常需要自动化代码审查过程。在这项研究中，我们专注于利用预训练技术来完成代码审查场景中的任务。我们从九种最流行的编程语言的开源项目中收集了真实世界代码更改和代码审查的大规模数据集。为了更好地理解代码差异和审查，我们提出了 CodeReviewer，这是一种预训练模型，它利用专为代码审查场景定制的四个预训练任务。为了评估我们的模型，我们重点关注与代码审查活动相关的三个关键任务，包括代码更改质量估计、审查注释生成和代码细化。此外，我们根据这三个任务收集的数据建立了高质量的基准数据集，并对其进行了全面的实验。实验结果表明，我们的模型在所有任务中都优于以前最先进的预训练方法。进一步的分析表明，我们提出的预训练任务和多语言预训练数据集有利于模型理解代码更改和审查。

AI.tldr: 通过大规模预训练技术自动化代码审查活动，提出CodeReviewer模型以提升代码审查效率。
AI.motivation: 代码审查耗时且效率低下，亟需自动化手段减少开发者负担并提升代码质量。
AI.method: 收集九种主流编程语言的开源代码变更与审查数据，构建预训练模型CodeReviewer，设计四个针对性预训练任务，并建立基准数据集进行评估。
AI.result: 模型在代码质量评估、审查评论生成和代码优化三个任务中均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 定制化预训练任务与多语言数据集显著提升模型对代码变更及审查的理解能力，推动代码审查自动化发展。

authors_text: Yizhou Zhao,Xun Guo,Yan Lu
title: Semantic-aligned Fusion Transformer for One-shot Object Detection
title_zh: 用于一次性目标检测的语义对齐融合变压器
abstract: One-shot object detection aims at detecting novel objects according to merely one given instance. With extreme data scarcity, current approaches explore various feature fusions to obtain directly transferable meta-knowledge. Yet, their performances are often unsatisfactory. In this paper, we attribute this to inappropriate correlation methods that misalign query-support semantics by overlooking spatial structures and scale variances. Upon analysis, we leverage the attention mechanism and propose a simple but effective architecture named Semantic-aligned Fusion Transformer (SaFT) to resolve these issues. Specifically, we equip SaFT with a vertical fusion module (VFM) for cross-scale semantic enhancement and a horizontal fusion module (HFM) for cross-sample feature fusion. Together, they broaden the vision for each feature point from the support to a whole augmented feature pyramid from the query, facilitating semantic-aligned associations. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of our framework. Without fine-tuning on novel classes, it brings significant performance gains to one-stage baselines, lifting state-of-the-art results to a higher level.
summary: One-shot object detection aims at detecting novel objects according to merely one given instance. With extreme data scarcity, current approaches explore various feature fusions to obtain directly transferable meta-knowledge. Yet, their performances are often unsatisfactory. In this paper, we attribute this to inappropriate correlation methods that misalign query-support semantics by overlooking spatial structures and scale variances. Upon analysis, we leverage the attention mechanism and propose a simple but effective architecture named Semantic-aligned Fusion Transformer (SaFT) to resolve these issues. Specifically, we equip SaFT with a vertical fusion module (VFM) for cross-scale semantic enhancement and a horizontal fusion module (HFM) for cross-sample feature fusion. Together, they broaden the vision for each feature point from the support to a whole augmented feature pyramid from the query, facilitating semantic-aligned associations. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of our framework. Without fine-tuning on novel classes, it brings significant performance gains to one-stage baselines, lifting state-of-the-art results to a higher level.
abstract_zh: 一次性对象检测旨在仅根据一个给定实例检测新对象。由于数据极度稀缺，当前的方法探索各种特征融合以获得可直接转移的元知识。然而，他们的表现却常常不尽如人意。在本文中，我们将此归因于不适当的关联方法，这些方法通过忽略空间结构和尺度差异来错位查询支持语义。经过分析，我们利用注意力机制提出了一种简单但有效的架构，名为语义对齐融合变压器（SaFT）来解决这些问题。具体来说，我们为 SaFT 配备了用于跨尺度语义增强的垂直融合模块（VFM）和用于跨样本特征融合的水平融合模块（HFM）。它们共同拓宽了每个特征点的视野，从支持到查询的整个增强特征金字塔，促进语义对齐的关联。对多个基准的广泛实验证明了我们框架的优越性。无需对新颖的类进行微调，它就可以为单阶段基线带来显着的性能提升，将最先进的结果提升到更高的水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为语义对齐融合变换器（SaFT）的架构，用于解决单样本目标检测中因语义对齐不足导致的性能问题。
AI.motivation: 现有单样本检测方法因忽视空间结构和尺度差异，导致查询与支持样本语义关联不准确，性能不理想。
AI.method: 设计包含垂直融合模块（VFM）和水平融合模块（HFM）的SaFT架构，VFM增强跨尺度语义，HFM实现跨样本特征融合，构建语义对齐的特征金字塔。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中表现优异，无需微调新类别即可显著提升单阶段基线性能，超越现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SaFT通过有效对齐查询与支持样本语义，解决了单样本检测中的关键问题，为该领域树立了新标杆。

motivation: 现有单样本检测方法因忽视空间结构和尺度差异，导致查询与支持样本语义关联不准确，性能不理想。
method: 设计包含垂直融合模块（VFM）和水平融合模块（HFM）的SaFT架构，VFM增强跨尺度语义，HFM实现跨样本特征融合，构建语义对齐的特征金字塔。
result: 在多个基准测试中表现优异，无需微调新类别即可显著提升单阶段基线性能，超越现有最先进方法。
conclusion: SaFT通过有效对齐查询与支持样本语义，解决了单样本检测中的关键问题，为该领域树立了新标杆。
search_text: Semantic-aligned Fusion Transformer for One-shot Object Detection 用于一次性目标检测的语义对齐融合变压器 One-shot object detection aims at detecting novel objects according to merely one given instance. With extreme data scarcity, current approaches explore various feature fusions to obtain directly transferable meta-knowledge. Yet, their performances are often unsatisfactory. In this paper, we attribute this to inappropriate correlation methods that misalign query-support semantics by overlooking spatial structures and scale variances. Upon analysis, we leverage the attention mechanism and propose a simple but effective architecture named Semantic-aligned Fusion Transformer (SaFT) to resolve these issues. Specifically, we equip SaFT with a vertical fusion module (VFM) for cross-scale semantic enhancement and a horizontal fusion module (HFM) for cross-sample feature fusion. Together, they broaden the vision for each feature point from the support to a whole augmented feature pyramid from the query, facilitating semantic-aligned associations. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of our framework. Without fine-tuning on novel classes, it brings significant performance gains to one-stage baselines, lifting state-of-the-art results to a higher level. 一次性对象检测旨在仅根据一个给定实例检测新对象。由于数据极度稀缺，当前的方法探索各种特征融合以获得可直接转移的元知识。然而，他们的表现却常常不尽如人意。在本文中，我们将此归因于不适当的关联方法，这些方法通过忽略空间结构和尺度差异来错位查询支持语义。经过分析，我们利用注意力机制提出了一种简单但有效的架构，名为语义对齐融合变压器（SaFT）来解决这些问题。具体来说，我们为 SaFT 配备了用于跨尺度语义增强的垂直融合模块（VFM）和用于跨样本特征融合的水平融合模块（HFM）。它们共同拓宽了每个特征点的视野，从支持到查询的整个增强特征金字塔，促进语义对齐的关联。对多个基准的广泛实验证明了我们框架的优越性。无需对新颖的类进行微调，它就可以为单阶段基线带来显着的性能提升，将最先进的结果提升到更高的水平。 本文提出一种名为语义对齐融合变换器（SaFT）的架构，用于解决单样本目标检测中因语义对齐不足导致的性能问题。 Yizhou Zhao,Xun Guo,Yan Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Inkyu Sa,JongYoon Lim,Ho Seok Ahn,Bruce MacDonald
title: deepNIR: Datasets for generating synthetic NIR images and improved fruit detection system using deep learning techniques
title_zh: deepNIR：使用深度学习技术生成合成 NIR 图像和改进的水果检测系统的数据集
comment: 35 pages, 27 figures, published in MDPI Remote Sensing journal
comments: 35 pages, 27 figures, published in MDPI Remote Sensing journal
abstract: This paper presents datasets utilised for synthetic near-infrared (NIR) image generation and bounding-box level fruit detection systems. It is undeniable that high-calibre machine learning frameworks such as Tensorflow or Pytorch, and large-scale ImageNet or COCO datasets with the aid of accelerated GPU hardware have pushed the limit of machine learning techniques for more than decades. Among these breakthroughs, a high-quality dataset is one of the essential building blocks that can lead to success in model generalisation and the deployment of data-driven deep neural networks. In particular, synthetic data generation tasks often require more training samples than other supervised approaches. Therefore, in this paper, we share the NIR+RGB datasets that are re-processed from two public datasets (i.e., nirscene and SEN12MS) and our novel NIR+RGB sweet pepper(capsicum) dataset. We quantitatively and qualitatively demonstrate that these NIR+RGB datasets are sufficient to be used for synthetic NIR image generation. We achieved Frechet Inception Distance (FID) of 11.36, 26.53, and 40.15 for nirscene1, SEN12MS, and sweet pepper datasets respectively. In addition, we release manual annotations of 11 fruit bounding boxes that can be exported as various formats using cloud service. Four newly added fruits [blueberry, cherry, kiwi, and wheat] compound 11 novel bounding box datasets on top of our previous work presented in the deepFruits project [apple, avocado, capsicum, mango, orange, rockmelon, strawberry]. The total number of bounding box instances of the dataset is 162k and it is ready to use from cloud service. For the evaluation of the dataset, Yolov5 single stage detector is exploited and reported impressive mean-average-precision,mAP[0.5:0.95] results of[min:0.49, max:0.812]. We hope these datasets are useful and serve as a baseline for the future studies.

In particular, synthetic data generation tasks often require more training samples than other supervised approaches. Therefore, in this paper, we share the NIR+RGB datasets that are re-processed from two public datasets (i.e., nirscene and SEN12MS) and our novel NIR+RGB sweet pepper(capsicum) dataset. We quantitatively and qualitatively demonstrate that these NIR+RGB datasets are sufficient to be used for synthetic NIR image generation. We achieved Frechet Inception Distance (FID) of 11.36, 26.53, and 40.15 for nirscene1, SEN12MS, and sweet pepper datasets respectively. In addition, we release manual annotations of 11 fruit bounding boxes that can be exported as various formats using cloud service. Four newly added fruits [blueberry, cherry, kiwi, and wheat] compound 11 novel bounding box datasets on top of our previous work presented in the deepFruits project [apple, avocado, capsicum, mango, orange, rockmelon, strawberry]. The total number of bounding box instances of the dataset is 162k and it is ready to use from cloud service. For the evaluation of the dataset, Yolov5 single stage detector is exploited and reported impressive mean-average-precision,mAP[0.5:0.95] results of[min:0.49, max:0.812]. We hope these datasets are useful and serve as a baseline for the future studies.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了用于合成近红外 (NIR) 图像生成和边界框级水果检测系统的数据集。不可否认，数十年来，Tensorflow或Pytorch等高水平机器学习框架，以及借助加速GPU硬件的大规模ImageNet或COCO数据集，已经突破了机器学习技术的极限。在这些突破中，高质量的数据集是模型泛化和数据驱动的深度神经网络部署取得成功的重要组成部分之一。特别是，合成数据生成任务通常比其他监督方法需要更多的训练样本。因此，在本文中，我们分享了从两个公共数据集（即 nirscene 和 SEN12MS）重新处理的 NIR+RGB 数据集以及我们新颖的 NIR+RGB 甜椒（辣椒）数据集。我们定量和定性地证明这些 NIR+RGB 数据集足以用于合成 NIR 图像生成。我们在 nirscene1、SEN12MS 和甜椒数据集上分别实现了 11.36、26.53 和 40.15 的 Frechet 起始距离 (FID)。此外，我们还发布了 11 个水果边界框的手动注释，可以使用云服务将其导出为各种格式。四种新添加的水果（蓝莓、樱桃、猕猴桃和小麦）在我们之前在 deepFruits 项目中展示的工作（苹果、鳄梨、辣椒、芒果、橙子、西瓜、草莓）的基础上复合了 11 个新颖的边界框数据集。该数据集的边界框实例总数为 162k，可以从云服务中使用。为了评估数据集，利用 Yolov5 单级检测器并报告了令人印象深刻的平均精度，mAP[0.5:0.95] 结果 [最小值：0.49，最大值：0.812]。我们希望这些数据集有用并作为未来研究的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出用于生成合成近红外（NIR）图像及改进水果检测系统的NIR+RGB数据集，并发布包含11种水果的边界框标注数据。
AI.motivation: 高质量数据集是深度学习模型泛化和部署的关键，而合成数据生成需要大量训练样本，因此需构建专用NIR图像数据集以提升水果检测性能。
AI.method: 基于nirscene、SEN12MS等公开数据集重新处理生成NIR+RGB数据，新增甜椒及蓝莓、樱桃等4种水果的边界框标注，使用YOLOv5评估检测性能。
AI.result: 合成NIR图像FID得分分别为11.36（nirscene1）、26.53（SEN12MS）和40.15（甜椒数据集），YOLOv5检测mAP[0.5:0.95]达0.49-0.812。
AI.conclusion: 发布的数据集可作为合成NIR图像生成和水果检测的基准，为未来研究提供基础支持。

authors_text: Yuanqi Li,Jianwei Guo,Xinran Yang,Shun Liu,Jie Guo,Xiaopeng Zhang,Yanwen Guo
title: Deep Point Cloud Simplification for High-quality Surface Reconstruction
title_zh: 深度点云简化，实现高质量表面重建
abstract: The growing size of point clouds enlarges consumptions of storage, transmission, and computation of 3D scenes. Raw data is redundant, noisy, and non-uniform. Therefore, simplifying point clouds for achieving compact, clean, and uniform points is becoming increasingly important for 3D vision and graphics tasks. Previous learning based methods aim to generate fewer points for scene understanding, regardless of the quality of surface reconstruction, leading to results with low reconstruction accuracy and bad point distribution. In this paper, we propose a novel point cloud simplification network (PCS-Net) dedicated to high-quality surface mesh reconstruction while maintaining geometric fidelity. We first learn a sampling matrix in a feature-aware simplification module to reduce the number of points. Then we propose a novel double-scale resampling module to refine the positions of the sampled points, to achieve a uniform distribution. To further retain important shape features, an adaptive sampling strategy with a novel saliency loss is designed. With our PCS-Net, the input non-uniform and noisy point cloud can be simplified in a feature-aware manner, i.e., points near salient features are consolidated but still with uniform distribution locally. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method and show that we outperform previous simplification or reconstruction-oriented upsampling methods.
summary: The growing size of point clouds enlarges consumptions of storage, transmission, and computation of 3D scenes. Raw data is redundant, noisy, and non-uniform. Therefore, simplifying point clouds for achieving compact, clean, and uniform points is becoming increasingly important for 3D vision and graphics tasks. Previous learning based methods aim to generate fewer points for scene understanding, regardless of the quality of surface reconstruction, leading to results with low reconstruction accuracy and bad point distribution. In this paper, we propose a novel point cloud simplification network (PCS-Net) dedicated to high-quality surface mesh reconstruction while maintaining geometric fidelity. We first learn a sampling matrix in a feature-aware simplification module to reduce the number of points. Then we propose a novel double-scale resampling module to refine the positions of the sampled points, to achieve a uniform distribution. To further retain important shape features, an adaptive sampling strategy with a novel saliency loss is designed. With our PCS-Net, the input non-uniform and noisy point cloud can be simplified in a feature-aware manner, i.e., points near salient features are consolidated but still with uniform distribution locally. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method and show that we outperform previous simplification or reconstruction-oriented upsampling methods.
abstract_zh: 点云规模的不断增长增加了3D场景的存储、传输和计算的消耗。原始数据是冗余的、有噪声的且不均匀的。因此，简化点云以实现紧凑、干净且均匀的点对于 3D 视觉和图形任务变得越来越重要。以前的基于学习的方法旨在生成更少的点用于场景理解，无论表面重建的质量如何，导致重建精度低且点分布不好的结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的点云简化网络（PCS-Net），致力于高质量的表面网格重建，同时保持几何保真度。我们首先在特征感知简化模块中学习采样矩阵以减少点数。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的双尺度重采样模块来细化采样点的位置，以实现均匀分布。为了进一步保留重要的形状特征，设计了一种具有新颖显着性损失的自适应采样策略。通过我们的 PCS-Net，输入的非均匀和噪声点云可以以特征感知的方式进行简化，即，靠近显着特征的点被合并，但仍具有局部均匀分布。实验证明了我们方法的有效性，并表明我们优于以前的简化或面向重建的上采样方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度点云简化网络（PCS-Net），旨在实现高质量表面重建的同时保持几何保真度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的方法在减少点云数量以用于场景理解时，忽视了表面重建质量，导致重建精度低且点分布不佳。
AI.method: 通过特征感知简化模块学习采样矩阵减少点数，结合双尺度重采样模块优化点分布，并设计自适应采样策略与显著性损失保留关键形状特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在点云简化和重建任务上均优于现有方法，能有效处理非均匀噪声点云并保持局部均匀分布。
AI.conclusion: PCS-Net通过特征感知简化与自适应策略，在保证几何保真度的同时实现了高质量表面重建，为3D视觉与图形任务提供了更优的点云处理方案。

motivation: 现有基于学习的方法在减少点云数量以用于场景理解时，忽视了表面重建质量，导致重建精度低且点分布不佳。
method: 通过特征感知简化模块学习采样矩阵减少点数，结合双尺度重采样模块优化点分布，并设计自适应采样策略与显著性损失保留关键形状特征。
result: 实验表明，该方法在点云简化和重建任务上均优于现有方法，能有效处理非均匀噪声点云并保持局部均匀分布。
conclusion: PCS-Net通过特征感知简化与自适应策略，在保证几何保真度的同时实现了高质量表面重建，为3D视觉与图形任务提供了更优的点云处理方案。
search_text: Deep Point Cloud Simplification for High-quality Surface Reconstruction 深度点云简化，实现高质量表面重建 The growing size of point clouds enlarges consumptions of storage, transmission, and computation of 3D scenes. Raw data is redundant, noisy, and non-uniform. Therefore, simplifying point clouds for achieving compact, clean, and uniform points is becoming increasingly important for 3D vision and graphics tasks. Previous learning based methods aim to generate fewer points for scene understanding, regardless of the quality of surface reconstruction, leading to results with low reconstruction accuracy and bad point distribution. In this paper, we propose a novel point cloud simplification network (PCS-Net) dedicated to high-quality surface mesh reconstruction while maintaining geometric fidelity. We first learn a sampling matrix in a feature-aware simplification module to reduce the number of points. Then we propose a novel double-scale resampling module to refine the positions of the sampled points, to achieve a uniform distribution. To further retain important shape features, an adaptive sampling strategy with a novel saliency loss is designed. With our PCS-Net, the input non-uniform and noisy point cloud can be simplified in a feature-aware manner, i.e., points near salient features are consolidated but still with uniform distribution locally. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method and show that we outperform previous simplification or reconstruction-oriented upsampling methods. 点云规模的不断增长增加了3D场景的存储、传输和计算的消耗。原始数据是冗余的、有噪声的且不均匀的。因此，简化点云以实现紧凑、干净且均匀的点对于 3D 视觉和图形任务变得越来越重要。以前的基于学习的方法旨在生成更少的点用于场景理解，无论表面重建的质量如何，导致重建精度低且点分布不好的结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的点云简化网络（PCS-Net），致力于高质量的表面网格重建，同时保持几何保真度。我们首先在特征感知简化模块中学习采样矩阵以减少点数。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的双尺度重采样模块来细化采样点的位置，以实现均匀分布。为了进一步保留重要的形状特征，设计了一种具有新颖显着性损失的自适应采样策略。通过我们的 PCS-Net，输入的非均匀和噪声点云可以以特征感知的方式进行简化，即，靠近显着特征的点被合并，但仍具有局部均匀分布。实验证明了我们方法的有效性，并表明我们优于以前的简化或面向重建的上采样方法。 本文提出一种深度点云简化网络（PCS-Net），旨在实现高质量表面重建的同时保持几何保真度。 Yuanqi Li,Jianwei Guo,Xinran Yang,Shun Liu,Jie Guo,Xiaopeng Zhang,Yanwen Guo cs.CV

authors_text: Yibo Yang,Shixiang Chen,Xiangtai Li,Liang Xie,Zhouchen Lin,Dacheng Tao
title: Inducing Neural Collapse in Imbalanced Learning: Do We Really Need a Learnable Classifier at the End of Deep Neural Network?
title_zh: 在不平衡学习中引发神经崩溃：深度神经网络末端真的需要一个可学习的分类器吗？
abstract: Modern deep neural networks for classification usually jointly learn a backbone for representation and a linear classifier to output the logit of each class. A recent study has shown a phenomenon called neural collapse that the within-class means of features and the classifier vectors converge to the vertices of a simplex equiangular tight frame (ETF) at the terminal phase of training on a balanced dataset. Since the ETF geometric structure maximally separates the pair-wise angles of all classes in the classifier, it is natural to raise the question, why do we spend an effort to learn a classifier when we know its optimal geometric structure? In this paper, we study the potential of learning a neural network for classification with the classifier randomly initialized as an ETF and fixed during training. Our analytical work based on the layer-peeled model indicates that the feature learning with a fixed ETF classifier naturally leads to the neural collapse state even when the dataset is imbalanced among classes. We further show that in this case the cross entropy (CE) loss is not necessary and can be replaced by a simple squared loss that shares the same global optimality but enjoys a better convergence property. Our experimental results show that our method is able to bring significant improvements with faster convergence on multiple imbalanced datasets.
summary: Modern deep neural networks for classification usually jointly learn a backbone for representation and a linear classifier to output the logit of each class. A recent study has shown a phenomenon called neural collapse that the within-class means of features and the classifier vectors converge to the vertices of a simplex equiangular tight frame (ETF) at the terminal phase of training on a balanced dataset. Since the ETF geometric structure maximally separates the pair-wise angles of all classes in the classifier, it is natural to raise the question, why do we spend an effort to learn a classifier when we know its optimal geometric structure? In this paper, we study the potential of learning a neural network for classification with the classifier randomly initialized as an ETF and fixed during training. Our analytical work based on the layer-peeled model indicates that the feature learning with a fixed ETF classifier naturally leads to the neural collapse state even when the dataset is imbalanced among classes. We further show that in this case the cross entropy (CE) loss is not necessary and can be replaced by a simple squared loss that shares the same global optimality but enjoys a better convergence property. Our experimental results show that our method is able to bring significant improvements with faster convergence on multiple imbalanced datasets.
abstract_zh: 现代用于分类的深度神经网络通常联合学习表示的主干和线性分类器以输出每个类别的逻辑。最近的一项研究表明了一种称为神经崩溃的现象，即在平衡数据集上训练的最后阶段，特征的类内平均值和分类器向量收敛到单纯形等角紧框架（ETF）的顶点。由于ETF几何结构最大限度地分离了分类器中所有类的成对角度，因此很自然地提出一个问题，当我们知道分类器的最佳几何结构时，为什么我们还要花精力去学习它呢？在本文中，我们研究了学习神经网络进行分类的潜力，其中分类器随机初始化为 ETF 并在训练期间固定。我们基于分层模型的分析工作表明，即使数据集在类之间不平衡，使用固定 ETF 分类器的特征学习自然会导致神经崩溃状态。我们进一步表明，在这种情况下，交叉熵（CE）损失是不必要的，可以用简单的平方损失代替，该损失具有相同的全局最优性，但具有更好的收敛性。我们的实验结果表明，我们的方法能够在多个不平衡数据集上更快地收敛，从而带来显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在深度神经网络分类任务中，是否需要可学习的分类器，并提出在不平衡数据集中固定ETF结构分类器的方法。
AI.motivation: 神经网络分类通常联合学习特征表示和分类器，但ETF结构已知能最优分离类别角度，因此质疑为何仍需学习分类器，尤其在数据不平衡场景下。
AI.method: 基于分层剥离模型分析，固定随机初始化的ETF分类器进行特征学习，并用平方损失替代交叉熵损失以提升收敛性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个不平衡数据集上显著提升收敛速度且保持全局最优性。
AI.conclusion: 固定ETF分类器结合平方损失可有效实现神经坍缩，为不平衡学习提供更高效分类框架。

authors_text: Shaolei Zhang,Yang Feng
title: Gaussian Multi-head Attention for Simultaneous Machine Translation
title_zh: 用于同步机器翻译的高斯多头注意力
comment: Accept to ACL 2022 findings. 12 pages, 8 figures
comments: Accept to ACL 2022 findings. 12 pages, 8 figures
abstract: Simultaneous machine translation (SiMT) outputs translation while receiving the streaming source inputs, and hence needs a policy to determine where to start translating. The alignment between target and source words often implies the most informative source word for each target word, and hence provides the unified control over translation quality and latency, but unfortunately the existing SiMT methods do not explicitly model the alignment to perform the control. In this paper, we propose Gaussian Multi-head Attention (GMA) to develop a new SiMT policy by modeling alignment and translation in a unified manner. For SiMT policy, GMA models the aligned source position of each target word, and accordingly waits until its aligned position to start translating. To integrate the learning of alignment into the translation model, a Gaussian distribution centered on predicted aligned position is introduced as an alignment-related prior, which cooperates with translation-related soft attention to determine the final attention. Experiments on En-Vi and De-En tasks show that our method outperforms strong baselines on the trade-off between translation and latency.
summary: Simultaneous machine translation (SiMT) outputs translation while receiving the streaming source inputs, and hence needs a policy to determine where to start translating. The alignment between target and source words often implies the most informative source word for each target word, and hence provides the unified control over translation quality and latency, but unfortunately the existing SiMT methods do not explicitly model the alignment to perform the control. In this paper, we propose Gaussian Multi-head Attention (GMA) to develop a new SiMT policy by modeling alignment and translation in a unified manner. For SiMT policy, GMA models the aligned source position of each target word, and accordingly waits until its aligned position to start translating. To integrate the learning of alignment into the translation model, a Gaussian distribution centered on predicted aligned position is introduced as an alignment-related prior, which cooperates with translation-related soft attention to determine the final attention. Experiments on En-Vi and De-En tasks show that our method outperforms strong baselines on the trade-off between translation and latency.
abstract_zh: 同步机器翻译 (SiMT) 在接收流源输入的同时输出翻译，因此需要一个策略来确定从哪里开始翻译。目标词和源词之间的对齐通常意味着每个目标词的信息最丰富的源词，因此提供了对翻译质量和延迟的统一控制，但不幸的是，现有的 SiMT 方法没有明确地对对齐进行建模来执行控制。在本文中，我们提出高斯多头注意力（GMA），通过以统一的方式对对齐和翻译进行建模来开发新的 SiMT 策略。对于 SiMT 策略，GMA 对每个目标单词的对齐源位置进行建模，并相应地等待其对齐位置开始翻译。为了将对齐学习整合到翻译模型中，引入了以预测对齐位置为中心的高斯分布作为与对齐相关的先验，它与翻译相关的软注意力配合来确定最终的注意力。 En-Vi 和 De-En 任务的实验表明，我们的方法在翻译和延迟之间的权衡方面优于强大的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出高斯多头注意力（GMA）方法，用于同时机器翻译（SiMT），通过统一建模对齐关系和翻译策略，优化翻译质量与延迟的权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有SiMT方法未显式建模源语与目标语的对齐关系，导致无法有效控制翻译质量与延迟的平衡。
AI.method: 引入以预测对齐位置为中心的高斯分布作为先验，结合软注意力机制，统一建模对齐关系与翻译过程，动态决定翻译起始时机。
AI.result: 在En-Vi和De-En任务中，GMA方法在翻译质量与延迟的权衡上优于现有强基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模对齐关系，GMA方法有效提升了同时机器翻译中质量与延迟的平衡能力。

ai_content.conclusion: 通过显式建模对齐关系，GMA方法有效提升了同时机器翻译中质量与延迟的平衡能力。
